> # START HERE (current pickup, 2026-07-12, Agent B): **GENESIS-FORWARD SLICE COMPLETE + PR #163 OPEN (branch `claude/genesis-internal-heat-memory`): the radiogenic decay is DONE (`3b97b91`), so all four carved pieces are landed: the memory primitives (`accumulate`/`threshold_latch`/`elapsed_age`, `a27f7e5`, reading `World.clock`), the internal-heat axis (`421e9ad`, amended to scaled storage `x1e12` so its real 1e-13..1e-10 W/kg values are representable), the isotope reference data (U-238/U-235/Th-232/K-40 decay constants + specific heat productions, cited Steiger-Jaeger 1977 / Turcotte-Schubert, in geology_floor.toml disjoint from A's periodic_table), and radiogenic decay (`radiogenic_heat` monomial + `radiogenic_decay` first-order accumulate-instance, kernels + KernelContracts + `[[law]]` rows). Scaled-storage design: sub-epsilon magnitudes use the Archard `x`-factor convention, factors chosen so the heat law composes with no rescale (conc x1e6 * specific x1e6 = internal-heat x1e12); the decay constant carries x1e18, read in tick time via the reserved seconds-per-tick bridge. RESERVED-with-basis (surfaced, not fabricated): per-world isotope abundances (per-world data, Mirror = bulk silicate Earth) + the SI-to-tick seconds-per-tick bridge (a genesis cadence). VERIFIED: 134 physics lib tests + floors/graph/steering pass, clippy/fmt/prose clean, floor registry regenerated (124 axes, 19 substances, 70 laws). NEXT: confirm the sim pin result on #163, then stand ready for the gate's audit and A's next carved slice. Prior-arc detail (the survival-window fix, #159 MERGED) below. **
> # START HERE (superseded by the slice-complete note above, 2026-07-12, Agent B): **#156 (photosynthesis-to-productivity derivation + matter-cycle completion) is MERGED to main (`f5323f8`), gate-SIGNED-OFF. The NEW arc is the SURVIVAL-WINDOW CLOSE (gate-assigned as #42, bridge PR), branch `claude/survival-window-close` off main, DESIGN-FIRST and gated on Agent A's gather-vs-burn numbers.** #156 delivered: the derived photosynthesis productivity in the run path (owner-authorized Earth-C3 constants, converted+cross-checked p_max~21 W/m2), and the matter-cycle completion (derived abiotic mineral-weathering `weather_minerals`, wetness-coupled, breaking the soil-bootstrap deadlock so the productivity is LIVE on living). HONEST MERGED VERDICT: Mirror still goes extinct `44>30>10>0`, invariant to food VOLUME 0.1x-100x. THE NEW ARC (gate's assignment + sharp insight): my volume sweep did NOT isolate the dropped `food_energy_density=3000` anchor (a SEPARATE per-bite ENERGY factor), so the "survival window" MIGHT be the reserve-drain-vs-food-scale CALIBRATION rather than a mechanism gap. MY ANCHOR DIAGNOSTIC (reverted): restoring the anchor on the armed BACKGROUND-cell food ALSO gave `44>30>10>0` (suggestive the anchor is not the sole lever), BUT it only touched background food, not the located-producer food the founders may eat, so it is NOT decisive: A's gather-vs-burn readout (A OWNS it, on #157, do NOT duplicate) is the decisive test. DIVISION OF LABOR (gate): A owns the food-present gather-vs-burn MEASUREMENT; I own the FIX. From A's numbers, name the lever: (a) the owner's reserve-drain/anchor CALIBRATION (surface with basis, do NOT author) or (b) a DERIVE-CLEAN mechanism (metabolic draw / undirected-taxis gathering rate / founder endowment, each DERIVED from the being's own body) and build it if (b). BRIDGE PR #159 OPENED (branch `claude/survival-window-close`), design-first opener `docs/working/SURVIVAL_WINDOW_CLOSE_KICKOFF.md`. Grounded the 4 levers at source: metabolic draw / taxis gather / founder endowment ALL DERIVE-CLEAN (Kleiber over own mass, intake through own mass/storage, endowment from own tissue); the ONE unresolved is the food-vs-drain ABSOLUTE-ENERGY bridge (`food_energy_density=3000` placeholder "set so the dev world survives", worldbuild.rs:464, vs the real fixation food ~2 orders smaller). GATE RULED (a-prime) (comment on #159): build the DERIVE-CLEAN JOULES BRIDGE (remove the outcome-authoring 3000; make the survival outcome DERIVE), NOT the owner-recalibration (a). DERIVATION-HUNTER PROOF DONE (commit `6c9b11b`, in the doc): the chain CLOSES from the floor. Reserve full-store = capacity_norm×mass×tissue_energy_density [J]; drain fraction (physiology.rs:631) = (P_basal+P_heat_loss)×tick / E_reserve [physical]; intake gain = content×assim×eta/(mass×energy_density) so `content` MUST be joules; the derived `content=supply` is fixation FLUX (W/m2) NOT joules = THE GAP the 3000 papered over. THE FIX: carry the derived producer food in joules-per-cell = `fixation_flux × cell_area × tick` (cell_area=tile_edge^2, tile_edge=real_speed×tick/base_speed, locomotion.rs:88-93), retire food_energy_density on the armed real-composition path; then intake and drain compare in joules and survival DERIVES. Every coefficient measured/per-world/fundamental, no convenience knob. **HOLDING THE WIRING for A's gather-vs-burn number (gate-gated): if A's gap ~2 orders (matching bio.energy_density-vs-3000) the fix is confirmed; if different magnitude STOP+reconsider. Do NOT commit the bridge until A's number confirms the scale.** COORDINATE with C (R-UNITS-PIN absolute-energy domain, C on the derived-output-live gate): use the existing units substrate, my files = food-drain path (locomotion/physiology/homeostasis) disjoint from C's units/, flag C for a general units extension rather than duplicate. Self check-in scheduled ~1h (trig_01MVyb2xw9twuzj3cJo2B4J4) to catch A's number + gate. GATE VERIFIED the proof at source + SIGNED OFF (proof + design); WIRING CHECKS it will hold me to: byte-neutral off the 4 base pins (touch only the armed real-composition path), living re-pins with a stated reason, intake+drain compare in joules, the 3000 strands no consumer. PREP DONE (non-speculative, uncommitted): (1) CONSUMER AUDIT of food_energy_density=3000 -> it STAYS for the ABSTRACT path (non-real-composition cells locomotion.rs:1703/1732/1759, the UnitBridge homeostasis.rs:81-94, the survivable-regime test physiology.rs:1219); the armed real-composition path ALREADY bypasses it (content=supply). So the fix is ADDITIVE on the armed path (make its food carry joules), NOT a global removal -> nothing stranded. (2) THE FIX SITE: convert the armed real-composition food to joules via `× cell_area × tick` (at the armed intake locomotion.rs:1728 `is_real_composition` branch, OR the productivity capacity environ.rs step_productivity). (3) THE ONE WIRING INPUT: cell_area needs the TILE EDGE in metres, which is NOT stored (only the BASIS of base_speed: tile_edge=real_speed/base_speed, dev base_speed=1/1 so tile_edge~1.4m). So wiring adds a reserved-with-basis per-world SPATIAL datum (tile_edge or the measured 1.4 m/s walking speed), ALLOWED (measured/per-world, the proof already classified real_speed as measured), NOT a survival knob. HOLD the commit until A's gather-vs-burn gap confirms ~2 orders; then wire, verify the 4 checks, commit, re-pin living. #155 stays HELD behind the survival-window close. GENESIS-FORWARD SPEEDUP ROLE PREP (gate-assigned downtime, next work after #42): skimmed GEOLOGY_ARC_PACKET.md + EMERGENT_ATMOSPHERE_PIPELINE_DERIVE_MAP.md. GEOLOGY (packet UNCOMMITTED): composition-in to geology-out via a free-energy petrology kernel, Phases 0-4; remaining = VERIFY the 8 de-bias fixes + DEEPEN fixes 5-6 (impact/aeolian/glacial first-class, exotic no-solid-surface/magma-ocean/ocean-world structure); BIG PART-D CATCH the floor is MEMORYLESS, needs a TEMPORAL/MEMORY dimension (clock, per-parcel age-stamp, accumulators, irreversible LATCH); determinism primitives to build (fixed-iteration-cap): fractional-power, connected-components, priority-flood, convection/petrology solvers; hardware-bound (5090, coarse-LoD genesis, tabulate). ATMOSPHERE (#40, not built): ASSEMBLE standing modules into ONE coupled deterministic fixed-point solve, per-world vector the only difference; SEAM1 redox anchor DEMOTES to computed-with-bounded-override (mass-driven disproportionation staircase); SEAM2 a MEMORYLESS CONTINUATION solver (named state only, march the slow manifold, pseudo-arclength continuation, LATTICE QUANTIZATION for bit-repro, limit-cycles=features); PROVENANCE-DAG closure-reachability discipline; building the loop unblocks #143. READY for parallelizable slices when A's scoping plan is gated. **A'S GATHER-VS-BURN REFUTED a-prime AS THE BINDING FIX (gate comment on #159): energy gather 0.0000 EXACTLY with ~980 abundant food, burn 280-734 -> a MECHANISM/wiring break, not the units scale (a units gap would give small NONZERO gather).** LOCUS PINNED at source (my post 4950070028), and it is NOT A's resource-vs-material store mismatch: the food IS correctly stored (regrow_supply writes bio.energy_density supply environ.rs:2042; the energy axis backs on bio.energy_density homeostasis.rs:180; same resource field the ingest reads; draw_feeder_set never runs, empty draw_set). THE REAL BREAK: INGEST is CONTROLLER OUTPUT 3 (locomotion.rs:2038 'ingest_act: fire when source underfoot and reserve low'), gated on activation>0 (locomotion.rs:1613); a founder-zero grazer (zero weights) emits ZERO activation so the INGEST arm NEVER executes; the derived-taxis survival floor (locomotion.rs:1837-1853) runs ONLY run_and_tumble (a MOVE), never ingests. So a founder-zero being SEEKS food (floor MOVE) but never EATS it, draining its FULL starting endowment over ~3 gens, gather=0 exactly. THE FIX (gate-described, derive-clean, MERGES a-prime): extend the derived-taxis SURVIVAL FLOOR to also REFLEXIVELY INGEST the food underfoot (satiation-room-bounded so a full being eats nothing, NO authored threshold; keys on the being's own reserve room + the tile's real composition, no authored target/value, exactly like the taxis floor), so a founder-zero being eats found food while selection wires the deliberate forage controller (output 3); AND carry the armed food IN JOULES (a-prime E_food=fixation_flux×cell_area×tick) so the reflexive intake and the Kleiber drain compare in joules. Closes mechanism (food reaches reserve) + units (joules) in one fix. BUILD PLAN: (1) refactor the INGEST arm logic (locomotion.rs:1658-1764) into a callable helper; (2) invoke it from the floor_run block when floor active (reflexive ingest); (3) a-prime joules on the armed food supply (environ capacity ×cell_area×tick; add reserved-with-basis tile_edge/real-speed spatial datum); byte-neutral off the 4 base pins (armed living path only), living re-pins with a stated reason. Then RE-MEASURE with A's gather-vs-burn (gather should rise off zero; then see if the joules are commensurate = sustain or die-slower, the honest derived result). MECHANISM HALF BUILT + COMMITTED (`51648bf`, gate-SIGNED-OFF the pin+fix with 2 derive-clean conditions, both met): extracted the INGEST arm into `ingest_underfoot` (behavior-preserving, keys on the being's OWN reserves/edibility/mass + the tile's real composition, satiation-bounded = NO authored threshold, NO hardcoded food class), called from the derived-taxis floor as the reflexive eat-underfoot beneath the controller (controller pre-empts, foraging still emerges). VERIFIED: 4 base pins byte-exact, deliberate INGEST byte-identical (7 ingest tests hold), clippy/fmt clean. living re-pins 7b5b6446->f0ca6b0d (founders now EAT, gather off zero) but trajectory STILL 44>30>10>0 because the food is fixation FLUX ~21 W/m2 not joules (~2 orders too small vs drain). A-PRIME DONE (the units half, commit `b5300f2`): SURVIVAL-WINDOW FIX COMPLETE + PROVEN END-TO-END. Mechanism (51648bf) + units (b5300f2). The a-prime joules bridge carries the derived food in JOULES = fixation_flux × cell_area × tick in step_productivity; `cell_area_m2` a reserved-with-basis per-world spatial datum on PhotosynthesisCalib (tile_edge²=(real_speed/base_speed)²~2 m², fail-loud from mirror.toml + dev-fixtures.toml). PROVEN: at real cell_area=2 founders go EXTINCT 44>30>10>0, but cranking cell_area they SUSTAIN AND GROW 44>64>84>...>187, so the mechanism plumbs food to the reserve and the units are commensurate; the extinction at the real Earth-C3 scale is a DERIVED result (one cell's ~42 J/tick fixation < the founder-zero grazer's ~280-734 J/tick Kleiber drain), NO authored survival knob. > # START HERE (current pickup, 2026-07-12, Agent B): **#151 (derived-taxis floor slices 1-2) is MERGED to main (`ed0e002`); the DERIVED-TAXIS ARMING arc (#152 slice 3, branch `claude/derived-taxis-arming`) is BUILT and pushed, awaiting the gate's audit.** The gate SIGNED OFF the slice-3 design with four rulings and cleared #151 to merge. The #152 branch was rebased onto post-#151 main (the floor code is present). **Slice 3 built under the four rulings:** (1) DERIVE the two calibration values at source AND confirm empirically. `DerivedTaxisParams::derive(resting_drain, noise_floor)` (locomotion.rs) computes `resting_tumble_rate = resting_drain/noise_floor` and `reserve_sensitivity = 1/noise_floor`; `resting_drain` is the being's OWN summed resting per-tick reserve fall (`taxis_resting_drain`, reading `DerivedDrain::base` where a physiology is installed else the axis def `base_drain`), `noise_floor` is `harm.noise_floor` (existing reserved value). The arming carrier collapsed to one scale: `DerivedTaxisArming { reserve_noise_floor }` (replaces the two-field `DerivedTaxisParams` on `Embodiment.derived_taxis`/`set_derived_taxis`); everything derives per-being at the step, so NO new authored value (Principle 11). **LOAD-BEARING FINDING (the gate's anticipated missing datum):** the derived pair alone did NOT reproduce the bias, because `resting_tumble_rate` lands near 1 and a metabolising being's raw reserve delta is systematically negative (net-falling between feeds), so the suppression term can never fall below a high resting rate. The MISSING DATUM is the sensory ADAPTATION baseline: `taxis_reward_signal` now returns `Σ delta + resting_drain` (centred on the being's own resting drain, which equals the net environmental UPTAKE), so a heading that feeds faster than resting reads POSITIVE and suppresses the tumble rate. The baseline is the being's own `base_drain`, DERIVED not authored (exactly the gate's "surface the missing datum, don't author a constant"). It aligns the mechanism with the gate's own stated expectation ("suppressed when the reward rises"). CONFIRMED empirically: the slice-2 arena (`derived_taxis_walk_biases...`, runner.rs) now arms with the being's own noise floor and lets `derive` produce the rates (NO fixture); 120 founder-zero beings drift WEST ~-1.9 cells under a reserve-feeding gradient, matched flat control ~+0.1 (unbiased), clean contrast ~-2.0, deterministic. SECOND HONEST LIMIT documented: interoceptive chemotaxis needs the reserve LIVE (unrailed); when it empties (fully starved) or saturates, the delta dies and the floor loses the gradient, so the arena uses a slow metabolism to hold the reserve above the empty rail across the window. (2) Composition: OVERRIDE KEPT, no build change. (3) Arming on `living` (run_world.rs, reads `harm.noise_floor` from the manifest): the four base pins hold bit-exact (`4bbf6b59`/`1db633b3`/`c9d5cc17`/`ad69f2bf`, they declare no floor); `living` re-pins to `24a2fbb6dc0f6107ece6ac34ff230d31` (stated re-pin). HONEST VERDICT: founders STILL go extinct, ALL by STARVATION (pop 24, 44 gen2, 30 gen4, 10 gen6, 0 by gen8), so the floor is necessary-for-seeking but NOT sufficient-for-survival against the GATED biosphere balance (interim food density, awaits the owner's net-primary-productivity datum); REPORTED, never tuned. (4) Reproduction-threshold sibling: deferred to its own follow-on arc. VERIFIED: clippy `-p civsim-sim --all-targets` clean; sim lib suite green; single-pass section-9 clean (derive-vs-author: arming carries only the existing noise floor, reward baseline is the being's own drain; alien: reserve-less body degrades to a zero-rate unbiased walk; steering: direction emerges from the field, polarity is the death-floor-grounded reward sign, determinism holds). Build log in `docs/working/DERIVED_TAXIS_ARMING_KICKOFF.md`. **NEXT: post the slice-3 build to #152 for the gate's audit with the pins; on approval, open the reproduction-threshold sibling as its own arc.** Subscribed to #152.

> # START HERE (superseded, 2026-07-11, Agent B): **#150 (2b per-feature discrimination) is MERGED to main (`94e20cc`); the DERIVED-TAXIS SURVIVAL FLOOR arc (#151, branch `claude/derived-taxis-floor`) is OPEN, design-first, awaiting the gate's ruling.** The gate VERIFIED and APPROVED the #150 two-way-sort proof (independent frame-blind, all five claims confirmed) and merged it. **#151 (derived-taxis floor):** the gate's highest-leverage arc, the general fix for the founder-extinction wall -- seeking is a run-and-tumble biased random walk, always on, coupling motility to the being's OWN felt reserve change, NO controller weight. GROUNDED: the interoceptive substrate is BUILT -- `ReserveMemory::delta` (homeostasis.rs:1136, per-Walker locomotion.rs:609) is the being's own signed per-tick reserve derivative; `is_harm_tick`/`is_reward_tick` classify its sign; uptake is already INDISCRIMINATE (forage INGEST / geophage bite, edibility downstream); `forage_taxis_weights` (controller.rs:1224) is the directional CONTRAST the floor must NOT be. The GAP: a run-and-tumble floor primitive that modulates the tumble RATE CONTINUOUSLY by the sign of the reserve derivative (rising -> lower tumble, persist; falling -> higher, re-orient), no directional percept/source classification, plus the emergence proof (founder-zero being accumulates up a reserve-feeding gradient by the floor alone; matched control = flat field / non-responsive reserve = unbiased walk). Opener `docs/working/DERIVED_TAXIS_FLOOR_KICKOFF.md` carries the gate's two corrections (stochastic temporal-difference tumble not directional taxis; indiscriminate uptake) + a section-11 smoke self-check. **LOAD-BEARING POLARITY FORK put to the gate: is 'rising lowers the tumble rate' a PHYSICS-FLOOR coupling law (recommended (a): the primitive 'persist while your reserve rises' is the general causal primitive, always-on at founder-zero, dissolves the wall) or a HERITABLE selected sign ((b), the strict 'sign must emerge' reading, which reopens the wall)?** Sibling flag (not this arc): the reproduce-on-threshold is DERIVABLE (~2x minimum viable daughter reserve from base_drain+capacity), route through the asexual `GeneticScheme` clone+mutation, founder-zero default. **GATE APPROVED THE BUILD (polarity ruled (a)-DERIVED). SLICES 1-2 BUILT.** Slice 1 (byte-neutral opt-in): `Phase::TUMBLE`; the run-and-tumble floor (locomotion.rs) is the FALLBACK beneath the controller (founder-zero decides no MOVE -> floor drives it), tumble prob = clamp(resting_tumble_rate - reserve_sensitivity*reward, 0, 1); reward = summed reserve delta over backed reserves, read BEFORE the tick re-snapshots reserve_memory (last-tick net, admit-the-alien); rising -> persist, falling -> re-orient (redraw 8-dir under Phase::TUMBLE). New `Walker.taxis_heading` (hash-folded when Some); `Embodiment.derived_taxis: Option<DerivedTaxisParams>` (`set_derived_taxis`); threaded through step_with_field_dirs (8 other callers pass None); added `walkers_mut()`. Slice 2 (test-only): `derived_taxis_walk_biases_up_the_gradient_only_when_the_field_feeds_the_reserve` -- 24 founder-zero blank-controller beings, floor armed, automatic position-based uptake (west-rich gradient vs uniform flat, drain > max uptake so no saturation). RESULT: gradient -> mean disp -0.62 WEST (up-gradient by the floor alone); flat control -0.07 (unbiased). Deterministic. VERIFIED: four pins bit-exact (`4bbf6b59`/`1db633b3`/`c9d5cc17`/`ad69f2bf`; floor opt-in off); clippy --all-targets clean; suite green; section-9 clean. HONEST LIMITS: modest disp that PEAKS then decays (west-wall pileup; measured at peak; larger/periodic field sharpens); the automatic uptake is the TEST harness (shipped indiscriminate-uptake = slice-3 arming); the reserved calib is a test fixture (shipped values DERIVE from sensory/metabolic data per the gate's standing rule, slice-3). **NEXT: post the #151 proof to the gate. Slice 3 (arming, composition rule, derived reproduction-threshold sibling) stays a flag.** Build note: the too_many_arguments clippy allow must sit DIRECTLY above step_with_field_dirs (a helper inserted between them orphaned it, breaking CI -D warnings). Subscribed to #151. **GATE RULING (build approved): polarity fork -> (a) but DERIVED (stronger): the coupling is 'persist while the reward-signal is positive, re-orient when not'; the reward-sign is the being's OWN built `is_reward_tick` (reserve rising beyond ordinary recovery), which DERIVES from the physical death floor (a rising reserve is further from the hard INTEGRITY cull, so rising-is-good is a death-floor consequence, not a modeling choice); 'persist when rewarded' = the reinforcement primitive. So polarity = death-floor-grounded reward-sign x reinforcement, both derived -> emergence-clean AND dissolves the wall (every founder seeks correctly from tick 0). Build slices 1-2, byte-neutral opt-in, four pins held; slice 3 (arming, composition rule, reproduction-threshold sibling) stays a flag. BUILD GROUNDING (for the build): INSERTION POINT locomotion.rs:1416-1417 -- when a being DECIDES MOVE (activation>0) with NO heading (`mag2 <= HEADING_EPS`) it currently calls `explore(w,terrain,speed,p,seed,tick)` (locomotion.rs:1642, draws a heading keyed on `tick/period` Phase::EXPLORE, HELD for `explore_persistence` ticks, rotates 8 dirs if blocked). BUT a founder-zero controller has MOVE activation 0 and never reaches this branch (the extinction wall), so the run-and-tumble FLOOR must run BENEATH the controller as the fallback when no controller MOVE-heading drove the being this tick, not only inside the MOVE branch. DESIGN: new per-Walker persistent taxis heading (held during a 'run', redrawn on a 'tumble'; new dynamic state like `reserve_memory`, folded into the hash when armed); a NEW `Phase::TUMBLE` (add to crates/core/src/keys.rs, next const after CREATURE_REPRO=0x1F, i.e. 0x20); each tick draw a tumble (DrawKey::entity(id,tick,Phase::TUMBLE)) whose probability is a CONTINUOUS function of the being's own reserve derivative (`ReserveMemory::delta` aggregated over its declared backed reserves / `is_reward_tick`): reward-positive -> low tumble prob (persist heading); reward-negative -> high tumble prob (redraw). Walk along the held heading via walk_dir. OPT-IN flag (off by default -> four pins hold byte-exact); OFF where a controller supplied a MOVE heading this tick (composition rule = controller overrides floor; the exact composition is a gate-flagged slice-3 item, default 'controller heading wins'). Then the emergence proof arena (founder-zero being, reserve-feeding gradient -> accumulates up-gradient by the floor alone; matched control flat-field / non-responsive-reserve -> unbiased walk), deterministic. Watch: fold the new heading state into state_hash canonically only when armed; verify pins byte-exact opt-out. REWARD-TIMING RESOLVED (load-bearing): metabolize (drain) is at locomotion.rs:1611, AFTER the MOVE/floor at ~1416, so this-tick's reserve_memory.delta is ~0 at floor-time. FIX: read `reserve_memory.delta` BEFORE the tick's re-snapshot (the snapshot is at locomotion.rs:1250, gated at 1248) -> prev = last-tick-start, current = last-tick-end, so the delta = LAST tick's completed net change (a one-tick-lagged temporal difference, exactly run-and-tumble). So capture `taxis_reward = sum over the being's backed reserves of reserve_memory.delta(axis)` BEFORE the snapshot, use it in the floor. NO new reward state needed (reserve_memory already persists prev); the only new persistent state is `taxis_heading: Option<(Fixed,Fixed)>`. Extend the snapshot gate at 1248 with `|| derived_taxis_armed` so it snapshots each armed tick. Tumble prob = continuous fn of taxis_reward (e.g. clamp(base - gain*reward, min, max)); base/gain/min/max are RESERVED-with-basis (surface, do not fabricate: base = the resting tumble rate = 1/explore_persistence sibling; gain = the reserve-swing-to-tumble sensitivity; bounds = [0,1] the probability floor/ceil). The floor runs when armed AND the being did not move via a controller MOVE-with-heading this tick (founder-zero never decides MOVE, so track a per-being `controller_moved_with_heading` flag; the floor is the fallback). Draw the tumble via DrawKey::entity(id,tick,Phase::TUMBLE); on tumble or no-held-heading, redraw an 8-dir heading (like explore, rotate if blocked) and store in taxis_heading; else keep it; walk_dir along it. Only ONE `Walker { }` literal (Walker::new locomotion.rs:736) needs the field default None. Hash fold: append after the `wielded` fold (runner.rs:7828), `if let Some((hx,hy))=w.taxis_heading { write hx, hy }`. Opt-in flag on Embodiment (sibling of set_being_percept). CI lesson: `cargo clippy -p civsim-sim --all-targets` before pushing test-cfg changes.

> # START HERE (current pickup, 2026-07-11, Agent B): **#148 (predation completion) is MERGED to main (`4d738d3`); the 2b PER-FEATURE DISCRIMINATION arc (#150, branch `claude/being-feature-discrimination`) is OPEN, design-first, awaiting the gate's ruling.** The gate VERIFIED and APPROVED the #148 corpse-pays proof (independent frame-blind, all claims confirmed) and merged it after two docs-only wording corrections (`e1b0785`): the seed is "symmetric zero-mean +/-8" (selection on standing variation read as the mean, not de-novo drift of a literally-zero weight); the slice-2 test deposits the corpse to the `TissueField` directly via `TissueField::deposit`, while `set_corpse_matter` is the production lifecycle hook (default off, not called in the test). **#150 (2b per-feature discrimination):** the gate ruled it next to give the sharp emitter-specific sort the magnitude proxy cannot (a lineage cannot both AVOID a predator and APPROACH a prey when both are warm emitters, because the being channel keys on magnitude alone = one net disposition). GROUNDED at source: the per-feature discrimination SUBSTRATE is ALREADY BUILT and off by default (the being-feature perceive pass runner.rs:6216; `read_emitter` = `physiology::surface_optical_axis` = the emitter's OWN covering material datum `cov.mat(axis)`, no kind; `creature_being_feature_directions` accumulates the toward-direction per (channel, bucket); the perceiver's founder-zero freely-signed per-bucket weight `being_feature_input_base` steers; gated on `being_features.is_empty()` so byte-neutral off). The GAP: the two-way-sort EMERGENCE PROOF (selection drives OPPOSITE poles on a wounding-emitter feature-bucket vs a safe/paying one), control-isolated (indistinguishable features collapse to the magnitude net disposition), with arming flagged as a re-pin follow-on. Opener `docs/working/BEING_FEATURE_DISCRIMINATION_KICKOFF.md` carries a section-11 smoke self-check (clean: raw surface datum, no authored identity; signs are a selection outcome; admit-the-alien; control isolates the sort); the section-10 frame-blind panel runs before build on the gate's ruling. **GATE APPROVED #150 to build (waived the section-10 panel as the Nth application of a proven pattern; single-pass section-9 per slice). SLICES 1-2 BUILT.** Slice 1 (grounding, byte-neutral): two coverings bucket differently as DATA (bare hide kind 0 -> band_1 0.96 -> bucket 19; chitin kind 4 -> band_1 0.88 -> bucket 17); the being-feature perceive pass (runner.rs:6216) reads `read_emitter`=`surface_optical_axis`, `creature_being_feature_directions` fills the per-(channel,bucket) block, the per-bucket MOVE-heading weight (`being_feature_input_base`+2*bucket) steers. Slice 2 (the proof): `per_feature_sort_emerges_only_when_the_emitters_are_distinguishable` (runner.rs, test-only), the mirror of #144/#146/#148 over TWO buckets. A WOUNDING predator (chitin, bucket 17, INTEGRITY cull) east; a PREY emitter (bare hide, bucket 19) with food west. RESULT (distinguishable): prey bucket -> APPROACH pole (+0.35), predator bucket -> AVOID pole (-0.17), OPPOSITE poles off the symmetric zero-mean seed; sort (prey_b-pred_b) +0.52. Matched control (predator ALSO bare hide, one bucket): predator bucket 17 never populated, holds at zero seed (-0.00), shared bucket muddled net (+0.16); sort collapses to +0.16. The predator bucket goes to avoid ONLY when perceptually distinct. Deterministic. Four pins hold bit-exact (test-only); full suite green; clippy --all-targets clean; section-9 self-audit clean. HONEST LIMIT (the two-bucket sibling of #146's modest flee): magnitudes MODEST because approach/avoid pull on the SAME MOVE heading (coupled weights) and the stationary point-predator only culls the fraction that lands on its exact cell -> the SIGN sort + control-collapse is proven, not a saturated magnitude; a decoupled stronger sort (independent-axis geometry / mobile hazard) is flagged. The bucket RESOLUTION is the arena's parameter; per the gate's STANDING RULE, the arming follow-on (slice 3, flag) must DERIVE the shipped resolution from the perceiver's sensory acuity, not ship a fixed 1/20. BUILD NOTES: culled creatures are RETIRED same-tick so a live dead-count reads 0 even when the predator kills (instrument via the offspring counter/population trajectory); food distance trades approach-strength vs avoid-exposure; the perceiver body needs a fat-body organ (kind 0) so offspring compound (#148 lesson). **NEXT: post the #150 proof to the gate for its audit; on merge, the NEXT ARC (gate-queued) is the DERIVED-TAXIS survival floor (design-first, fresh PR).** DERIVED-TAXIS SPEC (captured from the gate's forward comments, for that opener): a STOCHASTIC temporal-difference tumble -- modulate the TUMBLE RATE continuously by the SIGN of the being's OWN felt reserve derivative (rising -> lower tumble/persist heading; falling -> higher tumble/re-orient), NO directional percept and NO source classification (NOT the existing directional `forage_taxis_weights` controller.rs:889, which reads a known source direction = a high-level fact); eating stays INDISCRIMINATE automatic uptake (nourish-or-harm emerges downstream via `edibility`); the sign of the bias must EMERGE from reserve dynamics, never authored. Repro-side flag (not that arc): reproduce-on-threshold is DERIVABLE (~2x minimum viable daughter reserve from base_drain+capacity), route through the asexual `GeneticScheme` clone+mutation, founder-zero default. Subscribed to #150. CI lesson: `cargo clippy -p civsim-sim --all-targets` before pushing test-cfg changes.

> # START HERE (current pickup, 2026-07-11, Agent B): the PREDATION-COMPLETION arc (#148) slices 1-2 are BUILT, pushed, awaiting the gate's audit. **#144 (approach pole) MERGED to main; #146 (flee pole) BUILT + gate-approved (awaiting merge).** **#148 (`claude/predation-completion`): the pay-off loop -- a corpse PAYS the being that eats it, and the intake-from-corpse disposition EMERGES under selection.** The gate APPROVED the opener with two sharpening notes and I built to them. NOTE 1 (the corpse must PAY, prove the credit at source): grounded, the credit is ALREADY wired, nothing missing (byte-neutral). The whole-body bite in `geophage` credits the eater at runner.rs:3247 (`w.homeostasis.ingest(axis.id, gain)`, `gained += gain`; loose-matter arm 3132), keyed on the eater's own `physiology.assimilation`; in production a corpse reaches the tissue field through the corpse-lifecycle hook `set_corpse_matter` (4136, default off), and the slice-2 TEST deposits a standing corpse to the SAME field directly via `TissueField::deposit` (re-applied each tick), not through that hook. The earlier "the killer does not gain reserves from its kill" was the STRIKE path (a wound is a deposit, not a feed); the EATER gains through `geophage`, a separate action, need not be the killer (scavenging admitted). NOTE 2 (what emerges here vs #144): the intake disposition is the EXISTING GEOPHAGE affordance-activation output (controller `decide` controller.rs:1093 -> locomotion.rs:1573 -> runner.rs:6917), NOT a new substrate and NOT automatic-underfoot (auto INGEST eats `ResourceField`, the corpse lives in `TissueField` eaten ONLY via GEOPHAGE). #144's approach covers REACHING the corpse; the new result is the PAY-OFF loop, not a re-run of #144. **PROOF: `corpse_intake_disposition_emerges_only_when_the_corpse_pays` (runner.rs, test-only), the mirror of #144/#146 on the GEOPHAGE output.** Treatment (assimilable corpse): population-mean intake weight (symmetric ±8 seed, mean 0) -> +7.35 over 8 gens, population 12 -> 147, 135 offspring (compounding lineage). Matched held control (non-assimilable, identical corpse): mean stays EXACTLY 0.000, population persists at 12, 0 offspring. Deterministic. **Four canonical pins hold bit-exact (`4bbf6b59`/`1db633b3`/`c9d5cc17`/`ad69f2bf`; test-only).** Full sim lib suite green; `cargo clippy -p civsim-sim --all-targets` clean. Reproductive (not lethal) selection so both arms persist -> a LIVE control at its zero-mean seed. KEY BUILD LESSON: a bred offspring gets its reserve capacity from its BODY ORGANS (`Homeostasis::new`), so an organ-less body gives a zero-capacity energy reserve and the lineage cannot compound; giving the arena body a fat-body organ (kind 0, `bio.energy_density`-backing) is the lever that turned a modest founder-only shift into the strong compounding signal. Section-9 self-audit clean (five lenses verified at source: control isolates the pay-off, disposition symmetric zero-mean freely-signed, pay-off keys on the eater's own assimilation = the alien case IS the control, no Terran/species read, determinism holds). Design + build log: `docs/working/PREDATION_COMPLETION_KICKOFF.md`. **NEXT: await the gate's audit of #148 slices 1-2; the gate merges #146. On approval, #148 is complete for merge (slice 3 stays a flag).** Subscribed to #146 and #148. FLAGGED SIBLINGS (unchanged): contested-corpse split -> unbuilt owner-locked snapshot-apply proportional-split contention resolver; full down-live-prey-and-eat -> creature-strike capability + 2b per-feature discrimination. CI lesson: `cargo clippy -p civsim-sim --all-targets` before pushing test-cfg changes (CI uses -D warnings). Corpse-arena build recipe: no set_physiology (axis base_drain; the bite reads the WALKER's own `physiology.assimilation`); seed the GEOPHAGE-activation weight from bias (geophage_base*n_in+bias), MOVE/INGEST unseeded; give the body a fat-body organ so offspring compound; re-deposit the corpse (`tissue_mut().deposit`) each tick; measure `controller.weight(geophage_base*n_in+bias)`.

> # START HERE (prior arc, 2026-07-11, Agent B): branch `claude/creature-selection-loop`, PR **#144**, the CREATURE-SELECTION-LOOP arc (make the predator-prey reaction EMERGE observably in `full --creatures` and re-pin it). The owner ruled "FINISH THE CREATURE SIDE"; the gate approved the amended framing TO BUILD in slices (three amendments: intake-from-an-other with a contestable corpse; the fitness read over the being's OWN axes; the discrimination resolved BY CHANNEL), single-pass section-9 self-audit each, `full --creatures` the one stated re-pin with the four canonical held, post for its gate. **SLICE 1 BUILT (`6919740`), byte-neutral, tested, section-9 self-audit clean, PUSHED, reported to the gate (comment 4947550545).** Slice 1 (amendment 2): `reproduce_creatures` eligibility generalized from the single ENERGY_DENSITY-backed axis (with an early return that hard-locked out any no-energy-reserve metabolism) to a surplus across the being's OWN declared reserve axes via a new pure helper `reproduction_eligible(homeostasis, reserve_axes, threshold)` (occupancy >= threshold on EVERY backed reserve, `backing_component.is_some()`; the derived integrity/temperature bands excluded; `.all` vacuously true for a no-reserve alien). New unit test proves the ALL semantics, the derived-band exclusion, and the admit-the-alien vacuous case. **Byte-neutral empirically: the four canonical pins hold bit-exact (`4bbf6b59`/`1db633b3`/`c9d5cc17`/`ad69f2bf`) and `full --creatures` holds `9701449f`** (the held creature hash also CONFIRMS at source the honest limit: no lineage-carrying creature reaches an eligibility beat in the shipped run, so the eligible list is empty under both reads). Full sim lib suite green (896 passed), fmt+clippy clean. **SLICE 2 HELD for the gate's ruling on a BRIDGE FORK (the load-bearing point).** Grounded at source, the framing's clause "the resource-density channel draws a being to a corpse" does NOT hold as built: the resource-density percept AND the forage INGEST both read `ResourceField` (`cell_content` locomotion.rs:460, runner.rs:6315; producers populate it), but a corpse deposits to a DIFFERENT field `TissueField` (`emb.tissue` runner.rs:7460) and is eaten only via the whole-body bite inside `geophage` (runner.rs:3130, trophic-agnostic, reads `emb.tissue`). So intake-from-a-corpse's INTAKE half is already wired, but a being drawn by the resource-density percept neither senses nor eats a corpse. The fork put to the gate: (a) surface tissue into `cell_content` + union tissue into the forage INGEST (one channel for all edible matter); (b) a distinct tissue-density percept channel + the existing geophage bite (producers and bodies resolve by SEPARATE channels, my recommendation, cleanest fit to the by-channel emergence claim, no double-count); (c) corpse also writes `ResourceField` at death (blurs producer/consumer, double-count risk). Subscribed to #144. **NEXT: await the gate's bridge-fork ruling, then build slice 2 (the intake-from-an-other bridge), slice 3 (arm the loop in `full --creatures`, the one re-pin), slice 4 (by-channel emergence proof with a control).** Design + build log + slice-2 fork: `docs/working/CREATURE_SELECTION_LOOP_DESIGN.md`. Grounding for slice 1: `reproduce_creatures` runner.rs:~7286; the helper `reproduction_eligible` runner.rs:~1174; occupancy stocks.rs:89. **UPDATE: the gate APPROVED slice 1 (with the biosphere-balance/starvation coupling carried as the stated limit) and RULED the slice-2 fork to refined (a): the identity-blind percept UNION, read-only, no INGEST or deposit change (rejected (b) as per-class perception, (c) as double-counting). SLICE 2 BUILT (`5998c9c`), byte-neutral on ALL FIVE pins including `living`, pushed, reported (comment 4947790075).** Slice 2: new pure `TissueField::cell_content` (material.rs, identity-blind total matter mass = `axis_supply` summed over all axes); the resource-feature perceive pass (runner.rs:6335) reads `emb.resources.cell_content(cell) + emb.tissue.cell_content(cell)`, so a being is drawn to a corpse as to a plant; the two intake paths untouched (forage INGEST eats `ResourceField`, whole-body bite `geophage` eats `TissueField`, each once, no double-count). Unit test (`cell_content` = per-axis sum) + end-to-end test (a corpse steers a bucket-weighted perceiver). `living` byte-neutral EXPLAINED at source: its founders carry zero forage weights (found unwired), so the union enriches a controller INPUT a founder-zero weight zeroes, and the toward-direction is transient not hashed state; the union is proven LIVE by the end-to-end test (non-zero weight). Full sim lib suite green (899 passed). **UPDATE 2: the gate APPROVED slice 2 and RULED the proof strategy option (i) (ship the arming, prove emergence in a dedicated instrumented test with a held control; do NOT hold for biosphere-balance). SLICE 3 BUILT (arm the loop in `full --creatures`), the four canonical HELD bit-exact, `full --creatures` RE-PINS `9701449f` -> `72adf87d` on "loop armed", pushed, reported (comment 4947938985).** Slice 3: `full --creatures` already armed the reproduction beat + B3 being-percept; slice 3 arms the RESOURCE-DENSITY percept (the 2b being-feature channel left as the flagged follow-on per amendment 3). Broadened `living_resource_features` -> `scenario_resource_features(cfg)` (channel for `cfg.living || cfg.creatures`), carried in `embodiment_genesis` (so `build_dawn_runner` arms the runner layout) AND `dawn_layout` (founder gene sizing, the invariant `dawn_layout == emb.layout()`), via new `ControllerLayout::with_percepts_being_and_resource_features` (controller.rs). Founder alignment CONFIRMED (24 founders -> 35, 17 births, the normal viability trajectory, not a misalignment die-off). Full suite green (899). **UPDATE 3: ALL FOUR SLICES BUILT. Slice 3 APPROVED by the gate. SLICE 4 BUILT (the matter-channel emergence proof), pushed, reported (comment 4948070362).** Slice 4 (`slice4_matter_channel_selection_moves_the_weight_only_under_the_gradient`, runner.rs): a deterministic in-run selection arena under a STATED non-shipped regime (no physiology metabolism, a flat energy drain, food refreshed each tick, so reaching food is the isolated fitness variable). 12 founders seeded SYMMETRIC zero-mean resource-density approach weight (+8/-8); a being FINDS food only via its resource-density MOVE-heading weight and EATS via the baseline source-underfoot INGEST. Under the food gradient the mean approach weight is driven to +8 (7.997, selection: approachers reach food, breed; avoiders starve); the matched HELD CONTROL (uniform food) stays ~0.57. 14x separation, deterministic replay, the beat mints offspring. The KEY build lessons (for any similar arena): (1) do NOT set_physiology (Kleiber drain is ~1.0/tick, uncontrollable) -> use axis base_drain + the None-branch INGEST refill; (2) MOVE and INGEST both firing from bias means MOVE always wins (one action/tick) -> wire INGEST + MOVE-suppress from the energy source-underfoot slot (axis_input_base(ENERGY)+1) so the being eats on food, MOVE-heading from the resource-density percept (the selected trait); (3) refresh food each tick (INGEST depletes it). Honest scope (amendment 3): matter channel DEMONSTRATED; being-channel threat-avoidance = same mechanism with the predator (#120) as gradient, OFFERED to the gate; active-hunt magnitude-proxy scoped, 2b two-way sort flagged. Full suite green (900). **UPDATE 4: gate APPROVED slice 4 and requested the being-channel THREAT sibling. I built it and it SURFACED A REAL SEAM (reported comment 4948156138): the authored predator is causally INERT in the stepped selection path -- predator-present and predator-absent runs are BIT-IDENTICAL -- because `spawn_predator` does not seed `body_temp` (the #120-flagged emission seam), so prey never perceive it and the FLEE gradient does not flow. Pinned precisely: a CO-LOCATED predator DOES cull a prey (living 15 vs 16), so the strike + INTEGRITY cull work; the cause is EMISSION, not the wound. Second blocker: the magnitude-only being channel has prey perceiving EACH OTHER, so predator-specific avoid needs the 2b per-feature discrimination (flagged follow-on). Removed the non-proving probe (did NOT commit a test showing no emergence); recorded the finding in the design doc; the matter-channel approach-pole proof STANDS as slice 4. Threat/flee pole blocked on (1) #120 predator-emission seam (seed body_temp) + (2) 2b discrimination. AWAITING the gate's ruling: (a) fix the #120 emission seam here (unblocks the magnitude-proxy threat experiment), (b) threat pole -> 2b follow-on arc and merge THIS arc on the matter proof + armed loop, or (c) other. CI GREEN on the arc (lint fix 48d2871: CI runs test-cfg with -D warnings which `clippy -p civsim-sim` without --tests misses; ALWAYS run `cargo clippy -p civsim-sim --all-targets` before pushing test changes). Threat-arena build lessons if resumed: predator strike works co-located; the blocker is emission (body_temp) + the magnitude-channel prey-mutual-perception confound. --- OLD (superseded): AWAIT the gate's audit of slices 3-4 + its ruling on the being-channel question (build the threat sibling experiment, or matter-channel proof suffices). All four slices on #144; 72adf87d the stated full --creatures re-pin. --- OLD (superseded): NOW BUILDING SLICE 4: the instrumented emergence proof (a stated non-shipped survival regime removing only the starvation confound + a HELD CONTROL where the gradient is absent/selection held and the weight stays at zero; distinguish the two-channel scavenge/threat net-disposition from the active-hunt magnitude-proxy, the 2b two-way-sort flagged). Grounding: read a walker's controller resource-density weight (layout `resource_feature_input_base`, MOVE output base); the reproduction beat concentrates weights via differential survival + the co-located beat. Slice-3 touch points: `scenario_resource_features` run_world.rs:176; `dawn_layout` non-living tail ~289; genesis ~1060; the builder controller.rs ~326. **OLD NEXT (superseded):** AWAIT the gate's ruling on the slice-3 approach (I flagged that arming the loop in `full --creatures` re-pins for the reason "loop armed", NOT a visible reaction, because founder-zero + starvation means the reaction cannot emerge in a shipped 20-gen pin; proposed slice 4 demonstrate emergence in a dedicated instrumented test with a control, OR hold arming until biosphere-balance lands). Grounding for slice 2: `TissueField` material.rs:1129 (cell_content ~1285); the perceive-pass union runner.rs:6309-6345; the union test helper `resource_feature_step_hash(content, bucket, via_tissue)` runner.rs:~13819.

SLICE 2 (`c416eaa`): `FunctionLawDef` carries `geometry_axes`/`material_axes` as DATA, the capability IMPACT kernel reads its axis ids off them (the delivery-path parallel). SLICE 3a (`745266c`): the pure `laws::elastic_recoil_energy` (the modulus of resilience `yield^2 / (2 E)` over the strained volume, gating on absent material). SLICE 3b (`616ef77`): `TransferKernel::ElasticRecoil` wired into `resolve_delivered_energy` as the run-all-gate-to-zero MAX over the shared-metabolic-source mechanical family {rigid `F d`, elastic recoil}, each self-gating on the segment's grown axes; the row gains `yield_axis`/`elastic_modulus_axis` as data; the strained volume the SWEPT `cross_section * stroke` (a PROXY, dedicated `mech.elastic_element_volume` axis flagged reserved-refinement). SLICE 3c (`50b288a`): the capability IMPACT grade reads the SAME MAX (grade and delivery in lockstep, the gate's ruling iv). THE GATE RULED all four slice-3 asks CONFIRMED (2026-07-10 comment): MAX over SUM (shared metabolic source, a spring's stored recoil energy IS the loading work); the INDEPENDENT-RESERVE additive case FLAGGED not folded (compile-enforced by the exhaustive `Kinetic | ElasticRecoil` match); the swept-volume PROXY limit ON RECORD; the grade/delivery lockstep. Byte-neutrality (COMPLETE reason; the section-9 confirmation-bias lens caught that my first two justifications each named a secondary cause and missed the primary, verified at source): delivery off all four pins by construction (strike opt-in); on the grade path, PRIMARILY, no pinned affordance registry (`dev_default`/`dev_geophage`) arms an IMPACT-gated affordance (POUND `requires ID_IMPACT` lives only in `dev_striker`, never installed by run_world), so `tool_capability(..., ID_IMPACT)` is never invoked and the IMPACT grade never runs on any pinned scenario. Defense in depth: `tool_capability`'s `geo` exposes `mech.contact_area`/`mech.mass` but never the cross_section/stroke IMPACT reads, so IMPACT-via-tool is pre-existingly zero (both terms) regardless of iron's `mat.elastic_modulus`; the grown-segment path grows no `mat.elastic_modulus` and `grow()` runs on no pinned scenario; `part_capability` scores only PIERCE/LOCOMOTE/REFRACT. The gate's LOCKSTEP (iv) holds at the SEGMENT level (a being's own actuator, `segment_capabilities` and `strike_*` read the same segment axes and MAX); the `tool_capability(ID_IMPACT)` path is pre-existingly zero (a step-1 seam, flagged not fixed). Adversarial mutation-verified springy-actuator probes on BOTH paths. FLAGGED section-9 follow-ons (verified): (1) `ENERGY_GUARD = 1e9` hardcoded where the file DERIVES pressure/depth caps (pre-existing, extended here); (2) grade path binds axes POSITIONALLY vs delivery NAMED, so a purely-springy alien omitting the absent strength slot is positionally mis-read (this slice extends it to 3 positional material axes, sharpening the gate-deferred named-vs-positional unification); (3) an independently-charged elastic actuator (turgor/photosynthesis spring) is under-counted by the shared-source MAX (independent-reserve flag reframed by source-independence, not channel type). SECTION-9 six-lens panel COMPLETE (15 clean-notes, 6 low-severity confirmed findings, every one verified against source and hardened; steering/terran/correctness clean). Findings converged on two seams, both hardened byte-neutrally (four pins re-confirmed): (a) the byte-neutrality reason corrected to lead with the primary cause (the IMPACT grade is never consumed on any pinned scenario, no IMPACT-gated affordance armed) plus a PRE-EXISTING step-1 regression flagged (tool IMPACT grade reads zero, POUND unsatisfiable via a tool, dead `mech.mass` read, stale POUND doc corrected); (b) the grade path's positional binding vs the delivery path's named fields, hardened with a positional-contract doc caveat and a new test pinning the grade-to-delivery axis-role agreement. Section-9 result POSTED to the gate (comment 4940069815) with two rulings requested: (1) the POUND/tool-IMPACT design fix (gate a tool's percussion on the wielder's `F d` concentrated over the tool, not the tool's absent actuator), fix now or follow-on; (2) named-vs-positional unification, hold to your deferral (test-pinned) or pull forward before merge. Both rulings RECEIVED and slice 3 SIGNED OFF (gate re-confirmed the four pins + CI, 2026-07-10): the POUND/tool-IMPACT fix is a DISTINCT tool-delivery arc follow-on (percussion gates on the WIELDER's delivered energy concentrated over the tool, `mech.mass` a live read there), NOT step 2; the named-vs-positional unification is the PRIORITY follow-on right after step 2 (all six grade bindings to named fields, caveat + drift-test holding). **SLICE 4 BUILT, byte-neutral, PUSHED (`26d7979`): the hydraulic kernel COMPOSES from the existing laws with NO new law** (the gate's build-or-prove resolved to a composition proof: incompressible `integral P dV = P (A d) = F d`, so `TransferKernel::Hydraulic` = `actuator_work(stress_force(fluid.driving_pressure, cross_section), stroke)`, the same two laws the rigid kernel uses keyed on the fluid driving pressure). `resolve_delivered_energy` is the MAX over {rigid, elastic, hydraulic}; the IMPACT grade the same three-way MAX; the row gains `pressure_axis`; the lockstep test pins the fourth axis. The COMPRESSIBLE gas-expansion case is the flagged future kernel; the piston-area proxy has `fluid.channel_radius` flagged as the refinement. Four pins hold; full sim/physics/compose suites green. SLICE 4 SECTION-9 six-lens COMPLETE and hardened (17 clean-notes, 8 low-severity findings, all verified against source and hardened byte-neutrally; four pins hold): the independent-source enforcement OVER-CLAIM corrected (energy-SOURCE independence is orthogonal to the kernel variant, so a source-independent REUSE of Hydraulic/ElasticRecoil, e.g. an osmotic/turgor hydrostat, is silently MAX-folded and NOT caught by the exhaustive match; the real future fix is a source-independence DATUM plus its additive combine; the osmotic hydraulic case now named); the dual-meaning `fluid.driving_pressure` assumptions flagged (F=P A under the delta-P reading, no `fluid.bulk_modulus` gate so a compressible fluid must not bind to Hydraulic); the probes made IN-RANGE (<=100 MPa) and a FIRST-PRINCIPLES P dV assert added (non-tautological); the piston-area-proxy and positional-4-axis seams confirmed, already flagged. REPORTED to the gate (comment 4940401596). **NEXT: HOLD for the gate's merge of #124** (its own pin + CI confirm). STEP 2 COMPLETE: the three shared-source mechanical kernels (Kinetic rigid `F d`, ElasticRecoil, Hydraulic `P dV`) resolve as one run-all-gate-to-zero MAX, each keyed on the being's own continuous grown axes, never a categorical selector. AFTER MERGE, gate-ruled priority follow-ons: (1) the named-vs-positional binding unification (all six grade kernels to named fields, so the lockstep is mechanically enforced not test-pinned); (2) the tool-delivery arc (POUND on the wielder's delivered energy concentrated over the tool, `mech.mass` a live read there). Plus the resistance-kernel registry, the source-independence datum, the compressible/pneumatic kernel, and the deep-`Body` `body.rs:1108` swing-velocity sibling seam. Merge note: `origin/main` at `ff80c25` (#125); non-destructive merge + pin re-confirm when the gate is ready. DEFERRED (gate-ruled): the capability named-vs-positional axis-binding unification (fold into lifting the other 5 kernels, not before merge); the `mech.elastic_element_volume` axis refinement; the deep-`Body` wound path `body.rs:1108` swing velocity (sibling seam). MERGE FLAG: `origin/main` advanced past this branch's base; a non-destructive merge of current main + pin re-confirm is the merge-time step to sequence with the gate. --- PRIOR (step 1/1b, MERGED): branch `claude/stroke-rate-substrate` restarted off merged `main`. **STEP 1 MERGED to main (PR #119, merge `80e5ec1`)** and live (`laws::actuator_work` + `laws::stress_force`, both strike paths + `capability::impact` on `F d`, `swing_velocity` retired). **STEP 1b BUILT, byte-neutral, section-9-hardened, PUSHED to #123 (`8a8006a`), awaiting the gate's review.** Grows `mech.cross_section_area` + `mech.stroke_length` per-segment (`MorphogenProgram::actuator_axes`) so GROWN bodies deliver a non-zero `F d` blow. The two axes are appended as a param category AFTER the composition block (at the very end of the layout), so no existing geometry/material/branch/spawn/composition index moves. Four pins hold bit-identical (`4bbf6b59`/`1db633b3`/`c9d5cc17`/`ad69f2bf`); full sim/physics/compose suites green. CORRECTION to the kickoff assumption: the `param_count()-2/-1` reserve convention did NOT "stay last", it BROKE, because THREE founder-seeding fixtures (`aging_race`, `fully_grown_race`, the `aging_demo` example) reached the composition energy/water/physiology axes by `param_count()-N`, which the appended actuator block shifted onto the actuator params; grown founders then seeded ZERO energy/water and starved at birth (aging first-passage test saw only metabolic deaths `[(0,8)]`). Drift-proof fix: `composition_param` made `pub`, every fixture routed through it (the hand-rolled offset was the drift, not the mechanism). SECTION-9 (two passes) converged on two minors, both hardened: the `dev_default` range basis reworded to the honest sub-range statement; and the grown actuator axes' zero asserting-coverage closed with a functional IMPACT-payoff test (grown body reads a positive `F d`, empty-actuator alien reads zero) plus a mutation-verified param-layout partition/bijection test. MERGE FLAG: this branch forked from step-1 baseline `6878aaa`; `origin/main` advanced to `959598a` (#121 R-SOURCE-VECTOR lift); byte-neutrality is proven vs the step-1 baseline, and a non-destructive merge of current main + pin re-confirm is the merge-time step to sequence with the gate. STEP 2 (per-segment actuation-kind axis + kernel dispatch for non-rigid whip/jet/hydrostat) still staged; deep-`Body` wound path `body.rs:1108` still authors a swing velocity (sibling seam). --- Step 1 detail (for reference, now merged): FRAME-BLIND DONE and gate-approved: the section-11 smoke (10 iters) then the section-10 blind panel (unanimous significant-flaw-fixable, verified at source) killed the posted `v = sqrt(2 F L / m)` form as an IDENTITY (fed to `1/2 m v^2` the mass cancels to `F L`, and that reduction hides an authored acting-distance-to-length ratio of one, a per-body geometry value outside the floor), and surfaced a second alien breach (the rigid-lever kernel bakes a body plan). The gate approved the direct WORK form and ruled all asks: (a) delivered = actuator work `F d`; (b) both new axes as the arc scope, staged; (c) DROP the free tool-mass term (physically unfounded under fixed actuator work), the founded tool-geometry payoff a flagged additive follow-on (b); (d) rebase onto current `origin/main` and re-pin. Plus an owner ruling: `d` and `F` must be READS over the acting SYSTEM so the tool-geometry payoff drops in additively, never a rewrite. **STEP 1 (this branch, byte-neutral, four pins hold `4bbf6b59`/`1db633b3`/`c9d5cc17`/`ad69f2bf`):** `laws::actuator_work(force, distance, cap)` (`F d`, efficiency one an explicit floor idealization); `contact_transfer.rs` kinetic kernel now the actuator work, its row carrying `strength_axis`/`cross_section_axis`/`stroke_axis` as data (retiring `source_axis`/mass); `runner.rs` both `strike_occupant` and `strike_underfoot` read the acting Segment's `F d` through ONE `Embodiment::acting_force_and_stroke` seam (the additive tool-geometry hook documented there); `capability::impact` grades by `F d` not mass; `StrikeParams::swing_velocity` and `CapabilityRefs::reference_swing_velocity` RETIRED; `mech.stroke_length` floor axis declared (end of `mechanical_floor.toml`, doc-registered). BYTE-NEUTRALITY PROVEN EMPIRICALLY (the authoritative proof): the four run_world pins ran BIT-IDENTICAL to baseline with the `F d` law and floor axis in place. run_world never arms strike (`strike_occupant`/`strike_underfoot` inert), and `impact()` reads `mech.cross_section_area`/`mech.stroke_length` which grown bodies do NOT yet carry (so it reads zero on the pinned path). NOTE (a section-9 catch, corrected): the earlier `reference_swing_velocity` perturbation did NOT probe the new `impact()` and is NOT the proof; the empirical pin-hold is. STEP-1b COUPLING to weigh: growing `mech.cross_section_area` AND `mech.stroke_length` would flip `impact()` nonzero on grown bodies, which MIGHT move the pins (UNTESTED; whether IMPACT capability feeds the pinned hash is open), so step-1b's byte-neutrality for the capability path is an open verification, never assumed. SECTION-9 AUDIT ran (6 lenses + adversarial verify) and I HARDENED every real finding: a MAJOR scale bug (the `F d` force `strength[MPa] * area` MISSED the megapascal-to-newton `C_PA` bridge, so delivered energy was 1e6x under-scaled vs the joule Griffith resistance; masked today by the F d=0 grown bodies but would break step-1b) fixed with a new `laws::stress_force` (the MPa->N bridge) both callers now use, test values rescaled (a 1e-6 m^2 cross-section keeps a 200 MPa blow a 200 N / 200 J force); the `impact()` overflow-returns-ONE corner (fixed so the stroke guard stays live); the stale strike/capability doc comments and the `geometry_axes`/`material_axes` contract methods (corrected). Also fixed the same args-parse bug in `lens-audit.js` (committed on this branch). Tests updated + green: the mining test reframed (a strong-actuator miner shatters where a weak one cannot, tool mass no longer matters), the strike_occupant striker given actuator axes, the impact test strength-driven, the contact_transfer tests actuator-work, four physics axis-count assertions bumped 38->39 mech. **STEP 1b STAGED and REPORTED (the disproportionate piece, gate ruling-b latitude):** growing `mech.stroke_length` PLUS `mech.cross_section_area` in the body-development program (so GROWN bodies deliver a non-zero blow) hit the `MorphogenProgram` rigid positional param layout (any inserted grown axis shifts the index-based growth tests, the composition-grown values, or the energy/water reserve convention read as `param_count()-2/-1`); a contained body-development increment. Until it lands, GROWN predators deliver `F d = 0` (strike inert for grown bodies; the LAW is correct and tested with directly-set actuator axes). **STEP 2 STAGED:** the per-segment actuation-kind axis plus kernel dispatch (non-rigid whip/jet/hydrostat as a data row). **NEXT:** rebase branch onto current `origin/main` (`94a25c0`, pins unchanged), commit step 1, POST to the gate the step-1/1b split for its sequencing ruling (push the param-layout increment now, or the immediate follow-on commit), then run the section-9 five-lens over the diff. NOTE: I am on `claude/stroke-rate-substrate` per the gate's #119 workflow; this session's harness-designated branch is `claude/mirror-standup-handoff-kkhold` (a panel-template args-parse fix committed there, `f7ac823`), a conflict to resolve at merge time.

SECTION-9 caught and I FIXED two CONFIRMED defects (both source-verified and instrumented): (1) the non-metabolizing predator FROZE on tick 3 (the TEMPERATURE comfort reserve was set unconditionally from its drifting body_temp) - fixed by exempting a predator from the comfort-band set (it maintains its own temperature, `runner.rs` TEMPERATURE loop, `is_predator` guard); (2) the shipped `full --creatures` landed ZERO wounds (the predator was placed at the empty world centre) - fixed by placing it on the first living creature's cell (`Runner::first_creature_coord`), an environmental-given co-location. MERGE of current `main` (`488518b`, carrying #121 R-SOURCE-VECTOR, #122 the category field + completeness CI gate, #123 stroke-rate step-1b): TWO conflicts resolved. `runner.rs` strike_occupant: main's stroke-rate step-1b replaced the swing-velocity delivered-energy with the per-segment actuator work `F d` (`acting_force_and_stroke` reading `mat.fracture_strength`/`mech.cross_section_area`/`mech.stroke_length`) and dropped `acting_mass`/`acting_contact_area`; I reconciled to KEEP main's actuator model AND capture `acting_contact_area` (now traveling with the max-WORK segment, consistent with main's model) which the coarse branch needs. Consequence: the predator's delivery Segment (`spawn_predator`) and the integration test's striker now carry the three actuator axes (grounded off the `morphogen.rs` dev-fixture ranges: `mat.fracture_strength` 150 MPa, `mech.cross_section_area` 0.001, `mech.stroke_length` 0.3) so the actuator work is non-zero; without them the merge would have zeroed the wound. The INTEGRITY axis literal + three test axis literals gained R-SOURCE-VECTOR's new `draw_set: Vec::new()` field. `OWNER_DECISIONS_LOG.md`: both sides kept (my three predation entries + Agent C's R14). BORN-CATEGORIZED per the gate: added `body.covering_fracture_energy` to `calibration/reserved.toml` with `category = "per_world"` (a per-substance datum, three-way-test category 2; the completeness gate `the_real_manifest_is_fully_born_categorized` passes). VERIFIED: the four canonical pins hold BYTE-EXACT after the merge (default `4bbf6b59`, full `1db633b3`, discovery `c9d5cc17`, viability `ad69f2bf`); the `full --creatures` re-pin is `b9b80cef` (stable across the swing->actuator model change, because the lethal wound saturates whole_body_damage to 1 identically under both; the actuator model is LIVE, instrumented `delivered=45000 J` = 150 MPa x 0.001 x 0.3). Instrumented `full --creatures` confirms the predator PERSISTS 50+ ticks and lands a LETHAL whole-body wound on a co-located catalog prey (INTEGRITY floors, the prey culled) - PREDATION IS OBSERVABLE. fmt clean, clippy clean, the predation integration test passes, calibration gate green. HONEST LIMIT: one kill fires then the co-located prey is dead and the stationary predator has no new co-located target; sustained predation awaits BOTH the creature-selection substrate (next arc, step 2) AND the GATED biosphere-balance (creatures starve in a few ticks). The one-shot lethality follows from the sharp-tooth CONTACT GEOMETRY (tiny contact area concentrates even a modest blow past the covering's Griffith tolerance), a reserved calibration lever, not a bug. NEXT: full lib suite confirm (running), commit the merge, push `claude/creature-selection`, POST the section-9 result + the re-pin to the gate. THEN the gate calls my independent census blind-bias-check (owner directive, I did not author the census). The flagged follow-ons: grow creature run-path Structures so wounds land per-Segment (supersedes the coarse branch); the layered-penetration cascade; the coarse-STRIKER case; the #117 fine-path target-area-contact seam (its own audit).

Pieces: (1) `contact_transfer.rs`, the contact-energy-transfer registry (kinetic kernel dispatched by a data-row id, a non-kinetic attack a data row); (2) `contact_wound.rs`, the geometry-derived contact area plus `wound_fraction` (mode a DESCRIPTION of geometry, never a passed CUT/PIERCE/BLUNT selector); (3a) the STRIKE controller-consumption routing (STRIKE an actable matter primitive in the three decision gates, afforded only by a PIERCE-bearing body so no run_world scenario decides it); (3b) `Embodiment::strike_occupant`, the strike primitive (delivered energy over the acting part's own mass read off the channel row's `source_axis`, the target's LARGEST-PRESENTED Segment as the gate-ruled derive-first proxy that reads geometry not `failure_tolerance` so armor emerges, the wound against that Segment's own `mat.fracture_energy`); (4) the `Segment.damage` WRITE in Agent B's exact `accrue_aging` convention (the wound fraction of the struck Segment's own `failure_tolerance = fracture_energy * mech.contact_area`, saturating_add then clamp, NO `* 1000`, one currency for wounds and aging, so `whole_body_viability_aged` -> the INTEGRITY axis -> the one unified cull). SECTION-9 AUDIT ran over pieces 1-3b (6 lenses plus adversarial verify, every finding source-verified): FIXED a dead `source_axis` (now data-driven) plus a prose nit; FLAGGED three forward-looking follow-ons. The strongest, the swing-velocity derive-vs-author seam (a world-global scalar while mass and area emerge per-being), the gate RULED ships on the inherited interim, and it opened a STROKE-RATE / LIMB-BIOMECHANICS substrate arc plus a RESISTANCE-KERNEL registry arc (both flagged on the roadmap, candidates for a downtime agent). I MERGED main in (not rebased) because the nine commits each touch shared docs plus `runner.rs`; `runner.rs` auto-merged (disjoint from C's `Field` edits), only the roadmap conflicted (resolved to the gate's restructured board). Never rewrite past entries; append. Full detail for earlier sessions lives in the session transcripts.

## 2026-07-12 (Agent A): Genesis Layer 0 COMPLETE + Stage 1 flux derived (the solar constant retired), continuous build

**What was done (a marathon build segment, gate driving continuously, gating each push).** Built and pushed the whole genesis-forward Layer 0 (A lane) and Stage 1's flux derivation on `claude/genesis-forward-scoping`, each slice byte-neutral-or-stated with full verification (tests + clippy strict + fmt + constructor gate + 5 pins) and a per-slice gate report on #160.

- **Slice 1 (`5a63bcd`, byte-neutral):** periodic-table `[[element]]` rows extended with cited `valence` + `standard_molar_entropy` columns (fail-loud on a missing citation; element-vs-phase split: per-element S, formation energy per-phase). Seed = bulk-silicate-Earth + volatiles, CRC-cited.
- **Slice 2 (`6a318b9`, byte-neutral):** NEW `crate::physics::petrology_data` + `phase_registry.toml`, the candidate-phase thermodynamic registry (per-phase enthalpy/entropy/volume, Robie & Hemingway 1995, one consistent dataset for the Gibbs-min kernel), formula-cross-checked against the periodic table. Extensible, not a closed enum.
- **Slice 3 (`5b314db`, byte-neutral):** `world.surface_pressure` per-world reserved-with-basis datum (the Terran-bias solvent-phase gate). Verified at source that no live read assumes 1 atm.
- **Milestone section-9 five-lens self-audit** posted and gate-CONFIRMED clean.
- **Stage 1 flux 4a (`126db72`, byte-neutral) + 4b (`7d113d6`, stated re-pin):** `crate::sim::astro` derives the solar constant, retiring the inline `DiurnalSky` `solar_constant = 1361` literal: `flux = L_sun*(M_star/M_sun)^exp / (4*pi*d^2)` in exact `BigRat` rational arithmetic (L_sun/d^2 overflow Q32.32, the sigma-scale path) with Machin pi.

**The p_ref seam (PD1/PD5, caught both ways):** the verifier and then the gate called the RK `P_ref=1atm` a defect to retire; I grounded `laws.rs:1600` and walked it back (it is the boiling-point reference-pressure anchor, correct physics); the gate re-checked and confirmed. Not retired.

**The owner's admit-the-alien correction (applied mid-Stage-1):** every authored value must be derived or scenario-time set, not hardcoded. My 4a had hardcoded Mirror's inputs in the kernel; fixed so `astro::stellar_flux(mass_ratio, exponent, distance_au)` takes all per-world inputs as ARGS, the Mirror values (1, 1 AU, 3.5) are labelled scenario dev fixtures in `DiurnalSky::reference`, and the anchors (L_sun/M_sun/AU) are the only cited reference data. An alien star is a data row.

**The one stated re-pin:** living `7b5b6446` -> `1c260db2` (derived Mirror TSI ~1361.17 vs the old rounded integer 1361, +0.012%, L at M_sun = L_sun exactly); the other four pins byte-identical (`40fe8a72`/`d05a6488`/`9a28f113`/`967b22bd`). 914 sim tests pass. Never tuned to reproduce 1361.

**CI discipline:** two mechanical CI failures early (fmt on slice 1; constructor-gate loader exemption + a stray adverb on slice 2), both fixed; `cargo fmt --check` + the constructor gate + a prose scan are now in my pre-push routine.

**Where it stopped.** Layer 0 + Stage 1 flux complete, all pushed and reported on #160 (comments through 4950368242), the CONSENSUS_ROADMAP board item added in place. Branch tip `7d113d6`. G is already on main (C's #161, `850efcd`, 6.67430e-11); the gate holds the Layer-0 merge until the layer closes and double-checks the accumulated diff.

**Where it goes next (task #63).** Stage 2, the orbit and cycles: rebase on `850efcd` (G present) first, then add the per-world eccentricity datum + the Kepler orbital-distance term in `insolation_at` (today a fixed luminosity, no d(phase)), axial+apsidal precession, the Milankovitch deep-time envelope, wire the `DiurnalSky` periods from the world's own orbit (retire the demo literal run_world.rs:2576), and consolidate the celestial substrate into a numbered design Part. Diurnal + seasonal already built (#112). Stage 3 (geodynamics) and Stage 4 (atmosphere) follow; B (internal-heat axis + memory primitives) and C (determinism primitives + provenance-DAG) run their Layer-0 lanes in parallel, the gate sequencing the `laws.rs` merges (B's law-forms then C's kernels).

## 2026-07-12 (Agent A): Genesis plan GATED, Layer 0 building; the p_ref boiling-point-anchor seam caught both ways

**What was done.** The gate GATED the genesis-forward plan (#160) and carved the Layer 0 lanes. All four of my catches approved: the build-order inversion (Sun->orbit->geodynamics), the stage-0.5 planet-formation interim, the Ra_c reclassification, and Layer 0 as the first build. Then I ran an adversarial source-verification of the plan's ~20 built/gap/reserved claims (workflow `wobkmiujh`, 6 verifiers charged to refute, 0 errors): 18 of 20 confirmed at source, 2 refined (folded into the plan doc). Posted the Layer 0 file-structure layout with the disjoint-file boundaries confirmed.

**The p_ref seam (PD1/PD5, caught on BOTH sides).** The verifier flagged `P_ref = 0.101325 MPa` in `laws.rs` as a hardcoded surface-pressure defect to retire, and I relayed that to the gate; the gate endorsed "retire P_ref." Before writing a line I grounded the site (`rankine_kirchhoff_constants`, `laws.rs:1600`) and found P_ref is the matched reference-pressure PARAMETER that IS the definition of the boiling point (a substance's normal boiling point is measured at 1 atm; anchoring `(T_b, 1 atm)` is correct physics, per-substance reference data). Retiring it would break the saturation anchor. I walked back my own claim to the gate with the source; the gate grounded it itself and confirmed, owning its lapse. Rule from it: a value-line retire gets its site grounded before relaying to anyone. The corrected slice: add the WORLD surface-pressure datum (the genuine absent gap), reconcile the phase gate with the existing `climate.mean_surface_temperature`, VERIFY the `fluid.driving_pressure` default at source (file:line to the gate) before retiring anything.

**The carve (disjoint by lane).** A (me): periodic-table/phase-thermo reference tier + world surface-pressure datum + Stage 1 flux (retiring the 1361 literal, kernel in `environ.rs`) + Layer-0 coordination (G add to `fundamentals.rs`). B: internal-heat W/kg axis + memory primitives. C: determinism primitives + provenance-DAG accounting. `laws.rs` is B+C only (sequence B's memory law-forms then C's kernels); floor `.toml` disjoint by table kind (`[[axis]]` vs `[[substance]]` vs `[[element]]`) and by file (my phase-thermo tier is a new `phase_registry.toml`); `calibration/reserved.toml` additive by id. The gate relays the boundaries to B and C.

**Design refinement surfaced for slice 1 (element-vs-phase thermochemistry).** A pure element's Gibbs formation energy is 0 by definition, so per-element data is valence + standard molar entropy S° (+ Cp); the Gibbs formation energies ΔfG° live per-PHASE in `phase_registry.toml`, not per element. The plan's "Gibbs formation per element" was imprecise; the schema is sharper for it.

**Slice order (byte-neutral-or-stated).** (1) periodic-table element columns (valence + S°, cited seed, byte-neutral); (2) `phase_registry.toml` + `petrology_data.rs` (byte-neutral); (3) world surface-pressure datum + phase-gate read (verify driving_pressure default first); (4) Stage 1 flux derivation (the ONE stated re-pin: the living scenario, the only sky-arming one, re-pins from the 1361 anchor to the derived ~1361.3 W/m^2; the other four byte-identical; measured, never tuned). G add lands when the owner/gate sends the cited CODATA value (owner said "sending G soon"). Section-9 once by me at the Layer 0 milestone; the gate double-checks.

**Where it stopped.** Design-first phase complete and gated; layout posted (comment 4950197070); the build is teed up. Branch `claude/genesis-forward-scoping` tip `4f6314e`. Tasks #59-#62 are the four Layer 0 A-lane slices.

**Where it goes next.** Build slice 1 (periodic-table element columns: schema + reader + cited seed + tests, byte-neutral). Ground `periodic.rs` (the `[[element]]` parse + the molar_mass Fixed-scale idiom) for the S°/valence column scales before populating cited values (never fabricate; reserved until cited). Watch: G arriving from the owner/gate; B's and C's Layer 0 PRs opening (the gate sequences the `laws.rs` merges).

## 2026-07-12 (Agent A): Genesis-forward staged plan of attack posted to #160 for the gate's derive-first gate

**What was done.** Synthesized the genesis-forward staged plan of attack from the gate-directed five-reader scoping fan-out (Sun, geodynamics, orbit, atmosphere, physics-floor cross-cut; 0 errors, 0 empty, run `wf_94fc7d0f-cf5`). Wrote it to `docs/working/GENESIS_FORWARD_PLAN_OF_ATTACK.md` (commit `ab22e55` on `claude/genesis-forward-scoping`), and posted the summary to #160 (comment 4950131785) for the derive-first gate. No code: the plan is a gated deliverable, no line built until the gate gates it.

**The two structural seams caught against my own kickoff (the highest-value gate calls).** (1) The build order is Sun then orbit then geodynamics, NOT Sun then geodynamics then orbit: geodynamics is a pure function of (composition, P, T) and reads the orbit's insolation for its P,T field, so it sits causally above the orbit, not before it (same class as the soil-bootstrap error). (2) A planet-formation stage sits between the Sun and the geology that the kickoff's five omit: geodynamics and atmosphere both need bulk composition, the initial heat budget, and mass-and-radius for g and the primary-vs-secondary-atmosphere gate (the tree has no mass-gate and ASSUMES a secondary atmosphere). Resolution: carry those as reserved-with-basis per-world leaves now, flag the derivation as stage-0.5.

**Four load-bearing claims verified against source before trusting the readers (PD1).** G is absent from the closed FUNDAMENTALS table (`fundamentals.rs:53-98`), so stage 1's flux derives without it but stage 2's Kepler needs it (G added in Layer 0). sigma and R are DERIVED composites, not authored floor constants (`fundamentals.rs:145,159`), so the critical Rayleigh number's "sibling to sigma and R" wording is reclassified derivable (PD2 input-audit catch). solar_constant is the inline `Fixed::from_int(1361)` at `environ.rs:2461` (the Principle 11 defect, stage 1's charge). Fixed::powf exists (`fixed.rs:527`), so the geology packet's "fractional-power primitive not yet built" is stale (the residual is cross-vendor transcendentals).

**Layer 0 (the shared floor) is the first build**: three new authoring places (periodic-table + phase-thermo reference tier, internal-heat-production axis W/kg, surface-P/T datum), G added, the determinism primitives (connected-components, priority-flood, fixed-cap iterative solve), the memory primitives (world clock, per-parcel age stamp, accumulator, irreversible latch; the floor is memoryless today, only faraday_emf/inductive_emf carry a one-step prior), and the provenance-DAG accounting. Then Stage 1's flux slice on top.

**Where it stopped.** Plan posted, awaiting the gate's derive-first ruling (the two seams, the Ra_c reclassification, the Class-C forks: full-Gibbs-vs-reduced-normative petrology, petrology-now-vs-registry-now, declared-solvent generalization, first-class impact cratering). Cost directive resumes for the build. Bridge #160 holds the channel.

**Watch (Agent A).** #157 (the energy-integrity diagnostic, food-present finding signed off) merges when the gate wraps it. B's #42 (the forage-ingest resource-backing fix, unblocked by my gather=0 finding) and the #156 follow-ons proceed on B's thread.
