## 2026-07-10 (Agent B, cont.): CREATURE-SELECTION frame-blind COMPLETE, panel dissolved the peer choice, gate ruled the three-step order (#120)

Branch `claude/creature-selection`, PR **#120**, off `main` at `feb3a13` (the doc-only bridge opener). Ran the full blind discipline on the creature reproduction/behaviour-selection framing before any code. The section-11 input-bias smoke test (strongest-model, fail-closed) BLOCKED twice and CLEARED on V3: V1 blocked for a leading frame, an omitted selectability falsifier, no-initial-variance, a pre-excusing softener, and a FALSE FORECLOSURE of the pool-frequency route; V2 blocked for a re-supplied answer-key checklist and route asymmetry (probing only route ii's breeding rule); V3 stripped the checklist, removed all route-specific probes (one general authoring probe covers both peers), and softened the presupposing "set by survival" to "no longer fixed at spawn". The section-10 blind panel then returned 5 valid of 6 (Fable errored on its safeguard, non-substantive), 5/5 `significant-flaw-fixable`, UNANIMOUS.

**The panel dissolved the "route (i) vs (ii) as peers" framing, and I verified every decisive claim against source (Prime Directive 1):** (A) the signed direction weight is a SOCIAL, outward locus, and route (i) is structurally blind to it, because every offline scorer (`episode_survival_dir`, `full_episode_survival_dir`, `two_reserve_episode_survival_dir`, `evolve.rs`) runs a SINGLE walker alone (`vec![walker]`, no second agent) so the outward behaviour is never expressed or scored; route (i) stays right for solo-expressed loci (forage, metabolism). (B) the coupling that would make the weight selectable in the live run is the predation path (#117 strike->wound->integrity->the one unified cull), a CAPACITY present but which `no run_world scenario reaches` yet (`runner.rs:6075-6083`), so the payoff channel is UNMET even in shipped `full --creatures`; until it is live NEITHER route selects the sign, it drifts. (C) shared alien limit, not a differentiator: both routes read fitness/eligibility through fixed Terran reserve axes (WATER/ENERGY backed by `bio.water_fraction`/`bio.energy_density`, `evolve.rs:504-512, 582-602`), a documented honest limit. (D) an in-run driver must close two authorings (own-reserve/phenotype eligibility never genotype-reading mate choice; a pairing primitive named as spatial/temporal co-presence never a rank/trait/type match), plus the all-zero-locus variance point.

**The resolved framing (my synthesis, posted to the gate on #120 for its ruling):** the arc is a precondition-first order, (1) wire the being-directed behaviour's own-survival consequence in the shipped scenario (predation for creatures), (2) in-run reproduction/selection for the social loci with the two authorings closed, route (i)'s pool selection retained for the solo-expressed loci, (3) flag the shared Terran-reserve-axis limit as a named sibling. Recorded in `OWNER_DECISIONS_LOG.md` (top of Open). **GATE RULED (on #120): the three-step order STANDS; step 1 (arm predation for creatures in `full --creatures` through the EXISTING strike/intake paths, no new authored consequence) is IN-SCOPE as this arc's first slice and is where the one re-pin lands, with a STOP+report escape if arming balloons into a full predator-integration piece; step 2 (in-run reproduction/selection route-ii shape for social loci, route-i pool selection kept for solo loci, the two authorings closed) and step 3 (flag the Terran-reserve-axis limit as a named sibling) ruled in.** MERGED main into #120 (`99c87f6`, byte-neutral, four pins hold, pushed), then SCOPED step 1 against source (a read-only path map + my own verification of the three decisive claims). **STEP 1 HITS THE GATE'S STOP+REPORT ESCAPE (posted to #120):** the "existing strike and intake paths" are NOT existing-and-armed. (1) STRIKE is a fully-unarmed capacity (`self.strike` None, empty `contact_transfer`, STRIKE absent from `full`'s `dev_geophage` registry, weaponless bodies), needing four arming pieces + a PIERCE predator body + a firing strike decision. (2) STRIKE never feeds the striker (`strike_occupant` only wounds, no `homeostasis.ingest`), so the hunt-side is new mechanism. (3) The one armed predation-like payoff (GEOPHAGE whole-body bite of `self.tissue`, corpse_matter armed in `full`, `runner.rs:2636-2757`) reads DEPOSITED/corpse tissue, and corpses do not emit a being-signal, so it does not couple the being-directed weight (which steers toward LIVE emitters). RECOMMENDED: make step 1 a PRECEDING predation-integration slice (the capstone integration the gate named): arm a scenario predator under `--creatures` (PIERCE body + strike stack) as an authored P9 environmental pressure, route its kill through the EXISTING corpse_matter deposit + GEOPHAGE intake so hunting pays via existing intake, prey flee/hunt sign stays founder-zero and emerges; `full --creatures` the one re-pin. FORK for the gate: (i) an authored-strike scenario predator (recommended) vs (ii) co-evolve predator+prey (needs the selection substrate first). GATE RULED (comment): STOP+report accepted, step 1 becomes the PRECEDING predation-integration slice, fork (i) authored predator RULED; build it (authored predator via strike stack + kill routed through existing corpse/GEOPHAGE, prey sign founder-zero), `full --creatures` the one re-pin, do NOT deliver emergent-hunt (follow-on). I grounded the build (Plan pass + my own source verification) and it surfaced a VERIFIED SEAM ONE LEVEL DOWN (posted #120 `4935672815`, no code yet): the predator cannot DECIDE to strike a co-located prey from the existing percept, because `creature_being_direction` skips a co-located emitter (`learn.rs:941`, reads ZERO at the strike cell), the being block is 4 DIRECTION slots with no proximity scalar (`controller.rs:540`), and `decide` is winner-take-all (`controller.rs:783`, so a constant STRIKE bias either always wins -> never moves, or never wins at contact; and strike-vs-geophage can't both fire in one tick). So a self-sustaining ROAMING hunter needs a NEW "prey-underfoot" scalar percept (emergence-critical, its own frame-blind). FORK posted for the gate: (A) a STATIONARY ambush always-strike authored predator (minimal, faithful, existing-mechanism-only, buildable now, delivers "flee-sign becomes selectable"; sustain deferred since always-strike can't also geophage) vs (B) build the proximity percept first (frame-blind) for the roaming self-sustaining predator. RECOMMENDED (A) now, (B) a follow-on. BYTE-NEUTRALITY (verified via the Plan pass + source): gating the STRIKE-bearing affordance on `cfg.creatures` in BOTH `dawn_layout` and `embodiment_genesis` re-pins ONLY `full --creatures` (STRIKE sorts after INGEST so MOVE=0/INGEST=3 and n_in unchanged; the four pins hold). **NO behaviour-changing code until the gate rules (A) vs (B).** #120 carries current main (`9316a97`); scaffold pieces (composed MOVE+INGEST+GEOPHAGE+STRIKE affordance fixture, PIERCE predator body, `spawn_predator`, tests) are common to both and buildable byte-neutral on the nod. The step-1 scope map is #120 comment `4935484740`; the seam+fork is `4935672815`.

## 2026-07-10 (Agent B, cont.): CREATURES-REACT arc opened, frame-blind DONE and it revised the premise (#118)

Branch `claude/creatures-react-percept` off current `main` (`b7f99eb`), PR **#118**, doc-only. The gate verified + declared #115 (composer leaf) merge-ready and assigned the next arc (creatures-react being-percept), with the BRIDGE RULE: open a new PR off main and run the frame-blind before any code; the gate merges #115 once #118 is open.

Grounded the mechanism source-true (a creature is a `Walker` with no `Mind`, dropped from the perceive loop only by `world.mind(w.id)?` at `runner.rs:5287`; the being-percept path keys on the belief store + the perceiver's own harm/reward outcomes + its own percept; `Mind` is heavy/monolithic, no lighter store exists; the creature's controller already has the being-input slots; creatures already emit). Ran the FULL frame-blind: the section-11 input-bias smoke test (Opus, fail-closed) BLOCKED five rounds, each on a real seam (R1 presupposed the belief mechanism and foreclosed a pure-selection peer; R2 a false binary, missing the plasticity mechanism, plus the foreclosed null, halos, a curated cost fact, the shared discretization; R3-R5 balanced the per-mechanism scrutiny to 1/1/1 + 2 shared), and CLEARED at V5. The section-10 blind panel (six across types/models, five returning, one refused on a Fable content-safeguard error) came back CONVERGENT.

RESOLVED FRAMING (verified against source, posted #118 `agent-b:creatures-react-framing`, logged R12): REJECT (i) transplant-the-founder-belief-path (installing a within-life belief store into a definitionally non-learning tier is a rewrite not data, admit-the-alien; and reading a committed labelled valence {harmful/benign/rewarding/neutral} to produce the movement is the template-case authoring pattern + a closed enum, P8). ADOPT (ii) as base: the raw perceived signal (channel + the creature's OWN discrimination bucket, no valence) into a controller direction slot through a heritable freely-signed weight, the toward/away coupling set by cross-generational SELECTION (the template-case cure, native to the creature's genome-expressed controller, alien-feasible). FOLD IN (iii): within-life plasticity as a heritable genome-expressed plasticity coefficient on the same weight, default zero (reduces to ii), its direction a freely-signed selected parameter, so whether/which-way a lineage learns is a selected trait (P9), no authored branch. The decisive shared site (the magnitude bucket) VERIFIED clean at source (`perception_percept.rs:70,89`: the bucket derives from the perceiver's own discrimination step, "never an authored taxonomy", not a global grid); build constraint: the creature carries its own transduction. FLAGGED (R13): the inherited founder-path committed-valence read (same pattern (i) is rejected for, for a separate audit, turns on whether "reserve fell -> harmful" is a floor primitive or a cultural outcome) and the `trophic_label` shortcut to avoid (`biosphere.rs:185`).

UPDATE (later 2026-07-10, cont.): the gate RULED the framing (adopt (ii)+folded-(iii), reject (i)), the build fork ((a) belief-free creature branch; B3 magnitude-graded first, B2 per-bucket follow-on, B1 rejected), and the transduction sourcing (declare per-species as data now, derive-from-anatomy the shared follow-on). BUILT + section-9-hardened + byte-neutral: the B3 SCAFFOLD (`learn::creature_being_direction`; section-9 caught a real distance double-count, fixed to magnitude-as-sole-distance-factor + a direction-preserving length-clamp; `79ac532`) and the BLOCK-FILL WIRE (flag OFF: `Embodiment.creature_being_percept` + `learn::perceive_being_magnitude` + the perceive-phase creature branch filling the being block's attraction pair; section-9 14 clean-notes + 4 test/doc nits fixed; `8680ad7`/`ca4530b`). MERGED current main in (`d5e251c`, now carries #115 hybrid key + #117 strike); all four pins HELD flag-off (default `4bbf6b59`, full `1db633b3`, discovery `c9d5cc17`, viability `ad69f2bf`); 28 learn tests, clippy clean. Posted #118 `agent-b:block-fill-wire`. LIVE WIRE DONE + gate-accepted (finding): arming `creature_being_percept` in run_world `full --creatures` (`42834a0`) is LIVE (all 131 creatures perceive + get a non-zero pull at tick 0, instrumented-verified) but BYTE-NEUTRAL at FOUNDER-ZERO (`full --creatures` unchanged `accc9fe6`, NO re-pin), because the creature reuses the already-widened block (no layout shift, unlike the keystone's layout-widening re-pin) and its being-weight is founder-zero (the sign emerges from selection, P9), so a real pull times zero weight is zero movement. The observable reaction awaits CREATURE SELECTION (the reproduction slice). (B) WATCHABLE DEMO built + CI test (`d885e75`): `examples/creatures_react_demo.rs` shows a hunter step toward (12->0) and a fleer away (12->26) with a test-only injected weight, both signs from one wire, deterministic; `controller.rs::a_being_attraction_weight_steers_...` pins it in CI. The creatures-react CAPACITY is COMPLETE + byte-neutral (four pins untouched, `full --creatures` unchanged); #118 ready for the gate's review/merge. NEXT ARC (queued, Agent B, the payoff): the CREATURE REPRODUCTION / BEHAVIOUR-SELECTION slice, which lifts the creature weights through selection so the reaction EMERGES + becomes observable + re-pins `full --creatures`; frame-blind it (emergence-critical) on its own PR off main. Then B2 (per-bucket discrimination) the fuller follow-on. Detail: `docs/working/CREATURES_REACT_ARC_PLAN.md`, decisions R12/R13.

## 2026-07-10 (Agent B, cont.): COMPOSER LEAF landed on option C, section-9 caught + fixed a real major defect (#115)

Branch `claude/affordance-composer`, PR **#115**, `aa09b6c`. The gate ruled the crate-boundary fork **(C)**, the opaque canonical representation (compose stays domain-agnostic; sim serializes its transduction into the leaf's canonical bytes). BUILT the byte-neutral tag-3 composer leaf: `crates/compose/src/node.rs` `NodeBody::Transduction { canonical: Vec<u8> }` (tag 3 in `compute_content_id`, tags 1/2 byte-identical, length-prefixed whole fold, never parsed); `crates/sim/src/affordance_percept.rs` `SingleAxisTransduction::canonical_bytes` (fixed field order, u64-length-prefixed strings, discriminants by explicit match not `#[repr]`, no map iteration) + `to_composition_node`. A sensed affordance and a designed object now share ONE composer library and ONE selection process; both flow through promote/fold/discovery.

**Section-9 (six blind lenses + adversarial verify) caught a real MAJOR defect, mine.** Two panelists converged (derive-vs-author CONFIRMED, confirmation-bias): the leaf's structural viability was `Interval::point(ZERO)` justified by a FALSE equivalence ("the same result a contentless leaf yields", but a contentless leaf yields `-1`, and `0` is the full-utilization collapse boundary). It was load-bearing: `promote()` rejects when `viability.lo < viability_floor` = `0 + owner safety margin` (reserved `compose.viability_threshold`, worksheet ~0.33), so any positive margin would have rejected EVERY discovered sensor, defeating "selected through discovery". FIXED to the DERIVED zero-load maximum: a sensor bears no structural load, so utilization is zero and `safety(0,.) = ONE`, the unconstrained maximum, so the structural gate never filters a sensor AS a structure. Two regression tests now push a transduction through `promote()` under a positive margin (the case never tested). Also from the audit: widened the string length prefix u32->u64 (kills the >4 GiB truncation caveat), covered the hybrid-key target/param field-width overflow branches (previously untested), softened docstrings so the Tier-C emergent bundling is the substrate not overclaimed as built.

Byte-neutral, measured AFTER the fix: nothing on the run path constructs a transduction node; all four pins HELD (default `4bbf6b59`, full `1db633b3`, discovery `c9d5cc17`, viability `ad69f2bf`). compose 32 tests, sim 826 lib tests, fmt+clippy clean. Posted the full result to the gate (#115 comment `agent-b:composer-leaf-landed`). **NEXT: await the gate's verify + merge of #115, then the queued creatures-react being-percept arc** (the gate scopes it). On merge, `main`'s `full` becomes `1db633b3` and Agent A rebases (A's strike is byte-neutral, afforded only by `dev_predator`). The multi-axis affordance COMPOSITION (bundling transduction leaves into a purpose-laden percept) is the Tier-C emergent follow-on through discovery. Subscribed to #115; a fallback check-in is armed.

## 2026-07-10 (Agent B, earlier): R-AGING (c) slice 3 STOP+state, two gate premises disproven against source; escalated, holding

Picked up to build slice 3 (the death-path switch, the one re-pin) per the gate's ruling. Before writing the Option-B unify I proved its two load-bearing premises, and BOTH fail against source. Escalated to the gate on PR #113 (`<!-- agent-b:slice3-stop -->`, comment 4932107972), exactly the gate's pre-authorized "STOP+state if a wound case cannot reproduce." Not building on either false premise; holding for the gate's re-scope ruling.

- **Blocker 1 (fixed-point, proven by throwaway test, since removed):** the Option-B energy reroute (`damage_energy += frac * tolerance`; integrity `= 1 - clamp(damage_energy / tolerance, 0, 1)`) is NOT bit-for-bit. In Q32.32 `checked_mul` floors (`(F*T)>>32`) and `checked_div` floors (`(D<<32)/T`), so `(frac*tol)/tol` floors to `frac - 1 ULP` on any remainder, amplified by a small tolerance. Swept the dev tissue tolerances against a frac range: 559 mismatches, worst 980 ULP. The cancellation holds in real arithmetic, never in fixed point.
- **Blocker 2 (structural, the larger one, verified against every caller):** `crate::body::Body`/`BodyPart`/`apply_insult`/`strike` are exercised ONLY by tests (body.rs `strike` at 1116, the `#[cfg(test)]` block at 1145+, and `tests/embodiment.rs`). `runner.rs`/`locomotion.rs` never construct, step, or wound a `Body`; the run path drives `Walker::body: BodyPlan` and `Walker::structure: Structure`, and homeostasis references `Body::integrity` only in doc comments. So rerouting `body.rs` is byte-neutral by construction and switches NO death path in the simulation. The "one re-pin" has no run-path accumulator home; slice 3 as scoped is test-only cleanup, not the death-path switch.
- **Recommended re-scope (two rulings asked of the gate):** (a) put the first-passage accumulator on the body the run path steps (the `BodyPlan` organs / `Walker`/`Structure` segments the embodiment tick drives at `runner.rs step_embodiment` / `locomotion.rs`), where per-tick load-grounded insult minus funded repair accrues and the run-path INTEGRITY/death reads first passage; (b) store the damage as a normalized FRACTION rather than the lossy energy reroute (a wound adds `frac` directly; aging normalizes its per-tick net energy delta by tolerance once). Proved the fraction store bit-for-bit vs the current `sub_floor` chain (throwaway test, 0 mismatches over over-kill/tiny-ULP/long sequences, since removed).
- **Ready to stage wherever the accumulator lands:** the three tissue fields (`wear_coefficient` + scale, `turnover_rate`), each a reserved-with-basis dev fixture; the scout's full slice-3 source map is in the task output. Held (clippy -D blocks unused fields, so they land with their consumer).

Slices 1 and 2 remain pushed and gate-signed. Tree clean at HEAD c34781e; the re-pin stays held pending Agent A's keystone regardless.

---

## 2026-07-10 (Agent B, cloud worker under the gate agent): R-AGING resolved as (c) first-passage, reframed and build-planned; composer/hash paused

Agent B operating as a cloud worker on the multi-agent flow (gate agent mediates/manages, Agent A on perception, Agent C on environ). Branch state: `claude/lifespan-from-anatomy` (#113) carries the (c) build plan; `claude/affordance-composer` (#115) carries the composer/hash opener, PAUSED.

**R-AGING RULED as option (c), and reframed twice through blind framing.** The owner rejected the allometric method (a) and my emergent-senescence (B1), and signed off **(c): operational lifespan is the first-passage time of a per-part cumulative DAMAGE accumulator against each part's own material tolerance**, an emergent OUTPUT of independently-grounded floor physics, never an authored size-to-duration law. The blind-framing discipline (section-11 smoke test, Opus max, fail-closed) ran ELEVEN rounds across the arcs this session and caught, before any code: (1) the naive (c) could reassemble the rate-of-living mass slope through the repair-funding channel; (2) the "mass-neutral budget" resolution (which the gate had CONFIRMED) rests on a ratio-versus-absolute-magnitude equivocation (Kleiber budget is absolute mass^(3/4), repair demand extensive mass^1, so repair-per-tissue carries mass^(-1/4)); and (3) the deepest, that engineering mass-neutrality was the WRONG GOAL: the owner's intent is the size-longevity slope as a pure emergent OUTPUT, and suppressing it is as much a P9 distortion as authoring it. Gate OWNED its confirmation error and RULED the reframed target: drop the mass-neutrality machinery; discipline is "no term justified SOLELY by the aging theory it encodes"; validate that no term authors the slope, never mass-neutral, never against a longevity curve.

**The (c) build plan landed** (`docs/working/LIFESPAN_C_FIRSTPASSAGE_BUILD.md`, commit `1c5e599`): a DATA-DEFINED insult registry (Archard `laws.rs:628`, thermal `:880`, toxin/`net_harm` `:161`, corrosion `:1422`, dissolution `:1464`, starvation; insults as rows, harden-to-registry pattern); a `PartCondition.damage_energy` accumulator in the common ENERGY currency; per-material `fracture_energy` tolerance (`body.rs:74`, already floor data) as the first-passage death threshold extending `BodyPart::destroyed()` (`body.rs:426`); a per-tissue tissue-turnover REPAIR rate (new `mat.*` axis, reserved-with-basis from real tissue-turnover data, THE GATING DEPENDENCY: stop-and-report if it reverts to an outcome-constant); an extensive-demand maintenance economy funding repair; the pool projection (R-TIER-CONSIST, must be shown to track the promoted sim). Five slices, inert/byte-neutral first, the death-path switch (slice 3) the one stated re-pin (timing coordinated through the gate). SLICE 1 DONE and PUSHED (`bcc62e9`, #113): `crates/sim/src/insult.rs` (the data-defined `InsultKind`/`InsultRegistry` + `derive_integrity` + `accumulate_damage`) and `crates/physics/src/laws.rs` `wear_energy` (the wear->energy commensuration as an exact identity from the cut model, no free weight); inert/byte-neutral (all four pins byte-identical), 17 tests, full lib 762 green, clippy+fmt clean, SECTION-9 FIVE-LENS AUDITED (findings hardened: the doc overclaim on the Archard coefficient narrowed with a re-pin follow-on to source it per-tissue from `mat.wear_coefficient` needing a `TissueMaterial.wear_coefficient` field on A's `body.rs`; a no-drive wear guard; the alien `failure_energy_tolerance` rename; strengthened tests). SLICE 1 gate-signed (the gate ran the tests itself on the branch). SLICE 2 DONE and PUSHED (`3200b99`, #113): the tissue-turnover REPAIR flux + maintenance funding gate + signed net-damage delta in `insult.rs` (`repair_energy`/`maintenance_funded_fraction`/`net_damage_delta`), inert/byte-neutral (default pin 2b7e1035 held), 25 tests, section-9 audited (two real correctness bugs hardened: the negative-tolerance guard and the sign-aware deficit fallback; two honesty fixes: the mass-neutrality doc deferred to the re-pin, the turnover-fraction-as-energy-fraction identification flagged as an owner-review modeling assumption). The gating dependency is resolved (turnover rate groundable in real tissue-turnover data). Slice 2 gate-signed. NEXT: slice 3 = the DEATH-PATH SWITCH to first-passage (the ONE re-pin), FULLY RULED by the gate (all four decisions) and load-grounding PASSED, ready to build. THE RULED DESIGN: (1) `body.rs` is Agent B's alone (gate-verified disjoint from A's runner.rs/learn.rs and C). Add `PartCondition.damage_energy: Fixed`, `TissueMaterial.wear_coefficient` (+scale), `TissueMaterial.turnover_rate`, each with a `TissueRegistry::dev_default` value + a reserved manifest entry with basis. (2) OPTION B (unify), ruled: ONE `damage_energy` accumulator both the discrete wound insults AND the continuous aging insults feed; `integrity` becomes DERIVED = `insult::derive_integrity(damage_energy, failure_tolerance)`; `destroyed()` UNCHANGED (severed stays a hard kill, drained vital fluid its own rule). Reroute `apply_insult`: today it drops integrity by `frac` via `sub_floor` (`body.rs:982/1014`); under Option B accrue `damage_energy += frac * tolerance`, which reproduces the wound integrity BIT-FOR-BIT (since integrity = 1 - damage/tolerance), so the re-pin isolates the AGING effect alone (R-WOUND behaviour-preserved; if a wound case can't reproduce cleanly, STOP and state the change). (3) LOAD-GROUNDED wire (grounding verified feasible): the wear `InsultDrive.force` from `whole_body_muscle_force` scaled to mass (`runner.rs:835`), `.distance` from body-plan ground speed x tick (`runner.rs:848`), `crack_area` from part `geometry`/`mass` (`body.rs:379/390`), never authored per-part numbers; stop-and-report if any load can't derive. (4) RE-PIN SEQUENCE: build + section-9 NOW on the current baseline, but HOLD the pin capture and merge; Agent A's step-6 keystone lands FIRST and re-pins the four pins with perception live, the gate signals when, THEN slice 3 rebases onto that baseline and re-pins ONCE with aging on top (state the four new hashes). Do NOT capture pins until the gate's go. Note: clippy -D warnings blocks unused fields, so the fields + their wiring land together (one non-byte-neutral unit); some death-timing/demography tests will shift with the behaviour change and need updating. Then slices 4-5 (pool projection R-TIER-CONSIST, retire authored `Race.lifespan_years`); section-9 before every push. Held owner-review items: the oxidative insult row, and two flagged modeling assumptions (specific_cut_energy-as-wear-energy, turnover-fraction-as-energy-fraction).

**The one held owner-call:** the fed-state metabolic/OXIDATIVE insult (include keyed on the being's own metabolic byproducts + antioxidant data, an emergent rate-of-living-shaped slope from real physics overridable by per-race data; versus exclude). Both non-authoring. Gate and I lean INCLUDE. It is a registry ROW either way, so it does not block the core.

Then built step 6 (the live wire) as four gated pieces, each byte-neutral for the four pins because run_world declares no `being_percept`: **6b-i** (`daa81fe`) `physiology::being_signal_emission(body_temp, coefficient, sigma) = laws::radiant_emission(coefficient, ONE, body_temp, ZERO, sigma, FLUX_MAX)` on the gate-ruled emission fork (the coefficient's basis is covering emissivity times radiating area, folded until a per-body material vector exists; t_cold is zero because the signal is absolute radiance), with a unit test proving it derives from temperature (warmer emits more, absolute zero emits nothing) not a species label. **6b-ii/iii** (`e62ebff`): the perceive-phase wire in `step_embodiment` (per perceiver: emission -> `resolve_reach` [occlusion from the medium when a material registry is installed, else `received_reach` transparent] -> `perceive_being_signal` -> `being_avoidance_gradient`/`being_attraction_gradient` unit-normalized into the controller being block through founder-zero freely-signed weights; the deduped perceived subjects stashed on the runner in `perceived_beings`), and the being-signal learning (`advance_eligibility_traces` decays the harm trace by `harm_eligibility_decay` and records the perceived subjects; `couple_conversation` credits the trace via `being_signal_trace_observations` toward HARMS/BENIGN [full-elig = same-tick co-occurrence, decayed = lagged predator-approach cue, the fleeing pole] and mints a same-tick REWARDS/NEUTRAL predation belief via the new subject-taking `being_signal_reward_for`, on disjoint attributes and new ordinal bands `BEING_HARM`=5M/`BEING_REWARD`=6M). The being-percept config is `learn::BeingPerceptField` (channel/row/transduction/bounds/activation_max labelled fixtures + the two reserved values, `from_manifest` reads them fail-loud), stored `Option` on the Embodiment via `set_being_field`; `step_with_field_dirs` got a `being` param threaded to `build_input_full_with_conviction` (all callers updated). Added the reserved `being_percept.emission_coefficient` to both TOMLs. **6b-iv** (`e2a8021`): the `ScenarioFeatures.being_percept` flag armed in `build_dawn_runner`/`assemble_dawn_embodiment` BEFORE the layout clone (so founder controllers express against the being-block layout), reserved values fail-loud at the arming; the `world_build` test `arming_being_percept_wires_the_being_block_changes_the_run_and_replays` proves on the 12-member co-located `embodied_peoples` band that arming wires the being block (off carries none), changes the run (the wire is live, not inert, and the band emits+perceives its own thermal signal so the perceive/learn wire is exercised), and replays bit-for-bit.

## 2026-07-09 (ULTRACODE, Agent A): the PERCEPTION-SUBSTRATE ARC (reframed Arc 3), slice 1 built+audited+gated, slice 2 framed+gated and segment 1 built

Branch `claude/liveliness-arc`, PR #109, gated by a reviewer-agent delegate (the owner is away; forks go to the gate, signed [Agent A]). Every piece was framed blind (section-11 input-bias smoke test then section-10 panel) BEFORE code, gated per push, and audited at slice completion. All commits pushed; byte-neutral throughout (the substrate is dead until the being-percept keystone consumes it), the four pins bit-exact at every gate.

**Slice 1, the REACH WIRE (built, section-9 audited, GATE-SIGNED-OFF).** Four segments: the general dimensionality-parameterized `geometric_spread` kernel (`physics/laws.rs`, byte-identical to `inverse_square_falloff` at D=3, proven), the channel reach registry (`sim/perception_reach.rs`, dispatch by the row's named kernel id never channel identity), the reach read (`received_reach`: 3D `Coord3` separation with the vertical z, structural dimensionality, medium-sampled optical depth with emergent occlusion), the run-path resolver (`resolve_reach`/`absorption_along`). Framing corrected an owner-caught 2D->3D error (R7). The mandatory section-9 five-lens audit (6 blind panelists across 3 types and 3 models, adversarial per-finding verify) returned 13 findings, all verified against source and hardened: the one MAJOR was the resolver silently ignoring `row.frequency_dependent` (an acoustic row resolving to the OPTICAL axis), hardened to reserved-fail-loud (an assert plus a `#[should_panic]` test, no shipped row sets the flag), which the gate ruled the correct fix; nits hardened (`MAX_REPRESENTABLE_SEP2` derived from the i32 cast bound with the overflow-guard mechanism corrected, `saturating_add` on the optical-depth accumulator, the medium-aggregation and fluid-medium limits flagged, the endpoint convention pinned by test). Commits `9e09675`/`11e5297`/`f434226`/`d678a7e`/`ec5fe25`/`7706ff2`. OWNER_DECISIONS_LOG "BUILT + AUDITED slice-1".

**Slice 2, the SENSORIUM-GATED MAGNITUDE PERCEPT (framed, GATE-ACCEPTED, segment 1 built).** Framing: the section-11 smoke test caught my first construction BIASED (a "carries no valence, category, label, or meaning" clause pre-answered the panel, when the JND quantization it called category-free is the operation that mints the belief-category grid at `percept.rs::feature_bucket`; and I had scoped out the transduction-derivation risk); rebuilt to MINOR_ISSUES then clean (three named fixes). The section-10 blind panel (5 valid of 6, Fable errored on safeguards) returned 5/5 significant-flaw-fixable, UNANIMOUS: the framing authored the transduction and quantization SHAPE (linear scale, absolute step, no threshold) into fixed code, when the value-authoring line and admit-the-alien require it to be per-being DATA. Verified against source (`world.rs` linear acuity scaling, `percept.rs` absolute bucket, no floor transduction primitive). The gate ACCEPTED the corrected framing (a general monotone transduction PRIMITIVE keyed on the being's own data, degenerate defaults not the fixed form, the read/not-read gate folded into a detection threshold) under 5 conditions (OWNER_DECISIONS_LOG "FRAMED slice-2" and task #18). NOTE the args-passing gotcha: the framing-panel.js `args` arrived JSON-stringified so `args.statement` was empty; fix is a scratchpad wrapper with the statement inlined plus a `panels-reviewed` marker comment (the hook requires it). Segment 1 (`e1f4355`): the transduction+discrimination floor family, the SpreadKernel enum pattern the gate blessed, Linear/AbsoluteStep byte-identical to `m*gain`/`feature_bucket`. Open question posted to the gate: closed floor enum vs open registry for the family.

**Where it stopped.** Awaiting the gate's segment-1 review (the enum-vs-registry question gates segment 2's foundation). NEXT: slice-2 segment 2 (the percept module: apply `transduce`, gate on the being's detection threshold as the single perceptibility quantity per condition 3, quantize via `discriminate`; off run-path, byte-neutral); segment 3 (derive the per-being params via `GeneSet::express` as `mind.acuity` does, optical derived, non-optical RESERVE fail-loud, never borrow `opt.refractive_index`); segment 4 (the percept-class-to-channel binding reconciling `percept.rs`'s class string with the sensorium `SenseChannelId`); then the section-9 audit and the four-pin confirmation at slice completion. Then slice 3 (the receiver-side valence learner), the 3D perception-place lift (task #15, scoped), and the being-percept keystone (which unblocks predation/flee on the run path). ## 2026-07-08 (ULTRACODE, CONTINUED 6): the EXPERIENTIAL-CONVICTION substrate COMPLETED (threading + Branch 1 + Branch 2), each branch blind-framing-panelled and CORRECTED before code, end-of-arc five-lens audit SOUND

Branch `claude/edibility-energy-grounding`, continuing CONTINUED-5. The owner's "sustained hardship shapes a being's convictions (comes to resent its god)" target is now a complete, audited SUBSTRATE. Four commits (`f207426` threading, `43d5a2f` Branch 1, `e185aa6` Branch 2, `f5d91d5` audit hardenings), all byte-neutral and green, not pushed.

**Prereq B THREADING slice (`f207426`).** Each being's own STANCE on the exposed conviction axes is fed into its behaviour controller on the embodiment tick, so a conviction CAN bias embodied behaviour: a `conviction_percepts` registry + `set_conviction_percepts` on `Embodiment` (`rebuild_layout` delegates to the conviction builder), a per-being conviction-stance map built from `world.intrinsic_of`, threaded into `locomotion::step_with_field_dirs` -> `build_input_full_with_conviction`. Founder-zero (a conviction moves no behaviour until selection lifts a weight, Principle 8). Byte-neutral (empty registry). Tested: two beings with the SAME evolved conviction->MOVE weight but OPPOSITE stances steer in OPPOSITE directions; a blank founder is unmoved.

**Branch 1, the CORRELATION RECORD (`43d5a2f`).** New `conviction_experience.rs`: a per-being leaky signed accumulator per conviction axis (`ConvictionExperience`) folding the being's own felt-experience summary (`felt_salience` valence x intensity) into each held conviction, POLE-REFERENCED (weighted by the SIGNED stance), retention-decayed (defeasible). Weight-agnostic (reads no behaviour weight). Wired as the runner passes `snapshot_reserves_for_conviction` (pre-step) + `fold_conviction_experience` (post-step), both entry points; folded into `state_hash`. Inert (records; changes no conviction). **Framing blind-panelled FIRST and CORRECTED (the load-bearing work):** the first-cut eligibility `weight * stance` was caught UNANIMOUSLY by a six-agent blind panel (verified against source) as a STATIC per-being mask (both factors constant within a life, so the "decaying trace" does no credit assignment) AND motility-parasitic (gating on the behaviour weight forecloses a founder's or a sessile being's convictions). The correction (OWNER_DECISIONS_LOG R4): drop the behaviour-weight coupling, mirror the harm learner (weight-agnostic, defeasible, alien-clean).

**Branch 2, the CONVICTION MOVE (`e185aa6`).** `Axiom::apply_felt_experience` moves a conviction toward `sign(polarity * association)`'s pole through the AGM accommodate step, gated (a distinct felt channel, not the social evidence ring); a new per-race `EpistemicStance::experiential_polarity` (hedonic default +1, per-race variable); the runner pass `apply_conviction_moves` after the Branch-1 fold, gated by `FeltConvictionCalib::move_params` (None = record-only, so Branch 1 stays inert). **Framing blind-panelled FIRST and CORRECTED:** the first-cut "compare `sign(association)` to `sign(stance)`" was caught UNANIMOUSLY (I verified the algebra) as VACUOUS (in all four cases `target = sign(association)`), which authors "+numbered pole = the thriving pole" for every axis, authoring the axis's MEANING (P9 / template-case). The panel's formal test: the move must be INVARIANT under relabeling an axis's poles. TWO fixes, both built (OWNER_DECISIONS_LOG R5): (1) relabel-invariance, by making Branch 1's association pole-referenced (signed stance), so `sign(association)` flips with a pole relabel and the move tracks the same physical pole; (2) the epistemic-polarity fork, which the OWNER decided (option a): a per-race innate disposition on `EpistemicStance` (hedonic vs ascetic), so whether felt hardship ERODES a conviction or VALIDATES it (martyr/costly-signal) is the race's own disposition, not a coded route. Money-shot test: the SAME hardship erodes a hedonic being's conviction while it HARDENS an ascetic being's.

**End-of-arc MANDATORY FIVE-LENS AUDIT: SOUND (`f5d91d5`).** Six blind lens panelists + adversarial per-finding verification (19 agents), each finding re-verified against source. 14 clean-notes confirmed the load-bearing claims (relabel-invariance holds, byte-neutral opt-in, weight-agnostic Branch 1, felt_salience alien-clean, the rising-reserve valence convention is the floor-wide normalized-level convention not a Terran more-is-better assumption). FIXED: a determinism-contract RES_WORLD phase-access omission on SYS_EMBODIMENT (the fold reads / the move writes the world; redundant with the RES_BEING serialization so byte-neutral, scheduled==pinned harness green); the felt-move overflow/abs robustness (saturating, no `Fixed::MIN` panic); the retention doc's inaccurate basis (it is a lifetime-integration window, deliberately slower than the reward learner's `1/2`, NOT the same value); the flat-gate "entrenchment" overclaim. ANSWERED WITH TESTS: the per-race polarity proven through the REAL `seed_dawn_populations` + inheritance path (`dawn_lifecycle`, refuting the "asceticism unreachable" reading); a hedonic-reinforce test showing the move turns on the lived correlation, not only the polarity knob. RECORDED as honest limits (R6): the entrenchment-rank-scaled felt gate (reserved refinement), the `from_manifest` follow-on, felt_salience's net-reserve-health nature (reserve-neutral churn reads calm), run_world's hedonic dev races.

**STATE.** Byte-neutral for every scenario (default 2b7e1035, full 1873c44e, discovery 4eea5d06, viability bae5a82, all verified byte-identical at the session base 101e053, so the whole arc is byte-neutral), worker-invariant t1==t8, 736 lib + 35 integration binaries green, clippy + fmt clean. Also recorded the owner's LIFESPAN-DERIVE directive (R3): `race.lifespan_years`/`maturity_years`/hazard must derive from anatomy, not be authored (durable at the `race.rs` field, the R-AGING flag, `OWNER_DECISIONS_LOG` R3, a memory).

**WHERE IT STOPPED and NEXT (owner-gated).** The substrate is complete, audited, committed, not pushed. Remaining: (1) the Part 28 design-doc consolidation (the formal fold into the canonical document with a Part 62 record and the Decided-and-reserved blockquote, per R2 "happens when it is built"); (2) ACTIVATION as a directed effort (arm the felt-conviction learner in a scenario and declare an ascetic race to watch convictions bend under sustained hardship over generations, since it is founder-zero + opt-in and thus dormant in the default run); (3) the R6 follow-on refinements (entrenchment-scaled felt gate, from_manifest, per-axis-normalized felt measure). The deliberative-tier crisp per-conviction attribution (today diffuse at the controller-percept tier) stays the named future refinement.

## 2026-07-08 (ULTRACODE, CONTINUED 5): the EXPERIENTIAL-CONVICTION substrate (hardship shapes belief), framing blind-panelled + CORRECTED, prereqs building; the blind FRAMING panel became a standing audit type + hook + skill

Branch `claude/edibility-energy-grounding`. The owner's emergent-narrative target: sustained material hardship shaping a being's convictions (coming to resent a god for the suffering endured). Grounding it against source turned "one wire" into a real SUBSTRATE, and getting the framing exactly right was the load-bearing work.

**The framing was blind-panelled and CORRECTED (the headline).** The first-cut framing (felt hardship enters belief-update as signed evidence with a DIRECTION toward a pole of a conviction axis, the shift emerging from disposition) was run through a fully-blind panel BEFORE any code, at the owner's instruction: six agents across three types (general-purpose, Plan, claude) and three models (opus, sonnet, fable), each seeing ONLY the guiding principles and the de-narrivatized statement, none seeing the author's or owner's conclusion. They UNANIMOUSLY and independently caught the seam: the DIRECTION clause authors the exact kind-of-experience to kind-of-conviction coupling it claims to forbid (deciding hardship bears on providence and points to its negative pole reads the experience's MEANING, the kin-template violation on belief). Verified against source (the kernel moves toward the event's own direction, so an event-side authored direction cannot even produce the promised divergence). THE CORRECTED FRAMING (owner-confirmed, `OWNER_DECISIONS_LOG.md` R2): felt experience emits ONLY a magnitude (interoceptive salience) and a valence sign from the floor, with NO axis and NO pole; which conviction it bears on, and its direction there, is a per-being LEARNED coupling above the primitive, so "hardship erodes faith" is a description of a learned outcome for some beings and its opposite for others, never a coded route. The trap recorded: do NOT reuse affect.rs's per-race `AppraisalBinding` table for axioms (legitimate for affect, a violation for the emergent cultural content of convictions).

**The panel became standing infrastructure (`c315c52`, `6b21347`).** AGENTIC_ADDENDUM.md section 10 documents the blind FRAMING panel as a third standing audit type (sibling of section 7 the fully-blind code audit and section 8 blind concept verification): critique a design-framing STATEMENT against the principles alone, diverse types + models, blind, de-narrivatized, BEFORE it is built. A PreToolUse hook (`.claude/hooks/workflow-panel-reminder.sh`) surfaces the section 7-10 catalog when a panel-shaped Workflow is authored (blocks once, clears on a `panels-reviewed` marker, non-panel workflows pass). And a `/panel` skill (`.claude/skills/panel/`) runs either mode (`framing` or the five-lens `audit`) with the proven templates. Answers the owner's question: the panel catalog is read on demand, not loaded verbatim at launch, so the hook + skill make it active at workflow-time.

**Grounding found the substrate.** Neither learned-coupling anchor exists: convictions do NOT bias run-path behaviour (no axiom read in the runner's behaviour path; the deliberative Behaviour tier is test-only armed and its `last_action` is decoupled from embodiment, feeding only state_hash + readers), and there is no felt-experience-to-conviction association (axioms move only by social enculturation on the tick). The two branches want different foundations: Branch 1 (correlation-record) needs no convictions-bias-behaviour; only Branch 2 (credit-assignment) does.

**Prereqs (built to a clean checkpoint).** Prereq A DONE (`5215769`): `physiology::felt_salience`, the alien-clean felt-experience primitive (folds a being's own signed reserve-deltas into intensity + valence, keyed on no axis identity, emitting no axis or pole), tested, byte-neutral (no consumer, the primitive-first pattern). Prereq B LAYOUT SLICE DONE (`35aa930`): the conviction-percept substrate, a being's own conviction stance as a controller input channel the evolved network learns to weight, so convictions bias EMBODIED behaviour emergently (founder-zero, never an authored rule; new `conviction_percept.rs` registry + `ControllerLayout` n_conviction block via a new deepest builder the existing callers delegate to with an empty registry). Byte-neutral by construction (empty registry -> n_conviction 0 -> run_world default `2b7e1035` unchanged), tested (registry opt-out + order; layout opt-in byte-identical, correct sizing, stance written, founder inert). This is the controller-percept path, chosen over the deliberation-embodiment keystone: emergence-clean and consistent with the recurrent-controller foundation. HONEST LIMIT: Branch-2 credit-assignment attribution is diffuse under a controller percept (derivable from the being's own weights); the deliberative-tier coupling stays a future refinement for crisper attribution.

**WHERE IT STOPPED and NEXT.** Checkpointed clean and committed (722 lib tests green, clippy + fmt clean, byte-neutral). Remaining (a multi-session arc): (1) the Prereq B THREADING slice, compute each being's stances from its intrinsic beliefs and feed them into the controller input on the embodiment tick (arm the registry on the run path, the appetitive-block threading is the precedent), byte-neutral. (2) Branch 1 (correlation-record: felt experience associates with recently-invoked convictions via the eligibility-trace pattern; where no association exists, no conviction changes). (3) Branch 2 (credit-assignment). Each branch coupling is framing-panelled (`/panel framing`) before it is built, per the standing discipline.

## 2026-07-08 (ULTRACODE, CONTINUED 4): the RECURRENT-CONTROLLER FOUNDATION wired into a real living run (`--scenario living`), instrumented with honest reporting; the fixture-proof does NOT transfer to the real run (a found seam)

Branch `claude/edibility-energy-grounding`. Picked up the CONTINUED-3 milestone: wire the proven recurrent-controller foundation into a ground-up honest living world and instrument survival with honest reporting, never tuning a fixture to win. Landed, green, byte-neutral, and the honest result is a significant CORRECTION to the prior conclusion.

**What was wired (byte-neutral for every existing scenario; the living path is opt-in and dead elsewhere).** A new `--scenario living` in the quarantined `run_world` harness: honest `dev_grazer` grazer founders (no oilseed hybrid, no discovery loop) foraging the REAL biosphere's producer plants for their own physics-derived food value (`environ.set_producer_food(&living.producer_compositions())`, the Arc-5-T3 wiring `full` left owner-gated, armed here through a new `Runner::environ_mut()`), steered by a RECURRENT controller (hidden width 4) PRE-ADAPTED at the dawn by `evolve_forage_controller` on the founders' own `dev_grazer` physiology and seeded via `append_controller_block` (a new `Controller::weights()` accessor + a `recurrent_forage_seeds` helper that expresses the fittest bootstrap genome and reads off its weights). The living embodiment uses the NO-PERCEPT recurrent grazer layout (empty tolerances; the salinity percept deferred as a separable later bootstrap), so the founder-seed layout, the runner embodiment layout, and the bootstrap scoring layout are the IDENTICAL layout and the evolved weights align. Matter cycle + decomposer + corpse deposit armed. Library plumbing: exported `evolve_forage_controller`/`reserve_conflict_survival`; a `&score` to `score` clippy needless-borrow fix in `evolve_forage_controller`. A `CIVSIM_LIVING_LINEAR` env A/B lever (recurrent vs the linear base-liveliness forage on the identical run). New `scenarios/living.toml`. STATE: existing scenarios byte-identical (default `2b7e1035`, full `1873c44e`, discovery `7711021b`, viability `8a652b1b`; NOTE the CONTINUED-2 pins `b5071802`/`1c7cf2f2` were ALREADY STALE at HEAD before this session, unchanged by me). Determinism worker-invariant (t1==t8); 718 lib + all integration tests green; clippy + fmt clean; the non-gpu workspace builds.

**The honest finding (NOT tuned to win): the recurrent foundation, proven in the ISOLATED fixture, does NOT transfer to the real run, and the living world is SPAWN-PLACEMENT-dependent.** `--scenario living` THRIVES on seeds where founders spawn near food+water (seed 24301: 24 to 33 to 42 to 54 up to 120 over 20 gens, a growing watchable grazer population on real biosphere plants; seed 24242 to 42) and COLLAPSES on seeds where a founding band spawns on a dry corner far from water (seed 1: 24 to 11 to 0 by gen 4, starvation; seed 2 similar). A decisive per-being trace (seed 1, band 0 at the corner cell (0,0)): the being moves ONE tile to (0,1), then FREEZES for the whole generation, one tile short of its KNOWN food at (0,2), and starves (energy 0.496 to 0.022, dies about tick 130), never discovering water. A/B on the identical real biosphere: the LINEAR base-liveliness controller OUTPERFORMS the pre-adapted recurrent one across seeds (gen-2 pop 28/13/33/33 linear vs 11/9/26/33 recurrent), the OPPOSITE of the fixture result where recurrent scored strictly higher. So the CONTINUED-3 conclusion ("recurrent is THE proven foundation, build it now") holds only in the isolated fixture (`reserve_conflict_survival`, both sources pre-shown on an open plane, viability the score); in the real run's regime (partial knowledge, food sensed within range but water not, real terrain, sparse and often low-energy plants) the evolved recurrent policy produces near-zero effective movement toward known food. This is prime-directive #1 in action (prove it, most of all when "it" is your own conclusion). NOTHING was tuned; the lever only observes.

**Two owner decisions surfaced (both real mechanism seams, neither authored):** (1) The DAWN BOOTSTRAP must be RUN-MATCHED for the pre-adaptation to transfer. Today it pre-shows both sources on an open plane and rewards total reserve maintained, so it never selects for SEARCH (moving to discover an unknown source) nor for the "know one need, not the other" state the real run presents. A search-inclusive, partial-knowledge, real-terrain bootstrap is the mechanism fix (real research, not a tune). Given the recurrent controller does not yet beat the linear one in the real run, the owner decides whether to invest in the run-matched bootstrap or keep the linear forage scaffold as the run default while the recurrent tier matures. (2) Founder SPAWN PLACEMENT is habitability-blind (bands at a fixed `(band*5, band*3)` grid), so a band on a dry corner starves regardless of controller, the DOMINANT collapse factor on bad seeds. Habitability-aware placement would help all scenarios but re-pins them; a design/calibration call. Both are the honest next mechanism work, alongside the still-owner-gated biosphere food/metabolism balance (FOODWEB slices A/B) and the identity-blind hunt (percept G + strike H).

**Audit (the mandatory 5 lenses + correctness, a 14-agent workflow: 6 blind panelists then adversarial per-finding verify, each verified against source): CODE SOUND, no critical/major.** The highest-risk CONFIRMATION-BIAS lens returned ALL clean-notes (no survival-serving tuning; the postures are identical to sibling scenarios; the constants are reserved-with-basis matching a transfer de-risk test; the honest-negative is corroborated by code shape and byte-identical siblings). Verify phase: the alien-feasibility and LIVING_HIDDEN "defects" were REFUTED/invalid (not real); the survivors were one MINOR (a Principle-8 comment overstating the pre-adaptation as "the run's own emergent selection") and two NITs (a comment inaccuracy; the `CIVSIM_LIVING_LINEAR` env lever's effect on the "same arguments reproduce the hash" claim, consistent with the existing `CIVSIM_GPU_FIELD`/`WORLD_W` levers). FIXED: the P8 overstatement and the comment inaccuracy (the comments now say the pre-adaptation is an OFFLINE PROXY warm-start whose transfer the scenario measures, not the run's own emergent selection; `evolve.rs` `evolve_forage_controller` doc softened the same way). HONEST LIMIT RECORDED (not a defect, pre-existing): the dawn-bootstrap scorer (`reserve_conflict_survival`) takes the physiology registry as DATA but its food/water MATTER deposits are keyed to the Terran `bio.energy_density`/`bio.water_fraction` pair, so the living pre-adaptation is grazer-specific; generalizing the scorer's matter to the physiology's own backing classes is a bootstrap-generalization follow-on (folds into the run-matched-bootstrap seam).

WHERE IT STOPPED: the living wiring is landed, green, byte-neutral, instrumented with honest reporting; it demonstrably WORKS on favorable seeds and its collapse mode is diagnosed to the mechanism (recurrent non-transfer + habitability-blind placement), never papered over. NEXT (owner-gated): decide run-matched bootstrap vs linear-scaffold, and habitability-aware placement; then the identity-blind hunt (FOODWEB plan G/H). Not pushed (push only when asked).

## 2026-07-08 (ULTRACODE, overnight, CONTINUED 3): the living-world CRUX diagnosed + the RECURRENT-CONTROLLER foundation proven (owner directive: do it properly from the ground up, no confirmation-bias fixtures)

Branch `claude/edibility-energy-grounding` (continues below). The owner asked whether the living world is watchable, then to fix `--scenario full` "from the ground up, no cheap demo fixtures," and specifically whether the recurrent controller (option B) is the foundation that should not be deferred. It is, and this session PROVED it. All work committed and green.

**The `--scenario full` collapse RE-DIAGNOSED (my earlier soil-draw diagnosis was WRONG, corrected in `OWNER_DECISIONS_LOG.md` item 0).** Falsified by A/B: zeroing the producer draw still collapses full. Instrumented via `take_obs_deaths`: the founders die of THIRST (water axis), not starvation. Chain of confirmed findings: the full/viability founders are a GRAZER+OILSEED HYBRID; drinkable water pools in BASINS (hydrology) while producers grow on niche SLOPES, so in any real world food and water are spatially SEPARATED; the DEFAULT world thrives only because its abstract food is UNIFORM (no attractor competing with water-seeking). The root cause is a real capability gap: the seeded LINEAR forage reaction norm steers toward the vector-AVERAGE of all its reserve needs and CANNOT prioritise the scarcest, because prioritisation is a deficit-times-direction PRODUCT a linear controller cannot express. So a fed-but-thirsty being heads for the food/water average and dies of thirst. This is why every "food level" fix failed (they keep the plant an attractor) and only disabling `set_producer` (uniform food) helped.

**The recurrent-controller foundation is PROVEN (the answer to the owner's B question: YES, build it now, do not defer).** Full reasoning in the chat and `docs/working/FOODWEB_INTEGRATION_PLAN.md` (section "THE REAL CRUX"): a linear controller forces every future behaviour (spatial prioritisation, flee/chase, hunting judgment, social) to be hand-authored as a pre-computed percept, an authoring pattern and a Principle-8 crack; the recurrent net is the general nonlinear substrate where behaviour EMERGES from the evolved network and selection. Four commits landed on `crates/sim/src/evolve.rs`, all tested and fmt-clean:
- `two_reserve_reg` / `energy_matter` / the food-vs-water episode (`two_reserve_episode_survival`): the minimal spatial form of the thirst trap (energy and water in OPPOSITE directions), and the crux falsifier `a_recurrent_controller_evolves_to_survive_the_food_vs_water_trap_better_than_a_linear_one`: evolving both representations against the SAME challenge, the recurrent controller reaches strictly and consistently higher viability (best 74290 vs linear 68803, climbing higher and faster). Two honest fitness findings, recorded in code: raw ticks-survived is DECEPTIVE (topping one reserve buys no survival, selection stalls), and even `min(energy,water)` is flat (foraging one reserve does not raise the min); the SUM (total reserve maintained) is a general VIABILITY gradient that measures health, not behaviour, so HOW to stay healthy still emerges.
- `evolve_forage_controller` (the DAWN BOOTSTRAP): evolves a recurrent forage controller against the food-vs-water challenge and returns the fittest genome, so beings enter the run PRE-ADAPTED (escaping the chicken-and-egg that kills a naive population before selection can act). This is the run's own emergent selection run once up front, not an authored behaviour.
- Generalised so `reserve_conflict_survival` and `evolve_forage_controller` take the physiology `HomeostaticRegistry` as DATA (Principle 11), and the transfer de-risk falsifier `the_dawn_bootstrap_pre_adapts_the_grazer_founders_own_physiology`: bootstrapping on `dev_grazer` (the founders' REAL registry, at its own drains) ends far healthier on held-out food-vs-water than random (83349 vs 69477). So the pre-adaptation transfers to the reserves the founders will carry.

**WHERE IT STOPPED and the EXACT wiring plan for the next session (deliberately not rushed: the survival-verification is the highest confirmation-bias risk and must not be tuned-to-win).** Build a NEW honest scenario (e.g. `--scenario living`), from the ground up, NOT a rework of the demo fixtures: honest grazers (`dev_grazer`, no oilseed hybrid) on the REAL biosphere. The precise seam: in `run_world.rs` the founder controller is seeded at `dawn_layout` (line ~433) via `forage_taxis_weights` (LINEAR) then `append_controller_block(genes, freqs, effects, ploidy, weight_count, &seeds)` (line ~457); creatures use the same pattern at ~1911. To wire the recurrent foundation: (1) build the layout with `controller_hidden > 0` (the switch is `controller_hidden: 0` at line ~851); (2) call `evolve_forage_controller(&layout, &dev_grazer(), &params, seed)` to get the pre-adapted genome; (3) extract its controller-channel weights and seed them via `append_controller_block` instead of the linear forage seed. KNOWN FRICTION: the bootstrap episode runs the FIXTURE path (`locomotion::step` hardcodes `PerceptRegistry::empty()`), so it fits a NO-percept grazer layout (`ControllerLayout::new(dev_grazer, dev_default, hidden)`), while the current founders' `dawn_layout` carries the salinity percept. Cleanest resolution for the first milestone: the `living` grazers use the no-percept layout (salt-sensing is a separable later percept-bootstrap concern), leaving the existing scenarios untouched. Then arm the real biosphere and wire real plant food (`environ.set_producer_food(&living.producer_compositions())`, currently owner-gated-unwired in `worldbuild.rs` ~440 but the edibility grounding now derives real food value, so it may work), and INSTRUMENT survival with honest reporting (thrive or collapse plus the real cause; fix the mechanism, never tune a fixture). Then the identity-blind hunt (a being-perception percept + the already-general strike), per the owner: cannibalism, cross-species, people-hunt-people all emerge from one mechanism keyed only on body physics.

## 2026-07-08 (ULTRACODE, overnight, CONTINUED 2): Arc 5 COMPLETE (T4 landed) + Arc 6 landed (grow bodies from genome); Arc 7 scoping in flight

Continues the two entries below. Branch `claude/edibility-energy-grounding`, now ~20 commits ahead of main, all verified (worker-invariant determinism, 920 sim tests + 39 world tests green, clippy + fmt clean, byte-neutral pins hold). Owner directive picked up: "keep going, stop worrying about compaction, finish the task list, audit at the end, present."

**Arc 5 T4 landed (COMPLETES Arc 5).** Two commits: the floor axis `fluid.moisture_content` (grounds terrain moisture, which was unmoored fractal noise with no floor identity, the scoping's key finding; the row comment records why it is NOT the existing `fluid.vapor_pressure`, a distinct MPa quantity), and the Tile-axis generalization (`2756874`): `Tile` is now `{ axes: Vec<Fixed>, biome }` generated from `WorldgenParams.axes` (a Vec of `AxisGenSpec`: Fractal / LatitudeBlendedFractal / Uniform), so a world declares its env dimensions as data, not the hardcoded elevation/moisture/temperature triad. Consumers read the conventional roles via `Tile::elevation()/moisture()/temperature()` accessors over `AXIS_*` ordinals. Byte-neutral (the dev spec reproduces the triad; default b5071802, full 1c7cf2f2 unchanged), alien-clean falsifier (a world declaring a 4th axis gets 4-axis tiles). RESIDUE flagged (byte-changing): `derive_region` still pads the region ENV vector to 4 slots with a moisture-duplicate soil axis; unifying it + grounding a real soil axis re-pins the biosphere.

**Arc 6 landed (`de20a5c`): biosphere species grow bodies from their genomes.** Byte-neutral opt-in: `Species.body_plan` becomes `Option<BodyPlan>` (Some = catalog tier, byte-identical; None = grown tier), a world declares one shared `MorphogenProgram` carried on `LivingWorld` as `GrownBodies{program, ploidy, seed}`. When armed, `sample_candidate` draws a per-species RANDOMIZED morphogen seed, appends the morphogen block, and the consumers (composition, mass, describe) regrow the species' representative `Structure` on demand (`biosphere::representative_structure`). Two correctness fixes the scoping caught: the FLAT-SPINE collapse (randomized per-species seed) and the GENESET INDEX-ALIGNMENT gap (`morphogen_gene_set_with_prefix` pads past the niche loci). Reserved: `GeneratorParams.ploidy=2`, `morphogen_gauss` k=12 (the unset sentinel k=0 PANICS on draw, a caught trap). Byte-neutral (None: default/full unchanged), falsifier proves distinct expressed params + grown tier + deterministic regrow. HONEST LIMIT (follow-on): epoch selection applies one uniform per-species fitness scalar, so grown body shape is selected only as a side effect of regional fit, not by reading the Structure's own capability. Full plan in `docs/working/ARC6_GROW_BODIES_PLAN.md`.

ARC 7 SCOPED, not built (owner-visible decision, `OWNER_DECISIONS_LOG.md` item 9, plan `docs/working/ARC7_CREATURE_MINDS_PLAN.md`). The first slice spawns biosphere creatures as living `Walker`s reusing the founder machinery (byte-neutral behind a new flag), but it touches the runner lifecycle + mints new StableIds (the two highest-risk areas), and the scoping's key finding is that flee/chase CANNOT emerge until a being-perception percept is added to the shared `ControllerLayout` (a re-pinning DEFERRED slice, and it must stay a general percept + evolved controller + selection so predator-avoidance emerges rather than being authored). Surfaced as a focused dedicated slice, not tail-of-marathon work.

FINAL AUDIT DONE (29-agent, then a 24-agent workflow): the five mandatory lenses ran twice, once over the edibility grounding + Arc 5 T1 and once over Arc 5 T4 + Arc 6. Both verdicts: the code is SOUND. Confirmed findings were honesty/methodology limits + test-strength critiques, all logged or fixed (a food-value CI regression guard, a strengthened Arc-6 grown-body test proving morphology varies not just genomes, and the T4 role-ordinal honest limit recorded at the `AXIS_*` constants). Branch state: 24 commits ahead of main, the whole workspace (minus gpu) green, clippy + fmt clean, determinism worker-invariant, byte-neutral pins hold (default b5071802, --scenario full 1c7cf2f2). NOT pushed (push-only-when-asked); ready for the owner to review/PR/merge. This session delivered, all byte-neutral and audited: Arc 5 COMPLETE (T1+T4+T6), Arc 6 (grow bodies from genome), the edibility grounding (viability fixed), and Arc 7 fully scoped.

## 2026-07-08 (ULTRACODE, overnight autonomous, CONTINUED): Arc 5 T1 + T6 landed (alien-clean, byte-neutral); whole-arc 5-lens audit run + fixed; T4/Arc6/Arc7 scoped and flagged

Picks up from the entry below (the edibility grounding). Branch `claude/edibility-energy-grounding`, now 12 commits ahead of main, all verified (worker-invariant determinism holds b5071802; default 65, discovery 65, viability 45 all thrive; sim tests 0 failed; clippy + fmt clean). NOT pushed (CLAUDE.md: push only when asked); ready for the owner to review/PR/merge.

**`--scenario full` collapse: diagnosed, logged, NOT dev-hacked.** A PRE-EXISTING biosphere-balance issue (full collapsed identically before the grounding). Controlled A/B pinned it to the producer food-OVERRIDE (`set_producer`): the higher producer capacity drives the extract cycle to draw the soil down faster than weathering + decomposition replenish it, so the food the founders forage depletes and the world crashes; disabling `set_producer` alone lets full thrive (33 -> 48). Neither MAX(producer,climate) nor bumping the biomass scale fixed it (it is the extract-draw coupling, not the food level). Surfaced as a dedicated biosphere-balance pass (`OWNER_DECISIONS_LOG.md` item 0), not a single derivable gate.

**Arc 5 scoping (ultracode workflow) + plan doc.** `docs/working/ARC5_SOURCE_MODEL_PLAN.md` holds the verified map + designs + build plan for T1/T4/T6. Key finding: the biosphere layer is ALREADY axis-agnostic and id-opaque (EnvProfile is an unbounded Vec, Niche reads axes by ordinal, abiotic is an opaque `BTreeSet<u16>`); the Earth-hardcoding lives only in `derive_region` + the run_world registry. Dependency order T4 -> T1 -> T6.

**Arc 5 T1 landed (`e90492d`): a region's abiotic set derives from data availability bands.** `AbioticBinding` gains an `AbioticAvailability` (a Liebig conjunction of `AxisBand{axis, min, max}` half-open bands over the region's env axes, ordinal like the niche); `AbioticSourceRegistry::available_in` folds to the present source ids. `derive_region` calls it instead of the hardcoded {light always, water where moist, else soil}. The registry is the world's own data, threaded through `genesis()`/`WorldGenesis::new()` and carried on `LivingWorld` (`AbioticSourceRegistry::earth_dev()` is the Terran dev fixture). CLOSED a real production gap the scoping found: the canonical worldbuild path never armed the abiotic registry (only the run_world example did, by a hand-written literal); worldbuild now arms it from `LivingWorld::abiotic`, and the run_world literal is deleted. Byte-neutral (earth_dev reproduces the triad exactly: default b5071802 and full 1c7cf2f2 both unchanged). Alien-clean falsifier: a lightless world with a geothermal + chemosynthetic source derives its own set with no Earth assumption.

**Arc 5 T6 landed (`d243f97`): the decompose Conditions kernel's axis set becomes world data.** A `ConditionSource` (Moisture/Respirable/WarmthAboveBarrier) + a `ConditionAxis{source, reference}` list on `DecomposerDriver` replace the hardcoded Earth-aerobic triad; `contribution` folds a row's declared axes against a caller-supplied condition profile, skipping any absent source (non-limiting). `activity_at(profile, life_stock)`; `warmth_above_barrier` extracted as a public physics helper; the runner builds the profile with all three Terran axes so an Earth world reads byte-identical (full 1c7cf2f2 unchanged). Alien-clean falsifier: an anaerobic world dropping the respirable axis decays an airless-but-wet-warm cell the Earth triad gates to zero.

**Whole-arc mandatory 5-lens audit (29-agent ultracode workflow) run + fixes.** Over the edibility grounding + Arc 5 T1. Outcome: the code is SOUND (physical_intake and available_in verified clean; food_energy_density confirmed properly reserved-with-basis, not smuggled). Confirmed findings were methodology/honesty + two documented limits, all folded into `OWNER_DECISIONS_LOG.md` (items 1, 5, 6): (a) the "world thrives" proof is a dev-harness calibration tuned to an aggregate population trend downstream of many reserved values, not a validated absolute scale; (b) food_energy_density is a single GLOBAL scale applied to every backing class (the T3 per-plant-composition wiring supersedes it); (c) the per-class physiological requirement datum is no longer gated on the physical path (a deliberate room-to-fill model change). FIXES applied (`a06aa53`, `a8e2f64`): the honesty limits logged; a unit-level regression guard (`the_food_energy_density_reconciliation_keeps_forage_intake_in_the_survivable_regime`) now CI-protects the calibration (the audit found the "thrives" proof had no test protection); the stale `derive_region` T1 doc comment refreshed.

**QUEUED next work (scoped, flagged, dependency-ordered):**
- **T4 (env axes become a data-defined registry)** the remaining Arc-5 piece: turns the closed `Tile` struct in the `world` crate (`elevation/moisture/temperature`) into `axes: Vec<Fixed>` with an `EnvAxisRegistry`, a LARGER cross-crate refactor (ripples into worldgen, state_hash, biome classify, environ). Full build steps in `docs/working/ARC5_SOURCE_MODEL_PLAN.md` step 1. Due-diligence note there: check the existing dormant `fluid.vapor_pressure` floor axis before authoring a new moisture axis.
- **The biosphere-balance pass** (fix `--scenario full`): bound the producer draw to the soil's actual inflow, or make the producer biomass a regrowing stock the extract does not over-draw. Add a scenario-level cohort-survival test (and mark `full` as a known-collapse) so viability has CI protection (`OWNER_DECISIONS_LOG` item 6).
- **Arc 6** (grow each biosphere species' body from its genome via the morphogen `Structure` instead of the sampled `BodyPlan`, a large integration; the run already handles both body types) and **Arc 7** (creatures-have-simpler-minds: living agents). Both large; scope each before building.

**Owner decisions await** in `docs/working/OWNER_DECISIONS_LOG.md` (7 items): R-UNITS-PIN canonical anchor, the full-scenario balance, T2/T3/T5 consolidation, merge checkpoints, physics constants, the requirement datum, the viability CI test.

- **Geophage grounded** (`a7c572a`): the per-axis loop fills a direct-fill reserve (a mineral, a seed) from the substance it draws on via `physical_intake` with the unit bridge. PROOF: default, discovery, AND viability all THRIVE (64, 64, 45); every one was collapsing before.
- **`--scenario full` still collapses**, a PRE-EXISTING biosphere-balance issue (full collapsed identically before the grounding), diagnosed and logged (`OWNER_DECISIONS_LOG.md` item 0): the producer food-override drives the extract cycle to draw the soil down faster than weathering + decomposition replenish it; disabling `set_producer` alone lets full thrive. A dedicated biosphere-balance pass, not dev-hacked.

## 2026-07-08 (ULTRACODE ON, cont.): chemistry arc MERGED (PR #105); food-value DERIVABILITY answered + the edibility-energy grounding arc SCOPED

The chemistry arc plus its audit hardenings are MERGED to `main` (PR #105, merge `7503dd0`); the entry below is the full build record. The owner then challenged the B owner-gate: a unit of food should replenish a reserve by its NUTRIENTS, derived from physics, not a made-up "biomass" number. Investigated and answered (verified against source, `docs/working/EDIBILITY_ENERGY_GROUNDING_SCOPE.md`): the metabolism is HALF-GROUNDED. The DRAIN is physical (`derive_base_drain`: Kleiber + the reserve's stored energy = `capacity * body_mass_kg * bio.energy_density`), but the INTAKE (`geophage`, the locomotion `INGEST`) squashes the food's content through a SATURATING `satisfaction * capacity` fill model rather than delivering `mass * bio.energy_density * assimilation` linearly, and `biomass_per_stock` plus the T3 food-value bridge are the non-physical scalings there. So the food-VALUE is NOT a real authored value: grounding the intake in the food's own energy content (the axes the drain already uses, that plants already declare) dissolves the fudge. This is the deferred R-PHYS-BIO edibility measure. What REMAINS the owner's are physics/biology CONSTANTS (Kleiber, trophic efficiency, weathering and decomposition kinetics) plus R-UNITS-PIN (the reserve's absolute joule scale, an owner anchor). It also explains the pre-existing viability failure: the full dev world goes extinct in ~6 generations at every seed (byte-identical before and after the arc, so not a regression), because the intake fudge starves the founders; the grounding is expected to fix it.

OWNER ALIGNED (chose to build it with a dev anchor) and added a HARD CONSTRAINT: the energy-from-food path must be ALIEN-CLEAN (a thaumic being draws its reserve from a mana axis, a chemosynthetic one from a redox axis, none of it hardcoded to `bio.energy_density`). LANDED (`2b47a86`, branch `claude/edibility-energy-grounding`): the alien-clean primitive `physiology::physical_intake(available, assim, eta, body_mass, body_storage_density, room) -> (content_to_eat, reserve_gain)`, the intake counterpart to `derive_base_drain` using the SAME reserve bridge (a reserve unit is worth `body_mass * body_storage_density` of physical content), keyed on NO axis identity, with a falsifier proving identical physical inputs give an identical result whatever the class means. It is not yet wired, so the universal intake is unchanged.

The owner ALSO set a durable, inter-agent process requirement (`6f6516c`): every end-of-arc/before-merge audit MUST run five standing panel lenses (`AGENTIC_ADDENDUM.md` section 9, `CLAUDE.md` directives 6-7): the fully-blind confirmation-bias catcher (blind to the author's APPROACH), the derive-versus-author catcher (a value may be authored ONLY in the physics floor, nowhere else, no exceptions; grow the floor rather than author), the alien-feasibility catcher (is an alien/magical creature feasible in this method?), the Terran-bias catcher, and the steering/Principles catcher. Also persisted to session memory.

STOPPED at a green, coherent state (primitive built + tested, world unchanged). REMAINING (the wiring, `docs/working/EDIBILITY_ENERGY_GROUNDING_SCOPE.md` build shape, NOT byte-neutral, it re-pins every scenario): (1) precompute a per-being intake-params map `{body_mass_kg, storage_density_by_class}` in the runner's `step_embodiment` (which has anchors + organs) and thread it into `locomotion::step_with_field_dirs` beside `drains`; (2) replace `satisfaction * capacity` with `physical_intake` in BOTH the forage INGEST and the geophage (and the Arc-2 whole-body bite); (3) retire `biomass_per_stock` and the T3 food-value gate; (4) dev-set the R-UNITS-PIN reserve joule-scale and iterate until the full dev world SURVIVES (the proof-of-work); (5) audit under the five mandatory lenses. THEN the Cluster-I arcs 5 (source-model T1/T4/T6), 6 (grow bodies from genome), 7 (creatures-have-simpler-minds).
