## 2026-07-07: the COMPOSED CAPSTONE LANDED (gate ruled option b, single lineage); the lifetime/demography keystone is CLOSED, awaiting the fully-blind audit and PR #97 merge

The gate signed off D-WEATHER and ruled OPTION (b): build the composed capstone as a single-lineage shape (maker discovers, dies, heir re-earns from the hulls the dead maker left), with concrete staging guidance for the three frictions. First, per prime directive 1, I re-verified my three friction diagnoses against the real code and found the temperature one was a FALSE conclusion from the earlier rabbit-hole: the C2/C3 discovery registry makes the TEMPERATURE axis inert (no drain, no death floor), and `two_body_plans_diverge...` runs beings at field 310 K and they live, so temperature never touches survival; the earlier deaths came from using a thermal-coupled registry, not a fundamental conflict. The three frictions were all staging, as the gate said.

CAPSTONE (built, landed): `a_technique_outlives_its_maker_when_an_heir_re_earns_it_from_the_dead_makers_hulls` (runner.rs) composes the WHOLE loop on ONE `Runner::with_world_and_embodiment` across a MAKER'S DEATH. A maker (spawned old, hungry, exploration on) eats a bounded oilseed ration at a tile, its slice-B byproduct leaves a durable `spent_hull`, and it re-earns "eating where this residue lies pays off" keyed on the opaque hull signature from its OWN felt reward (C1/C2). It DIES by pillar-1 per-tick mortality (a raw-age hazard certain once old, zero for the young heir), and `reconcile_lifecycle` retires its walker while the hull PERSISTS in the field. A weathering window with NO being embodied shows the abandoned hull fading by the matter cycle (slice D) yet persisting. Then the heir, a younger living mind that coexisted with the maker at a different age (overlapping generations, pillar 1), is embodied at the abandoned site AFTER the maker is gone and re-earns the SAME belief from ITS OWN felt reward at the hull the dead maker left, never taught (gossip unarmed). Founder-zero falsifier is clean: an off-exploration heir, embodied well-fed so it SURVIVES the whole window standing on the maker's hull, still forms no belief, isolating eating (not starvation or transmission) as the sole gate. The run replays bit for bit.

Frictions dissolved by the gate's staging: (1) temperature by the inert TEMPERATURE axis, so the field sits at 300 K (hull weathers, above the 273 K barrier) while the beings live on energy alone; (2) competition by the maker and heir NEVER being embodied at once (the heir arrives after the death); (3) neutral belief by the heir being embodied hungry-but-fed so eating lifts its reserve (felt reward). The learning subtlety found and handled: the slice-B deposit grows the hull and the matter cycle weathers it, so the perceived quantized signature drifts; a bounded per-tick oilseed ration (the C2 convention) makes the reserve rise gradually (sustained reward) and the hull grow slowly (a stable-enough signature to accumulate commit evidence), and the belief check scans the non-void material buckets rather than a frozen amount. Honest limits stated in the docs: two co-existing founders rather than a reproduction-born parent and child (pillar 1's reproduction-born overlapping generations is separately proven by the 1c test); the heir's body staged at the site rather than emergent wandering; deposit fraction and weathering rate are reserved dev values surfaced with basis.

Byte-neutral (only a test added, no production code touched): crucible `254bc17c` (17 world_build + 3 world_determinism), default `run_world` `a465919e9825007c1ff876c03e4877ea` unchanged, 676 lib + all integration tests green, clippy clean.

CAPSTONE SIGNED OFF: the gate verified it test-only and byte-neutral, and ruled the lifetime/demography keystone CLOSED (pillar 1 overlapping generations + pillar 2 physical-trace persistence both complete, every mechanism falsifier-backed and byte-neutral). CI on `755376a` is fully green (both jobs success). The gate ran its OWN independent fully-blind audit (four skeptics told to refute, verified against source) and it came back: the demonstration HOLDS. One phantom dismissed (a bucket-scan-learns-oilseed concern the auditor raised without the registry line; the heir's material registry is `from_substances(&["spent_hull"])`, so the belief is necessarily hull-keyed). Two explicit assertions requested (not mechanism changes, just closing the audit's concerns in the test): (1) the heir holds NO reward belief before its eating window (so the belief forms during eating, not from overlap-phase gossip), and (2) the heir's ENERGY reserve is strictly higher after the window than at its start (felt reward verified, not inferred). BOTH ADDED (commit after ba6f82a): the run closure now returns `heir_blank_before_eating` + `heir_energy_start` + `heir_energy_end`, asserted in the primed run; the test passes, byte-neutral (crucible `254bc17c`, run_world `a465919e` unchanged), bit-for-bit replay intact, 676 lib + all integration green, fmt/clippy clean. STOPPED: the two-assertion polish pushed; the gate merges PR #97 on the green ("Add them, re-run... and I merge PR #97 on the green"). NEXT: the gate performs the merge; after merge, the RELATIONAL-belief substrate arc (TODOS #83). R-OVERLAP-NE stays flagged (census untouched). EMERGENCE LINE HELD throughout: the trace is physical and re-earned, the weathering keys off the hull's own composition never a tag, the belief comes from felt reward and is never handed (gossip off, founder-zero falsified), heritable drives (the attraction weight included) stay founder-zero.

---

## 2026-07-06 (latest): trace slice D WEATHERING landed; the composed free-run surfaced three integration frictions, reported to the gate for the ruling that closes the arc

Built and landed the WEATHERING half of trace slice D, the last mechanism the keystone needs, and attempted the composed free-run capstone.

WEATHERING (landed, proven): `a_spent_hull_trace_weathers_slowly_when_warm_and_is_preserved_when_frozen` (physiology_embodiment.rs) arms `Runner::set_matter_cycle` and shows a `spent_hull` deposited in a cell fading by the SAME matter cycle carrion decays under, keyed off its own composition (`bio.mineral_ash_fraction` + `bio.decomposition_barrier`), never a tag (Principles 8, 11). A warm cell (300 K, above the 273 K barrier) weathers the hull SLOWLY (most survives a single step because it is recalcitrant, it fades over 30 ticks but persists past a being's lifespan), a frozen cell (250 K, below the barrier) preserves it whole, and the weathered mass moves into the decomposed sink. This closes the trace's FALSIFIABILITY BY PHYSICS: an unsupported trace fades, so an abandoned site loses its marks and the attraction pull that rides them rather than persisting forever. The weathering rate is RESERVED, surfaced with basis: the recalcitrant-lignin decomposition timescale of a nut shell (nut-shell material persists years to decades in soil, far slower than the soft-tissue carrion the global fixture rate models); a dev value 1/50 proves the mechanism, the owner sets the real rate. Byte-neutral (opt-in, unarmed the matter cycle is inert): crucible `254bc17c` (17 world_build + 3 world_determinism green), default `run_world` `a465919e9825007c1ff876c03e4877ea` unchanged, 675 lib + all integration tests green, clippy clean.

COMPOSED FREE RUN (attempted, three frictions surfaced honestly, reverted): the closing demonstration composes the whole loop on ONE runner (World lifecycle AND Embodiment on one tick): maker discovers and eats oilseed, its byproduct leaves a durable `spent_hull` (B), the maker re-earns the belief (C1/C2) and dies by pillar-1 per-tick mortality, the hull persists and weathers (D), and a co-present younger being never taught (gossip off) re-earns the SAME belief from ITS OWN felt reward at the trace. The composed test hit three compounding integration frictions in the novel `world.spawn` + embodiment + per-tick-mortality composition, none of them a defect in the proven pieces: (1) a TEMPERATURE conflict, the uniform field temperature that keeps beings comfortable (the C2 test used 37) is below the 273 barrier the hull needs to weather, and one uniform field cannot satisfy being-comfort and hull-weathering at once; (2) STARVATION under two-being competition, only one of two co-present beings eats the single oilseed source per tick, so the other drains and dies before it re-earns; (3) a NEUTRAL belief, a being whose energy is dropping feels no reward and forms a neutral (value 0) rather than a REWARDS (value 1) belief. I reverted the composed test rather than force a fragile fixture, kept the weathering test, and surfaced the frictions to the gate.

STOPPED: weathering test + the two handoff docs committed and pushed to `claude/lifetime-demography`; reported to the gate on PR #97. NEXT: the gate rules between (a) accepting the trace loop proven-in-pieces (B deposit, C1 percept, C2 re-earn, C3 approach, each falsifier-backed) plus weathering as slice D's demonstration and closing the arc, or (b) directing the composed run's shape to resolve the three frictions (a per-cell temperature field so a warm weathering cell sits beside a comfortable being cell, per-being sheltering, a single-being run, or a differently balanced food supply). Then the arc is done: fully-blind audit + PR merge, and the RELATIONAL-belief substrate arc (TODOS #83) follows. R-OVERLAP-NE stays flagged (census untouched). EMERGENCE LINE HELD throughout: the trace is physical and re-earned, the weathering keys off the hull's own composition never a tag, the belief is re-earned from felt reward never handed, heritable drives (the attraction weight included) stay founder-zero.

## 2026-07-06 (still later): pillar-2 trace C2 SIGNED OFF, C3 (the reward-attraction gradient, the behaviour) LANDED and reported; only slice D remains to close the arc

The gate signed off C2 (SENSE + LEARN), verified byte-neutral two ways (crucible `254bc17c` and a branch-vs-main `run_world` diff both `30d2358c`), and green-lit C3. I flagged the C3 ROUTING SEAM (the `attraction_gradient` function is an exact mirror of `avoidance_gradient`, but the run-path routing is not: avoidance uses CONDITION's dead direction slot and reward has no dead reserve slot). The gate ruled OPTION (b), a dedicated attraction-direction input, and VERIFIED my premise (the ENERGY slot's `field_dirs` merge OVERRIDES, so routing there would destroy the live food-source memory).

C3 (`fa427e7`, reported, awaiting the C3 gate): the reward-ATTRACTION gradient, the behaviour half, the exact sign-flipped mirror of harm avoidance. `attraction_gradient` (`learn.rs`) adds an inverse-distance vector TOWARD each neighbour cell whose material signature the being holds a committed REWARDS belief about (reconstructing the C2 LEARN's `MATERIAL_FEATURE_CHANNEL_BASE`-offset subject). Routed into a DEDICATED 2-component attraction-direction input: `ControllerLayout` grows an `n_attraction` block (`with_percepts_appetitive_material_and_attraction`, after the material block, disabled = byte-identical) gated on a new `Embodiment::attraction` bool + `set_attraction`; the runner precomputes each being's unit gradient (gated on `emb.attraction` + the reward learner armed) and feeds it via an appetitive-style per-being map through `step_with_field_dirs` / `build_input_full`. Founder-zero. Proven by `a_being_steers_toward_a_believed_rewarding_trace_only_through_an_evolved_attraction_weight` (run path: the being with the evolved attraction weight steers east toward a hull region, the founder-zero one stays put, the exact mirror of the harm avoider) plus the gradient-function and layout tests, all opt-in and hash-neutral (crucible `254bc17c`, `run_world` `a465919e`, 675 lib + all integration tests green).

STOPPED: C3 pushed and reported; holding for the gate's C3 sign-off before building slice D (the gate said "gate at C3"). NEXT: trace slice D, which CLOSES the arc: arm the matter cycle so the `spent_hull` weathers (any weathering rate surfaced reserved-with-basis), and the combined free-run persistence demonstration (a technique discovered by one being persists past its death into later generations that re-earn it from the physical trace via the C2 LEARN + C3 approach, while the population sustains with overlapping ages, pillar 1). Then the arc is done: fully-blind audit + PR merge. R-OVERLAP-NE stays flagged (census untouched). EMERGENCE LINE HELD throughout: the trace is physical and re-earned; the percept exposes only the opaque substance signature; the belief is re-earned from felt reward, never handed; heritable drives (the attraction weight included) stay founder-zero.

## 2026-07-06 (later still): PILLAR 1 COMPLETE (1c signed off); pillar-2 trace C1 (material percept) + C2 (SENSE + LEARN) LANDED and reported; C3 (attraction gradient) is next, gated on the C2 sign-off

Continued the lifetime/demography keystone on PR #97, slice by slice, each gate-gated on byte-neutrality and the emergence line.

PILLAR 1 CLOSED. Slice 1c (`28d9e94`, SIGNED OFF): the overlapping-generations demonstration. `overlapping_generations_stagger_the_dawn_and_sustain_a_mixed_age_population` (reproduction.rs) runs a dozen cadences from a staggered founder dawn with per-tick birth AND mortality armed, asserting the population sustains, TRUE turnover (new births AND founder deaths, not the initial stagger frozen), offspring credited to the census, the living spanning multiple age classes crossing a full cadence, and bit-for-bit replay. Test-only, byte-neutral by construction. So pillar 1 (1a mortality, 1b birth, 1c demo) is done: individual lifespan is decoupled from the cadence, a knower can outlive to teach.

PILLAR 2 TRACE, seam B (the percept mismatch) ruled OPTION 1 by the gate and WIDENED beyond the hull (it also unblocks the nutrition `feature_subject` path and material granularity, from the gate's granite-beside-oilseed experiment). Built as C1 + C2:
- C1 (`16be89f`, SIGNED OFF): a new module `material_percept.rs`, the `MaterialField` sibling of the biology-class feature percept: `MaterialPerceptRegistry::perceive(cell)` reads each declared substance's opaque raw volume, EMPTY by default (hash-neutral), unit-proven (granite/oilseed/spent_hull distinguishable).
- C2 (`f190632`, reported, awaiting the gate's C2 gate): the SENSE half (`ControllerLayout` grows a material-feature block after the appetitive block; `Embodiment::set_material_percepts`; `step_with_field_dirs` threads the material registry+field, extends the snapshot gate, feeds the percept into the controller input) and the LEARN half (`couple_conversation` routes `reward_observations` onto the run path, feature-keyed on the material composition with `REWARD_ATTR`). Both sub-seams RULED: sub-seam 1 (disjoint channel base) taken now via a `channel_base` param on `reward_observations` + `MATERIAL_FEATURE_CHANNEL_BASE = 1<<15`; sub-seam 2 (the reward-attraction gradient mirrors `avoidance_gradient`, so the behaviour is its own slice C3). Run-path proof `a_being_re_earns_a_material_trace_reward_belief_from_its_own_felt_reward` (a primed being re-earns the belief from felt reward; founder-zero forms none) plus the layout + channel-base tests, all opt-in and hash-neutral (crucible `254bc17c`, default `run_world` `a465919e` unchanged, 672 lib tests green).

STOPPED: C2 pushed and reported; holding for the gate's C2 sign-off before wiring C3 (the gate said "gate at C2 and again at C3"). NEXT: C3, the reward-ATTRACTION gradient, the positive mirror of `avoidance_gradient` (feature-keyed on material composition, a REWARDS belief produces an inverse-distance attraction vector toward the believed-rewarding neighbour cell, evolved-weighted, founder-zero, sign flipped from harm repulsion); ground it against `avoidance_gradient` for an exact mirror, re-flag if it cannot be. Then trace slice D: arm the matter cycle so the hull weathers + the combined free-run demonstration (a technique persists past its maker into later generations that re-earn it), which closes the arc. ## 2026-07-06 (later): LIFETIME / DEMOGRAPHY keystone building on PR #97; the gate corrected BOTH seams and signed off four slices; pillar-1 staggering (1a mortality, 1b birth) and pillar-2 trace (A substance, B deposit) all LANDED, hash-neutral

The gate's rulings reshaped both seams and the build proceeded slice by slice, each gated on byte-neutrality and the emergence line.

SEAM 1 (Ne under overlapping generations): the gate first proposed a breeder-restricted census, then relayed a panel premise that the census "counts juveniles at k=0, inflating variance_k". I AUDITED THE INPUT against the real code (the prime directive) and it did NOT hold: both moment paths already skip `k==0` (`drift_pools` world.rs:2258, `ReproductiveCensus::moments` census.rs:379). The gate verified the catch and WITHDREW the fix; the census is untouched. The open Ne question (Hill 1972 age-structured Ne, and the full-mature-cohort-N reading) is flagged as R-OVERLAP-NE, not patched. Interim: per-generation drift + census stands as the drift-event-rate-preserving approximation.

SEAM 2 (persistence mechanism): the gate REVERSED twice and landed on the correct form. The belief-pool residue (place-anchored store) was rejected as "ether" (a belief floating in a place with no physical carrier crosses the emergence line). The corrected mechanism is a PHYSICAL TRACE: an enacted technique deposits a durable byproduct (spent hulls) into the MaterialField; a later being perceives the mark and RE-EARNS the belief by correlating it with its own felt reward, the same way harm is learned from a ground-feature; the trace weathers by material decay. Three channels (gossip = present belief, observation = present action, trace = past action's physical mark) all only BIAS; the being's own reward is the sole gate. I reverted the belief-pool slice (2a `summarize_residue`) accordingly.

LANDED, each opt-in and hash-neutral when unarmed (crucible + default `run_world` `a465919e9825007c1ff876c03e4877ea` byte-identical):
- PILLAR 1 slice 1a (SIGNED OFF): per-tick staggered mortality. `arm_per_tick_mortality` + `per_tick_mortality_step`/`cull_per_tick`; deaths spread across the cadence instead of a synchronous cull, mean turnover preserved, replays bit-identical.
- PILLAR 1 slice 1b (SIGNED OFF): per-tick staggered birth with the per-birth draws re-keyed to the birth tick. `arm_per_tick_birth` + `per_tick_birth_step`; `reproduce` computes a `coord` (birth tick when staggered, generation otherwise), a per-pair bearing gate scaled by `1/life_cadence_ticks`, and keys `reproductively_eligible` and `birth` off `coord`.
- PILLAR 2 trace slice A (SIGNED OFF): the `spent_hull` byproduct substance in `ground_floor.toml` (density 1200, fracture_strength 12, mineral_ash 0.015, decomposition_barrier 273, no energy), cited real data, inert until deposited. Seam A (a new substance was needed) resolved by it.
- PILLAR 2 trace slice B (LANDED here, gate green-lit the WIRE): the deposit hook. `Embodiment` carries a data-driven `byproducts: BTreeMap<String,(String,Fixed)>` (empty default, `set_byproducts`); `geophage` accumulates eaten volume per substance and deposits `fraction * eaten_volume` of the mapped byproduct into the cell underfoot after the harm-half, canonical id order. Reads only the eaten substance id and the map, never a belief or kind (Principle 9). Conservation is honest and narrow: the deposit is exact, bounded, deterministic, proportional to what was eaten (a located source at the ingest boundary, symmetric to the sink a bite already is), and does not tax the being's assimilation (armed gain == unarmed gain). Fraction is world data surfaced reserved-with-basis (shell:kernel mass ratio through the two densities). Proven by `the_geophage_enact_deposits_a_spent_hull_trace_and_is_inert_unarmed` (physiology_embodiment.rs); fmt/clippy clean.

STOPPED: slice B pushed and reported to the gate on PR #97. NEXT, both green-lit: (1) trace slice C is GATED on the PERCEPT SEAM (seam B): the trace lives in the MaterialField but harm-style feature learning reads the disjoint ResourceField/Composition; the recommendation is to build a per-substance MaterialField feature percept so the hull is a distinct sensed feature the reward learner keys on (revive `reward_observations` onto the run path). Flag it to the gate before building slice C. (2) pillar 1 slice 1c: retire the synchronous founder cohort, stagger the dawn, demonstrate overlapping ages (closes pillar 1). Then trace slice D (arm weathering + free-run demo). EMERGENCE LINE HELD throughout: demography is authored biology (reserved-with-basis); the trace is physical and re-earned, never a handed conclusion; heritable drives stay founder-zero.

## 2026-07-06: VIABILITY ARC MERGED to main; gate RE-SEQUENCED the next arc to the LIFETIME / DEMOGRAPHY keystone (ahead of the relational substrate); grounded both pillars, opened PR #97 with the slice split and TWO flagged seams, holding for the gate's ruling before the build

THE VIABILITY ARC IS MERGED (PR #96 -> main at a2bd629). The gate signed it off (ruling B satisfied by the Baldwin disposition-sweep) and merged the whole chain: reward-credit timing fix, graded reproductive vigor, belief-key consistency fix, the demonstration.

THE GATE RE-SEQUENCED. The relational-belief substrate (TODOS #83) now waits BEHIND a new keystone: the LIFETIME / DEMOGRAPHY arc, on branch claude/lifetime-demography (off merged main), PR #97. Why: a blind panel found, and the gate verified, that the whole social-cognitive layer (feature-keyed nutrition learning, observe-and-imitate, gossip) is bottlenecked by synchronous cohort death (a knower dies before it can teach) and belief-erasure at death (discovery resets each generation). The Baldwin sweep was the same seam: the durable form was the selected disposition because the belief could not outlive the individual. The keystone gives discovery TIME and MEMORY.

GROUNDED both pillars against the merged source (two Explore agents) and wrote docs/working/LIFETIME_DEMOGRAPHY_HANDOFF.md (the full grounded scope + slice split + seams), committed and opened PR #97 with the plan in the body. PILLAR 1 (overlapping generations): World::life_cadence (world.rs:2062) runs the whole lifecycle atomically per generation; reconcile_lifecycle (runner.rs:3535) already runs EVERY tick and tolerates off-cadence births/deaths; mortality already keys on AGE (staggering-safe); the per-birth draws (REPRODUCE, two MATE_CHOICE, V_E offset) key on generation and must re-key on the birth tick under staggering; drift (EVOLVE) is safe if it stays one event per generation. PILLAR 2 (cultural persistence): a reward belief is a per-being (sequence_subject, REWARD_ATTR) frame in Mind.beliefs, erased at death (remove_being drops the Mind); belief_pools (PlaceId-keyed) SURVIVES death but is designed-and-dormant (no ingest from Mind.beliefs on the live run); gossip already carries committed reward beliefs between the living and dies with the last co-located holder; a newborn gets an empty Mind (the guard against authored appetite). The gap sits between the place-anchored store that survives death and the per-being gossip that dies with its holder.

PROPOSED SLICE SPLIT (opt-in, hash-neutral when unarmed): pillar 2 FIRST (seam-independent, demonstrable on the current lifecycle): 2a READ the belief-residue summary (fold co-located minds' committed beliefs into the place pool, content-blind), 2b WIRE the residue beat + decay + re-instantiation via consider, 2c reader + free-run demo. Pillar 1 (gated on seam 1): 1a per-tick staggered mortality, 1b per-tick staggered birth (re-key per-birth draws to the birth tick), 1c staggered dawn + overlapping-age demo.

TWO SEAMS FLAGGED for the gate before the build (this is why I proposed rather than built): SEAM 1 (gate before slice 1b): the effective size under overlapping generations. Drift's Ne (census.rs:238) is Wright-Fisher (assumes discrete generations); overlapping generations mix ages in the census window and change the reproductive variance, so the correct Ne is the age-structured Hill 1972 Ne over the life table. Recommended interim: keep per-generation drift + census as an approximation that preserves the drift-event rate, flag the Hill Ne as a new R-item. SEAM 2 (a recommendation): the persistence mechanism. Recommended the PLACE-RESIDUE (reuses the substrate that already survives death, content-blind, falsifiable via existing decay) over BIRTH INHERITANCE (authoring-prone: seeding a newborn a committed belief hands down a conclusion with no evidence, crossing the emergence line).

EMERGENCE LINE HELD: demography is authored biology (reserved-with-basis numbers); persistence is general over any committed belief (moves opaque BeliefKeys, names no reward attr or food sequence); heritable drives STAY founder-zero (no bootstrapping the baseline). ACCEPTANCE: a technique discovered by one being persists past its death into later generations that did not rediscover it, population sustains with overlapping ages, opt-in and hash-neutral, crucible byte-identical.

PROGRESS (same session, PR #97): the gate ruled both seams and iterated fast. SEAM 1 (Ne): the per-generation interim confirmed (an independent Ne read verified it keeps genetic turnover intact for strong selection); REFINED to restrict the census moments to the ACTUAL BREEDERS at slice 1b (filter near-zero-k juveniles and post-reproductives so variance_k reads the breeding cohort, recovering a Ne close to true); the age-structured Hill 1972 Ne stays the flagged R-item R-OVERLAP-NE (in TODOS, for the owner to sequence into docs/design.md), and a life-history-coupling FEEDBACK was named (a heritable trait altering lifespan shifts census composition, inflating variance_k, collapsing Ne, a loop; this arc changes life history by construction, so the R-item matters more here). SEAM 2 (persistence): the gate first affirmed the place-residue, then CORRECTED it (an independent four-worker panel + the owner): the belief_pool is fundamentally ETHER for cross-generational persistence (seed_belief hands a pre-formed conclusion a being receives without perceive/act/reward, shortcutting the percept-to-reward loop the empty-Mind default protects); the belief_pool stays valid for its aggregate-tier purpose, but drawing an INDIVIDUAL cross-generational belief from it is rejected. Pillar 2 is now a PHYSICAL TRACE: an enacted technique deposits a durable byproduct substance (spent hulls) into the MaterialField; a being perceives it and re-earns the belief by correlating it with felt reward the same way harm is learned from a ground-feature; the trace weathers by material decay (falsifiability by physics). Three channels, one grounded loop: gossip (present belief), observation (present action), trace (past action's mark), all only BIAS, the being's own reward the sole gate.

LANDED THIS SESSION on claude/lifetime-demography: pillar 1 SLICE 1A (per-tick staggered mortality, opt-in, arm_per_tick_mortality), SIGNED OFF by the gate (byte-identical unarmed, crucible 254bc17c, default a465919e; armed, deaths stagger across the cadence and replay; proven by per_tick_mortality_staggers_deaths_within_the_cadence_and_replays). Slice 2a (the belief-pool summarize_residue) was built then REVERTED (commit 16179a6) per the Seam-2 correction. A trace-grounding Explore agent is running (the geophage deposit hook, the reward-side feature-observation for re-learning, the matter-cycle weathering, and whether a new byproduct substance is a flagged seam).

MORE PROGRESS (same session): pillar 1 slices 1a (staggered mortality) AND 1b-birth (per-tick staggered birth + the per-birth-draw re-keying to the birth tick, arm_per_tick_birth) are BOTH SIGNED OFF (commits 6cb9439, 1a81af4; opt-in, byte-identical unarmed, crucible 254bc17c, default a465919e, both replay). Two things surfaced to the gate, AWAITING RULING: (1) a CENSUS INPUT-AUDIT FINDING (PR #97 comment 4897763573): the gate's Ne-read cheap fix (restrict census moments to breeders) is ALREADY IN THE CODE. Both moment-building paths already skip k==0 (drift_pools world.rs:2258; ReproductiveCensus::moments census.rs:379), so k_bar/variance_k/n/sex-split are already over successful breeders (k>0) and juveniles (always k=0, cannot reproduce) are already excluded. The read's premise (juveniles inflate variance_k) does not match the code. The real Ne effect under per-tick birth is the POISSON fecundity variance (a pair bears 0/1/2+ per window, mean 1, variance ~1) vs the deterministic per-cadence 1, which is arguably correct continuous-breeding demography, not a juvenile artifact. Asked the gate: nothing, or the opposite change (count the full mature cohort including k=0 non-breeders, the classic Crow-Kimura N, a modelling-semantics call tied to R-OVERLAP-NE), or something I missed. Did NOT implement a redundant/wrong census change. (2) The PHYSICAL-TRACE SLICE SPLIT (scope doc + proposal): grounded against the geophage enact (deposit hook runner.rs:1424), MaterialField::deposit (material.rs:534), the harm learner + the test-only reward_observations (learn.rs:454, the re-learning model), step_matter_cycle (weathering), and the material floor. Proposed slices A (spent_hull byproduct substance, data), B (deposit hook, opt-in), C (trace percept + reward-side feature observation), D (weathering + demo). TWO SEAMS flagged: (A, anticipated) a new spent_hull substance is needed; (B, the crux) the trace lives in the MaterialField but the harm-style feature learning reads the disjoint ResourceField and NO per-substance MaterialField feature percept exists, so recommend building one before slice C.

WHERE IT STOPPED: 1a + 1b-birth SIGNED OFF; census finding + trace slice split surfaced, awaiting the gate's rulings. NEXT (both green-lit): pillar 1 slice 1c (retire the synchronous founder cohort, stagger the dawn, demonstrate overlapping ages, closing pillar 1); pillar 2 trace slice A (the spent_hull substance, data, hash-neutral) then B onward, once the gate confirms the trace slice split and rules on the percept seam (B). TODOS task #85 tracks this arc; #83 (relational substrate) is re-sequenced behind it.

## 2026-07-06: GRADED REPRODUCTIVE-VIGOR COUPLING landed (gate ruled path 2) + BELIEF-KEY consistency fix folded in; the SELECTION SWEEP works (the heritable exploration propensity sweeps to ~65% with no crash); the reward-BELIEF count peaks ~30% then fades into habit (reward-as-recovery), reported to the gate

THE GATE RULED PATH 2: couple the seed-hunger to a GRADED reproductive cost rather than a hard death, so a hungry being reproduces LESS (an eater out-reproduces a non-eater) and selection spreads the eating lineage without the mass-starvation crash; fold in the belief-key bug this pass; keep it a labelled dev fixture; report the curve. DONE and reported.

MECHANISM LANDED (commit 8472cdc, opt-in, byte-identical unarmed). World gains a per-being `reproductive_vigor` map, a probability the reproduce beat reads as a being's per-generation eligibility to pair, gated by a draw under `Phase::MATE_CHOICE` on a dedicated slot (`SLOT_REPRO_VIGOR`, keyed on the being and the generation, no collision with the mate-preference draws). Empty by default and a being with no entry pairs unconditionally, so the crucible and every unarmed run take NO vigor draw and reproduce byte for byte. The Runner gains an opt-in `ReproductiveVigorCalib` and a `couple_reproductive_vigor` beat that feeds each embodied being's vigor from its coupled reserve level before the world tick: `vigor = floor + (1 - floor) * reserve_level`, so a well-fed being reproduces at full rate and a depleted one bottoms out at the floor (graded, not sterile). RESERVED with basis: the floor (the minimum viable per-generation reproduction rate the demography sustains). Emergence line held: a physiology-and-selection gradient, not an authored technique.

BELIEF-KEY CONSISTENCY FIX folded in (same commit). `candidate_weight` (discovery.rs) looked up the reward belief on the candidate's affordance-CHANNEL-keyed subject, while the reward credit, `appetitive_salience`, the planner, and the surprise read all commit and read it on the PRIMITIVE-only subject (`target_bucket` zero). The mismatch meant a formed belief never fed back into candidate selection except on channel zero, masked in the single-channel viability world. `candidate_weight` now looks up on the primitive-only subject, consistent across the whole ideation loop, so a learned primitive is preferred against every present target. The one discovery test that encoded the old per-channel semantics was updated to the corrected generalising semantics.

PROVED: a new reproduction test (`graded_reproductive_vigor_scales_reproduction_and_is_inert_at_full`) shows the vigor gradient is monotone (full == unarmed, half > 0 > zero == 0), byte-identical at full vigor, and replays bit for bit. The `the_viability_loop_closes` primed test still forms REWARDS; every harm-learning test unchanged; the crucible `world_build` 17 + `world_determinism` 3 byte-identical; the default unarmed `run_world` byte-identical at a465919e; the full sim suite (665 lib + all integration) green; fmt and clippy clean.

DEMONSTRATION COMMITTED (330df54, opt-in `--scenario viability`, default byte-identical). The seed reserves are made NON-LETHAL (an empty seed reserve is HUNGER, not death) and the runner arms the vigor coupling keyed on SEED_ENERGY with floor 1/2. THE CURVE (seed 11, 6 races, 10 bands, 100 generations, saved scratchpad/sweep_v4.txt): population stays large and STABLE, 57 to 75, NO crash (the graded cost retired the mass-starvation collapse of the lethal variant); the heritable EXPLORATION propensity SWEEPS off founder-zero to ~65% of the population, 2 to 49 beings, monotone (this IS the selection working, the eating lineage spreading); the reward-BELIEF count rises off zero, takes off ~generation 24 to 30, PEAKS near 30% (15 to 16 of ~54) around generation 40, then FADES to ~1% by generation 100. The fade is reward-as-recovery from the SATIATION side: as eating spreads, the swept-in eater population becomes well-fed, the geophage bite is satisfaction-capped, so a satiated eater feels no reserve RISE and lets the belief lapse. Robust to oilseed abundance (12 vs 100 per cell give the same curve; the bite is satiation-capped, so the standing supply does not change per-being intake; the population's food pressure is the ENERGY carrying capacity, not the seed).

THE HONEST FINDING (reported to the gate): the durable form of the discovered technique is the SELECTED behavioural DISPOSITION (the heritable exploration propensity, which sweeps to ~65%), not the momentary reward BELIEF (a transient learning scaffold that peaks during the discovery phase and fades into habit once the trait is fixed and the population is well-fed). The reward-belief COUNT, as an instantaneous state, is inherently bounded by food pressure and cannot climb to the whole population under the current substrate, because a reward is a felt RISE and a satiated being feels none. Making the belief COUNT itself sweep and hold would need the belief to PERSIST once formed (not decay when the being is later well-fed) or to be HERITABLE / TRANSMITTED (a child learns "eating pays off" from a parent), both design decisions surfaced to the gate.

TWO BLIND-PANEL FINDINGS DEFERRED (gate's instruction, handoff note only, mixed-world work, NOT built this pass): (1) a NUTRITION / EDIBILITY affordance-percept, so a being perceives a thing's food value as an affordance channel rather than the demonstration seeding an oilseed-backed reserve; (2) keying the reward belief on the target's QUANTIZED PERCEIVED-SCALAR VALUE at the just-noticeable difference rather than the affordance channel index (or the primitive alone), so "strike a HARD thing" and "strike a SOFT thing" diverge as distinct learned actions. The belief-key fix landed this pass makes the whole loop consistently primitive-keyed; the value-at-JND keying is the principled refinement that supersedes it.

WHERE IT STOPPED: mechanism + belief-key fix + demonstration committed and pushed to claude/viability-world; the curve reported to the gate on PR #96. THE GATE SIGNED OFF THE VIABILITY ARC (comment after 4897208130): ruling B is satisfied by the disposition-sweep, which the gate framed as the BALDWIN EFFECT (learning discovers the technique, differential reproduction fixates the heritable disposition, and once eating is innate the learning fades into instinct; the durable form of a discovered technique is the selected disposition, a deeper result than a belief count climbing). The gate reproduced the exact curve, verified the graded vigor is clean and opt-in (crucible 254bc17c, default a465919e), the belief-key fix folded in and verified, and the re-proof green. The gate said it now runs the arc's final verification and directs the transition to the RELATIONAL-belief substrate (TODOS task #83, owner-sequenced). HOLDING for that kickoff.

FORWARD-LOOKING NOTES the gate flagged for the SOCIAL / mixed-world arc (record these; the next arc needs them): the two deferred addons from this pass (a nutrition/edibility affordance-percept so a being perceives a thing's food value; keying the reward belief on the target's quantized perceived-scalar VALUE at the just-noticeable difference rather than the affordance channel or the primitive alone), PLUS THREE learning-channel designs the gate's blind panels produced, for the mixed-world arc: (1) individual feature-keyed nutrition learning, (2) observational imitation, (3) a lifetime-budget analysis (still running at the time of sign-off). These are the belief-persistence / heritability / transmission levers I surfaced, now sequenced by the gate into the social arc rather than bolted onto the viability demonstration.

## 2026-07-06: REWARD-CREDIT TIMING FIX landed + re-proven (gate ruled path 1); the fix WORKS (the free-run reward-belief count now rises off zero); the full selection SWEEP hits a reward-as-recovery tension, flagged to the gate

THE GATE RULED PATH 1: make the record-before-credit fix, re-prove, land the spread, fold in the belief-key bug. THE FIX IS LANDED (commit 9c0912c on claude/viability-world) and re-proven. It moves the eligibility-trace decay-and-record to BEFORE the reward-credit read in couple_conversation (the standard TD-lambda order), so an immediate reserve rise (geophage refills the seed reserve the tick it is enacted) credits the geophage that caused it rather than the previous tick's action. Scoped to the reward-credit path; the harm learner (feature_observations, trace-free) is untouched. RE-PROVED: the_viability_loop_closes still forms REWARDS; the piece-1 reward tests hold; every harm-learning test unchanged; crucible world_build 17 + world_determinism 3 byte-identical; the default unarmed run_world byte-identical at a465919e (the reward learner is inert without arming); fmt/clippy clean. The armed discovery/viability scenarios re-baseline (expected). Reported the fix + re-proof + the demonstration finding to the gate (PR #96 comment 4896477737).

THE FIX WORKS. Before it, every free-run configuration sat at 0 reward beliefs (the timing bug inverted the belief to NEUTRAL). With it, a FREE run (no priming) now forms the "eating pays off" belief and the reader's reward-belief count RISES OFF ZERO at generation 5 and holds at 5 to 9, with exploration lifting off founder-zero ahead of it (5 to 17 beings). Seed 11, 6 races, 10 bands, population growing 72 to 133. The demonstration knobs (all labelled dev fixtures, saved as a local patch scratchpad/viability-demo-v2.patch, NOT pushed): a fast-draining non-lethal seed-CRAVING reserve (id 11, so a well-fed being still feels a supra-noise rise on eating, the reward signal decoupled from the slow survival hunger), a hot exploration mutation (viability_mutation_rate/step 1/8, 1/4), a low reward-noise floor (1e-4, the seed reserve has no metabolic recovery so a small rise is real reward), and a short reward eligibility window (1/8, the seed reward is immediate so it credits the eat that paid off).

THE HONEST LIMIT (traced, not a tuning miss): the count HOLDS at 5 to 9, it does not SWEEP the population. The reward is a RECOVERY signal (a felt reserve RISE), so only a chronically hungry being feels it; a satiated one feels nothing. A large competitive population stays seed-hungry (belief forms), but the LETHAL seed-hunger that would SELECT for eaters crashes the population (founder-zero founders all starve together at the grace, bottleneck to a handful), and the crash REMOVES the food competition that made beings hungry, so the survivors top off and stop feeling reward. Lethal gives selection but destroys the hunger the reward needs; non-lethal keeps the hunger but has no selection. That trade is the crux.

WHERE IT STOPPED: reported to the gate with the data and TWO paths for the sweep, asking which (I do not have a clean third): (1) accept the belief-forms-and-rises-off-zero result as ruling B's demonstration and dock the full sweep as tied to the reward-as-recovery model; (2) give the seed-hunger a GRADED fitness cost (couple reproduction or a survival hazard to the seed reserve) so selection acts WITHOUT the crash, a small MECHANISM addition I flagged for the owner's call before building. HOLDING for the gate's direction. The belief-key bug fix (bucket consistency across candidate_bindings/candidate_weight in discovery.rs, the reward credit in runner.rs, appetitive_salience in learn.rs; plus the generalization-granularity question) is clean and independent and will land in this pass once the sweep path is chosen. The mechanism fix is committed and clean on the branch; the demo config is the local patch only.

## 2026-07-06: VIABILITY mechanism SIGNED OFF; owner ruled B (build the free-run emergent SPREAD); found + verified a reward-credit TIMING seam that blocks the reward-belief climb; reported to gate, holding for direction

The gate SIGNED OFF the viability slice C mechanism proof (the primed-exploration test), so the arc's CORE is accepted. Then the owner RULED B on the spread: he wants to SEE a FREE run (no priming) where the reader's reward-belief count rises off zero and climbs as "eat the oilseed" is discovered and spreads, exploration lifting off founder-zero ahead of it, converging in tens of generations. He cleared WHATEVER dev fixtures/values it takes for speed-to-visible, holding only the emergence line (founders start at zero and DRIFT, no pre-set weight or belief, no hardcoded payoff).

BUILT AND MEASURED (WIP saved at scratchpad/viability-demo-wip.patch, 405 lines; branch reverted to the clean signed-off slice C, nothing pushed). The SELECTION half works: a lethal draining oilseed-backed seed-hunger (a real survival NEED) plus a hot exploration mutation (viability_mutation_rate/step, labelled dev) lifts the founder-zero exploration propensity under selection to ~1.0, the population bottlenecks on the seed-hunger and recovers as an eater lineage, and beings enact geophage on the oilseed. Key run-path facts pinned via two Explore agents: reproduction is survive-to-maturity then mate (NO fitness scorer; selection is differential survival, so eating must feed a LETHAL reserve to be selected), and the seed reserve drain uses the AUTHORED base_drain/death_floor (the oilseed-backed axis is not the ENERGY_DENSITY-backed Kleiber axis, runner.rs:822).

THE BLOCKER (found, then VERIFIED against the tick order, a real seam): the reward BELIEF commits as NEUTRAL, never REWARDS, across every knob combination (geophage-only vs forage world, modest vs abundant oilseed, a fast-draining "seed-craving" reward reserve, a low reward noise floor, exploration to 1.0, bounded stable population). Instrumented the reward pass directly: only ~1 to 4 percent of being-ticks fire a reward, and GEOPHAGE is credited REWARDS:NEUTRAL at ~1:6 (best) to ~1:36 (worst). ROOT CAUSE: reserve_memory.snapshot is at the START of the locomotion beat (locomotion.rs:818); geophage refills the reserve LATER the same tick (runner.rs:3440); the reward pass credits the eligibility trace BEFORE recording this tick's affordance (runner.rs:2714). So a geophage's own felt rise credits the PREVIOUS tick's action; GEOPHAGE gets REWARDS only on CONSECUTIVE geophages, which the primed proof had (ate every tick) but a free intermittent-forage being does not. This is a sibling of the belief-key bug the gate's blind panel just flagged (both latent in the reward-credit path, both masked by the every-tick/single-percept controlled proofs).

PROPOSED FIX (logic verified, not built): record the enacted affordance into the trace BEFORE the reward credit, so an immediate-refill reward credits the action that caused it (a single geophage-rise forms the belief; a real delayed reward still rides the trace decay). It re-rolls every ARMED run's hash and needs the mechanism test re-verified; it touches no unarmed/existing scenario. Reported to the gate on PR #96 (comment 4896073650) with the data and three paths, recommending path 1 (make the reward-credit fix, re-prove, land the spread on top, fold in the belief-key bug as a neighbour). HOLDING for the gate's direction before touching the proven slice-1c mechanism.

ALSO FLAGGED BY THE GATE (addons AFTER the spread lands, not started): (1) the belief-key bug: candidate_bindings/candidate_weight key on target_bucket=channel while the reward credit and appetitive_salience key on target_bucket=0, so the sampler's exploit-bias reads the belief on the wrong key for any percept channel > 0 (masked now by the single FracturePotential percept, channel 0). (2) the generalization-granularity question: the bucket-0 key is "geophage pays off" primitive-only (cannot tell oilseed from granite); the right key should generalize over the target's PHYSICS (perceived affordance-scalar values, bucketed to a JND), an owner-level call.

## 2026-07-06: VIABILITY slice C COMPLETE (the scenario + the mechanism-closes proof); the discovery loop is proven to close end to end on the viability world; awaiting the gate's sign-off on PR #96

SLICE C IS COMPLETE. The viability SCENARIO landed first (commit 6ad12f2): a `--scenario viability` in run_world (sibling of `discovery`, gated on a cfg.viability flag and cfg.armed() = discovery || viability), which uses a viability EmbodimentGenesis (viability_homeostatic = dev_grazer axes plus an oilseed-backed seed-energy reserve; viability_organs = dev_default plus a seed-store organ of "oilseed" so the reserve has capacity; viability_body = mobile_body plus a seed-store Part; AffordanceRegistry::dev_geophage), deposits oilseed in the material field, arms the loop (discovery + reward), and reuses the discovery-emergence reader. A REAL DEFECT was caught by running it: dawn_layout() built forage weights against dev_default registries while the viability embodiment uses dev_geophage + the wider seed-energy homeostatic layout, so the forage weights were MISPLACED and the population starved to zero by generation 2. Fixed by making dawn_layout(cfg) match the embodiment's registries (the STARVATION FIX). The viability world now sustains ~30 to 50 like discovery.

THE MECHANISM-CLOSES PROOF LANDED (commit 4763395, the crux the gate held for). The gate's slice-C read (PR #96) signed off the scenario as sound but HELD the arc: the free run does not close (the gate ran viability at seed 11, 6 races, 12 bands, 80 gens: ~70 of 84 propose, evolve-channels barely drift off zero, 0 enact a matter action, reward-belief count stays 0, the honest half-2 result, emergent drift too slow at this balance), and half 1 (the mechanism proven to close IN A RUN) was missing. Built exactly the primed-exploration proof planned and green-lit: a new lib test `the_viability_loop_closes_a_primed_being_eats_the_oilseed_and_forms_the_reward_belief` (runner.rs), the 2c-2 primed pattern applied to the viability world. A being with a PRIMED exploration propensity, discovery and the reward learner both armed, over a viability embodiment (an oilseed-backed ENERGY reserve, a GEOPHAGE-only affordance registry so every proposal is the eating action, the REAL fracturable oilseed replenished modestly underfoot each tick via PhysicsRegistry::ground()), proposes and enacts GEOPHAGE, eats the seed through the real runtime geophage-and-edibility path, feels its oilseed-backed reserve rise, and its appetitive learner COMMITS a REWARDS belief on the enacted GEOPHAGE sequence, with NO injection. The FALSIFIER is founder-zero: an otherwise identical being with exploration off never enacts, so it never eats, no reserve rises, and no reward belief forms. The chain is airtight: the ONLY backed axis (ENERGY, backed by "oilseed") can rise ONLY by eating oilseed via geophage, so the REWARDS belief on the GEOPHAGE subject can form only through the real eat-and-feel path. So the loop closes end to end (propose, enact, eat, feel, credit, believe) and the rewarded technique emerges only where the enact gate fires, never authored (Principles 8, 9).

VERIFIED. The new test passes; full sim suite green (crucible world_build 17 + world_determinism 3 unchanged); fmt --all --check and clippy -D warnings clean; no new reserved value (the loop reads the shipped DiscoveryCalib/RewardLearningCalib dev fixtures).

BASELINE RECONCILIATION (a stale number corrected, the byte-identity claim intact). The default run_world final state_hash on this branch is a465919e9825007c1ff876c03e4877ea, NOT the 994df6a5 the earlier entries below cite. 994df6a5 was the PRE-MERGE baseline (measured on claude/ideation-activation blind-diffed against a pre-merge main during the activation arc and slices A/B). After PR #95 merged (e82e570, this branch's base), the default is a465919e. Verified byte-identity the rigorous way: built run_world in a detached worktree at origin/main (e82e570) and it produced the IDENTICAL a465919e; the branch produces a465919e and is deterministic (stable across two runs). So the viability slices remain opt-in / hash-neutral (branch default == its base main default); only the specific hash string in my notes was stale. Use a465919e as the viability-branch default going forward.

WHERE IT STOPPED. Slice C is complete (scenario + mechanism proof), pushed to claude/viability-world (PR #96), and presented to the gate with the mechanism-closes result. Awaiting the gate's sign-off of the arc's mechanism (the gate said: "Land that and I sign off the arc's mechanism; the free-run spread stays the owner's balance to tune"). The balance knobs stay flagged for the owner (oilseed's bio.energy_density 25 kJ/g, the seed-energy reserve's drain, accessibility), never tuned to force the spread. SLICE A LANDED (commit e820335, SIGNED OFF): the `oilseed` substance in crates/physics/data/ground_floor.toml, an oil-rich hard-shelled seed, mat.fracture_strength 10 (FracturePotential reads positive, real: nut-shell rupture ~5 to 20 MPa) and bio.energy_density 25 kJ/g (real: tree-nut kernel). Proven by oilseed_reads_a_positive_fracture_potential_and_carries_energy_density.

SLICE B LANDED (commit 709bb76, pushed + presented): geophage now sizes its bite from the cell underfoot PLUS what the being CARRIES (runner.rs geophage, supply = cell + w.carried.volume, taken cell-first then carried), fed through the SAME runtime edibility laws (laws::satisfaction, laws::net_harm) the cell path uses. So extract-then-eat feeds a reserve rise the appetitive learner credits. INPUT-AUDIT flag on PR: edibility::assess is a test-only wrapper (called only in its unit tests); the runtime ingest paths use the floor laws directly on substance ids, and there is no SubstanceMix->Composition bridge for material substrates, so the faithful coupling extends the geophage runtime laws to read carried rather than forcing the assess wrapper. The gate green-lit "keep building ahead." Hash-neutral (carried matter that backs no reserve reads zero supply): full sim suite green (664 lib, crucible 17+3, every geophage/carry fixture), default run_world 994df6a5, fmt/clippy clean. Proven by geophage_eats_the_carried_oilseed_and_feeds_the_reserve (a being carrying oilseed with an oilseed-backed reserve eats what it carries, energy rises, carried spent, no injection).

KEY MODELLING FACT for slice C (grounded in B): a geophage-fed reserve gets its CAPACITY from a TISSUE whose composition axis matches the backing substance (the brackish fixture's "mineral-store" tissue is composed of "brackish"; the oilseed test's "seed-store" of "oilseed"). So the viability embodiment needs a reserve backed by "oilseed" AND a seed-store organ (TissueComposition::from_pairs(&[("oilseed", ONE)])) so the reserve has room to eat into. Physiology::dev_for_registry then requires+assimilates the backing substance automatically.

SLICE C (NEXT, the viability scenario + the mechanism-closes proof): a `--scenario viability` in run_world (sibling of `discovery`, gated on a cfg.viability flag), which (1) uses a custom EmbodimentGenesis: a HomeostaticRegistry adding an oilseed-backed reserve to dev_grazer's axes, and a BodyPlanRegistry + body plan with a seed-store organ so that reserve has capacity (run_world helpers: embodiment_genesis() run_world.rs:554, mobile_body() run_world.rs:484, organs BodyPlanRegistry::dev_default; model on the physiology_embodiment brackish/seed setup); (2) deposits oilseed in the material field (like the discovery scenario deposits granite); (3) arms the loop (reuse the cfg.discovery arming block); (4) reuses the discovery-emergence reader (already shows the reward-belief count). ACCEPTANCE (two halves, the gate's): (1) prove the MECHANISM closes IN A RUN, a being with drifted-or-PRIMED exploration enacts extract-then-eat oilseed, feels a reserve rise through the real path, and the reward learner commits a REWARDS belief (the reader's reward-belief count rises off zero, NO injection) - a PRIMED-exploration mechanism test (the slice-2c-2 primed pattern) is the reliable proof since emergent drift is slow; (2) report the SPREAD observed over a long run and FLAG the balance knobs for the owner (oilseed nutritive value, drain-vs-non-drain of the reserve, accessibility) rather than tuning to force it. HOLD THE EMERGENCE LINE: no pre-formed belief, no pre-set exploration weight in the free run, no hardcoded payoff; the energy is the seed's own physics. Standing build-ahead; the gate gates on PR #96 (subscribed). Then the RELATIONAL-belief substrate follows.

A pure read off the embodiment and the minds, folding nothing.

OBSERVED (6 races/12 bands/60 gens): about 40 of ~50 propose each snapshot, and exploration/deliberation DRIFT off founder-zero over generations (1, then 2, then 3 beings), the emergent lift now directly observable. Enactions and reward beliefs stay 0, correct without a payoff (enaction is a per-tick draw off a barely-lifted weight, and no reserve rise reinforces anything). NEXT (owner-sequenced, not started): (1) the VIABILITY SCENARIO, the owner's to design against the spec flagged on PR #95: a substance that is at once FRACTURABLE (mat.fracture_strength, so FracturePotential reads positive) and NUTRITIVE on ingestion (positive bio.energy_density, so ingesting the extracted matter feeds a reserve rise through edibility::assess and the metabolic path, which is_reward_tick reads as reward and the learner credits toward a REWARDS belief), in a population-sustaining world; plus the one open coupling (wire the enacted STRIKE/EXTRACT to deposit ingestible spoil the being then ingests through edibility, to close the reward loop). (2) The RELATIONAL-belief substrate (multi-hop planning, insight and cross-domain innovation lifting piece 4). Slice 2 is built to that scope and pushed (commit 7fa287e on claude/ideation-activation, PR #95).

WHAT LANDED (run_world.rs + a new scenarios/discovery.toml). The `discovery` scenario, keyed off its NAME in parse_config (`cfg.discovery`), and ONLY it: (1) seeds the two evolve-channel loci (Exploration, Deliberation) at genesis in full_race via append_scalar_channel, founder-zero, so the propensities evolve off zero under selection (opt-in genome growth, its own re-baselined world, the B2b norm); (2) deposits an INERT fracturable ground (granite on every one of the 768 cells via MaterialField::deposit at Coord3::ground(x,y), the registry PhysicsRegistry::ground()), authored environment (Principle 9); (3) installs the affordance-percept registry (AffordancePerceptRegistry::from_kinds(&[FracturePotential]) + AffordancePerceptRefs::dev_refs()) on the embodiment and calls runner.set_discovery(DiscoveryCalib::dev_default()) + set_reward_learning(RewardLearningCalib::dev_default()). WHICH action emerges from selection, never authored.

Founder-zero holds and then EVOLVES: every founder starts at exploration zero and the weight drifts off zero under selection by about generation 15 (one being, several by 45), the emergent activation. The arming does not harm survival (an unarmed run at the same small config collapses the same way, so the small-world population dip is its own dynamics, not the loop). Armed run replays bit-for-bit. world_build 17 + world_determinism 3 green, fmt --all --check and clippy -D warnings clean, no new reserved value (founder-zero structural; the loop reads the shipped DiscoveryCalib/RewardLearningCalib dev fixtures under Development).

NO PAYOFF AUTHORED (the line held): breaking granite feeds no reserve, so no rewarded technique emerges here, and that is correct. The VIABILITY-WORLD SPEC was flagged to the gate precisely (PR #95 comment): a viability world needs a substance that is at once (1) FRACTURABLE (carries mat.fracture_strength so FracturePotential reads positive), (2) NUTRITIVE on ingestion (positive bio.energy_density so edibility::assess measures positive net_nutrition and the metabolic path turns it into an energy reserve rise, which is_reward_tick reads as reward and the reward learner credits toward a REWARDS belief), and (3) deposited in a population-sustaining world (6 races / 12 bands sustains; 3 races collapses). The one open mechanism coupling for the viability design (not slice 2): wiring the enacted STRIKE/EXTRACT to deposit ingestible spoil the being then ingests through edibility::assess, so the reward closes the loop (the extraction contest and geophagy ingest-through-edibility paths already exist).

## 2026-07-06: ACTIVATION slice 1b CORRECTED to hash-neutral (the re-baseline was a self-inflicted misstep, not the grow-from-genome norm); root cause pinned; deep count-dependent-distance property flagged for the owner

THE GATE HELD 1b on a fork: the re-baseline was deterministic but NOT behaviourally inert (by generation 60, 86 of 173 run_world lines differed), and it asked which it is (the accepted grow-from-genome norm, or a regression to fix by counter-keying the shared stream per stable locus-identity) and WHERE the RNG shifts. The answer, pinned against the real code: NEITHER, and it is NOT an RNG shift. The re-roll is a count-dependent DETERMINISTIC reduction, and the universal seeding that triggered it was a self-inflicted misstep (I seeded every genome; the B2b precedent seeds opt-in per race). Corrected: 1b is now HASH-NEUTRAL machinery, run_world byte-identical to main.

ROOT CAUSE (verified, not an RNG-stream leak). Two genetic-distance reductions normalise by the LOCUS COUNT: `GenePool::distance` (genome.rs:1024) is `Sum|dfreq_i| / n` with `n` the loci count, and `mate_choice::genetic_distance` (mate_choice.rs:122) is a mean over loci. Seeding two loci at frequency 1/2 on EVERY genome leaves the numerator unchanged (both pools sit at 0.5, so |dfreq| = 0 for the new loci) but raises the denominator, so every pairwise distance is DILUTED. That dilution feeds `reproductively_isolated` at the cadence-gated speciation gate (epoch.rs:229-255), flipping which founder-forks become daughter species; a single flipped speciation event forks a different pool keyed on `(seed, id, g)` and the whole downstream world cascades. The near-20-generation delay to visible divergence is the reserved `speciation_cadence`. The RNG draws themselves are counter-keyed per locus INDEX over a stateless counter, so appending loci at the END is inert to every existing locus's draw (empirically confirmed earlier: births byte-identical for several generations, only `state_hash` differing from generation 0 because the genome fold covers a longer vector). So fork B's proposed fix (counter-key the shared stream) could not have worked: there is no RNG stream that shifted; the distance arithmetic is deterministic and count-dependent, and counter-keying an RNG draw does not touch it.

B2b WAS OPT-IN, not counter-keyed. Emergent-anatomy morphogen loci were added per race through `Race::with_morphogen`, so existing and free-run scenarios never grew their genome and stayed byte-identical. B2b was inert for existing scenarios because it did not touch them, not because its shared stream was keyed differently from mine. So the norm precedent is opt-in seeding, and my universal seeding broke it.

THE CORRECTION (commit pending on claude/ideation-activation, PR #95). Reverted the universal seeding: removed the `append_scalar_channel` calls and the now-unused import from `run_world.rs:378` and from both crucible fixtures (`world_build.rs` `moving_race` and `morphogen_peoples`). KEPT the machinery: the two `Channel` variants, `append_scalar_channel`, `GeneSet::express_unit`, and the birth-path express blocks at the FOUNDER path (worldbuild.rs:587) and the NEWBORN path (runner.rs:3594), which call `express_unit` on the genome and are inert (return ZERO, draw no RNG) when the genome carries no evolve-channel locus. So 1b adds no world content and every existing scenario replays bit for bit: `run_world` is byte-identical to main (blind-diffed against a merged-main worktree over an 80-generation, 6-race, 12-band run, past the speciation cadence, final state_hash 994df6a5aaf7b2dccde07f801876c21c on both, differing only in the wall-clock timing line). The birth-path WIRE claim is now proven with a PRIMED value by a new focused test `a_founder_expresses_a_primed_evolve_channel_at_the_birth_path` (a founder pool with the exploration locus forced homozygous and positive, deliberation left unseeded, so a founder expresses a positive exploration propensity and a zero deliberation one, proving the block reads the RIGHT channel off the genome), which the unseeded crucible fixtures cannot exercise. The reworded `the_dawn_runner_embodies...` assertion guards the inert case (an unseeded founder expresses zero, the birth path is hash-neutral). world_build 17 (the new test added) plus world_determinism 3 replay- and worker-invariant, 663 sim lib tests green, fmt --all --check and clippy -D warnings clean. No new reserved value.

DEEP PROPERTY FLAGGED FOR THE OWNER (the gate escalated it too). The genetic-distance metric is count-dependent: adding ANY heritable locus that is shared and neutral across the population (identical frequency in both compared pools) dilutes every pairwise distance and perturbs the speciation gate, even though the locus carries no divergence. Two beings that share a new identical-frequency locus should be no more or less distant than before, yet `Sum|dfreq|/n` shrinks because `n` grew. This is a latent fidelity question about whether the distance measure should be robust to shared-neutral loci (for instance normalising by a stable locus identity, or excluding loci identical across the compared pools). It is an owner-level modelling decision (the exact population-genetics measure is already reserved at 25.7 as a fixation-index-versus-Nei-distance choice), and any change to it itself re-rolls every world, so it is surfaced, not touched. The opt-in-seeding correction does not depend on it and does not foreclose it.

NEXT: SLICE 2 seeds AND arms together, opt-in. The evolve-channel loci travel with the discovery arming (an armed scenario seeds the loci through `append_scalar_channel` and installs the affordance-percept registry and calls `Runner::set_discovery`), so an unarmed or existing scenario stays byte-identical and only an armed world grows the genome (and that armed world is a deliberately different world, so its re-baseline is legitimate, the used-loci case B2b's opt-in models). Ground `run_world.rs` and `build_dawn_runner` for the arming site; FLAG A SEAM if arming would AUTHOR behaviour rather than let the evolve-channels lift under selection. Then SLICE 3 (the discovery-emergence reader). Standing build-ahead in force; the gate gates on PR #95 (subscribed).

---

## 2026-07-06: IDEATION arc MERGED to main (PR #94); next arc = ACTIVATE the loop in a running world, on new branch claude/ideation-activation

THE IDEATION / EXPERIENTIAL-DISCOVERY ARC IS MERGED to main (PR #94, merge commit a8b09fb). The gate ran the full transition verification (fmt --all --check and clippy -D warnings clean, 1199 workspace tests green, verify.sh clean, crucible replay-identical at 254bc17c) and merged. All four pieces are in main: a being LEARNS which of its actions pay off (piece 1), DISCOVERS and tries novel ones (piece 2), EXPLORES more where surprised (piece 3), and PURSUES its believed-best action from memory (piece 4), all founder-zero, all emergent, all on the shipped substrate. The session auto-unsubscribed from PR #94 (merged). Full arc detail in the entries below.

THE GATE'S FINER-RESOLUTION FINDING (400-generation, 6-race, 12-band crucible run) that shapes the next arc: the base world is ALIVE and evolving (language drifts as a living system, a word for "I" moved loka->nemi->mi->lo->lomi at about 70% internal consensus; salt tolerance climbs 1.877->~1.98; lineages and a whole race turn over), but the ideation LOOP is DORMANT in the free run, and so is harm-learning: the harness arms neither (no set_discovery, no affordance-percept registry installed), the Walker exploration and deliberation propensities are founder-zero with their evolve-channels still follow-ons, and no scenario makes learned cognition pay off. The experiential mind is built and proven in the acceptance tests but nothing in the running world exercises it. The substrate is deep; the running world is thin.

NEXT ARC (the gate's explicit direction, on a NEW branch claude/ideation-activation and a NEW PR, the owner authorized): ACTIVATE the ideation loop in a running world so its payoff becomes visible. Branch claude/ideation-activation is SET UP from the merged main (origin/main a8b09fb). Three slices, ground each against the real harness, flag a seam if arming discovery in the harness would author behaviour rather than let it emerge:

1. The Channel::Exploration and Channel::Deliberation EVOLVE-CHANNELS: express the two propensities from the genome at the birth path and mutate them on inheritance, founder-zero base, reusing the existing mutation machinery, so a free population evolves them off zero rather than only a primed test being. This owes NO new reserved value (founder-zero base structural, mutation reuses genome.additive_mutation_step), the note made good on here. GROUNDING (verified in main): the pattern is `Channel::X` variant + an append-block at genesis that adds one locus per parameter to the founder gene set, an UNSEEDED locus getting frequency 1/2 and effect ZERO so it EXPRESSES TO ZERO until mutation drifts it (genome::append_controller_block / append_morphogen_block, genome.rs:419/460), expressed via GeneSet::express(genome, Channel::X, env) (genome.rs:377, a founder-zero sum), the effects vector drifted by the existing additive machinery. Exploration and Deliberation are UNIT channels (no param, like Channel::SexDetermination, expressed at world.rs:702). So: add the two variants, append one unseeded locus each to the founder gene set (founder-zero), express each at the birth path (Controller::express site, clamp to [0,1]) into Walker::exploration / Walker::deliberation. HASH-CHANGING (the genome grows two loci, so the crucible re-baselines) but BEHAVIOURALLY inert in an unarmed world (the propensities are expressed but only READ by the discovery enact gates, which are unarmed until slice 2), so prove the re-baseline correct and BLIND-VERIFY it, the emergent-anatomy B2b pattern (grow-from-genome, hash-changing, blind-verified). Read-then-wire: 1a the variants + expression helper (hash-neutral), 1b the genesis seed + birth-path express (hash-changing).
2. ARM the discovery loop in the run harness + a scenario: install the affordance-percept registry and call set_discovery so the loop runs in a free world, opt-in and hash-neutral where unarmed. (run_world.rs / worldbuild.rs the likely sites; ground them.)
3. A DISCOVERY-EMERGENCE READER: report what the population discovered (committed reward beliefs, the actions enacted from exploration), the ideation analogue of the harm-belief-spread reader run_world already prints, so the emergence is observable.

TWO OWNER DECISIONS surfaced by the gate (do not depend on the activation, the owner's morning call): (a) whether a VIABILITY scenario (a world where avoiding harm and discovering useful actions PAYS OFF, so the learned loops emerge under selection) comes next; (b) whether the RELATIONAL-belief substrate (multi-hop planning + cross-domain insight lifting piece 4) or biosphere-into-run is the following arc. The activation is the clear step regardless.

SLICE 1a LANDED (READ, hash-neutral, commit 582443c) and PR #95 OPENED (the activation channel, base main): two UNIT Channel variants (Channel::Exploration, Channel::Deliberation, no param id, like Channel::SexDetermination) and `genome::append_scalar_channel` (appends one UNSEEDED locus feeding a unit channel to a founder gene set, balanced frequency + effect ZERO, so the founder expresses to zero and the existing additive mutation drifts it off zero). Off the run path (genesis does not seed the loci yet), so hash-neutral (crucible unchanged, world_build 16 + world_determinism 3 replay-identical, 663 sim lib tests green, fmt/clippy clean). Proven by `an_unseeded_evolve_channel_locus_is_founder_zero_and_drifts_off_zero`. No new reserved value.

SLICE 1b LANDED (WIRE, hash-changing, re-baselined, commit b9dddee), gate green-lit twice. `GeneSet::express_unit(genome, channel)` (express clamped to [0,1], inert-zero for a gene set without the channel). SEED: `append_scalar_channel` for both channels on the free-run founder pool (run_world.rs:366) and the two embodied crucible fixtures (world_build.rs embodied_peoples + morphogen_peoples). EXPRESS at BOTH birth paths: the FOUNDER path assemble_dawn_embodiment (worldbuild.rs, after Walker::new) and the NEWBORN path embody_newborn (runner.rs:3587), both `walker.exploration = race.genes.express_unit(genome, Channel::Exploration)` and the same for deliberation, so a drifted parent's propensity takes hold in the lineage (a founder-only express would leave every born being at zero). HASH-CHANGING: the seeded pools grow the genome by two founder-zero loci, so the crucible re-baselines from 254bc17c; but every founder EXPRESSES ZERO (a new founder-zero-inert assertion in the_dawn_runner_embodies... proves walker.exploration == walker.deliberation == ZERO for every founder), the propensities are read only by the unarmed discovery gates, so the SIMULATION is unchanged, only the genome fold moved. world_build 16 + world_determinism 3 replay- and worker-invariant, 663 sim lib tests green, run_world runs deterministically, fmt/clippy clean. No new reserved value. The gate said it runs its own blind-verify of the re-baseline (stable + worker-invariant + founder-zero-inert). SLICE 1 (the evolve-channels) COMPLETE.

NEXT: SLICE 2 (arm discovery in the run harness + a scenario, opt-in / hash-neutral where unarmed): install the affordance-percept registry and call Runner::set_discovery so the ideation loop RUNS in a free world (and set_reward_learning for the reward credit, and the appetitive/affordance registries). Ground run_world.rs (the free-run harness) and worldbuild.rs / build_dawn_runner (does the discovery loop get armed at the world-build level, opt-in, or only in the run harness?). FLAG A SEAM if arming discovery in the harness would AUTHOR behaviour rather than let it emerge (e.g. installing a percept registry or a scenario that hands beings the loop rather than letting selection lift the evolve-channels). Then SLICE 3 (a discovery-emergence reader, the analogue of the harm-belief-spread reader run_world prints: report committed reward beliefs + the actions enacted from exploration). Standing build-ahead in force; the gate gates on PR #95 (subscribed).
